title: MonoRace: Winning Champion-Level Drone Racing with Robust Monocular AI
summary: Autonomous drone racing represents a major frontier in robotics research. It requires an Artificial Intelligence (AI) that can run on board light-weight flying robots under tight resource and time constraints, while pushing the physical system to its limits. The state of the art in this area consists of a system with a stereo camera and an inertial measurement unit (IMU) that beat human drone racing champions in a controlled indoor environment. Here, we present MonoRace: an onboard drone racing approach that uses a monocular, rolling-shutter camera and IMU that generalizes to a competition environment without any external motion tracking system. The approach features robust state estimation that combines neural-network-based gate segmentation with a drone model. Moreover, it includes an offline optimization procedure that leverages the known geometry of gates to refine any state estimation parameter. This offline optimization is based purely on onboard flight data and is important for fine-tuning the vital external camera calibration parameters. Furthermore, the guidance and control are performed by a neural network that foregoes inner loop controllers by directly sending motor commands. This small network runs on the flight controller at 500Hz. The proposed approach won the 2025 Abu Dhabi Autonomous Drone Racing Competition (A2RL), outperforming all competing AI teams and three human world champion pilots in a direct knockout tournament. It set a new milestone in autonomous drone racing research, reaching speeds up to 100 km/h on the competition track and successfully coping with problems such as camera interference and IMU saturation.
authors: Guido C. H. E. de Croon
tldr: MonoRace presents a monocular vision and IMU based autonomous drone racing system that won the 2025 A2RL competition, outperforming both AI teams and human world champions, demonstrating robust performance at high speeds.
tldr_zh: MonoRace 提出了一个基于单目视觉和 IMU 的自主无人机竞速系统，该系统赢得了 2025 年阿布扎比自主无人机竞速比赛（A2RL），超越了所有人工智能团队和人类世界冠军，展示了在高速度下的稳健性能。
summary_zh: 自主无人机竞速代表着机器人研究的一个重要前沿领域。它需要一种能够在资源和时间都非常有限的情况下，在轻量级飞行机器人上运行的人工智能（AI），同时将物理系统推向极限。该领域的现有技术主要由一套立体相机和惯性测量单元（IMU）的系统组成，它曾在受控室内环境中击败了人类无人机竞速冠军。在此，我们提出MonoRace：一种使用单目卷帘快门相机和IMU的机载无人机竞速方法，该方法可以推广到无需任何外部运动跟踪系统的竞赛环境。该方法以稳健的状态估计为特色，它结合了基于神经网络的门体分割和无人机模型。此外，它还包括一个离线优化程序，该程序利用已知的门体几何形状来优化任何状态估计参数。这种离线优化完全基于机载飞行数据，对于微调关键的外部相机标定参数至关重要。更进一步，导航和控制由一个神经网络执行，该网络通过直接发送电机指令来省略内部回路控制器。这个小型网络在飞行控制器上以500Hz的频率运行。所提出的方法赢得了2025年阿布扎比自主无人机竞速大赛（A2RL），在直接淘汰赛中击败了所有参赛的AI团队和三位人类世界冠军飞行员。它在自主无人机竞速研究中树立了一个新的里程碑，在比赛赛道上达到了高达100公里/小时的速度，并成功解决了诸如相机干扰和IMU饱和等问题。

title: BayesianVLA: Bayesian Decomposition of Vision Language Action Models via Latent Action Queries
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have shown promise in robot manipulation but often struggle to generalize to new instructions or complex multi-task scenarios. We identify a critical pathology in current training paradigms where goal-driven data collection creates a dataset bias. In such datasets, language instructions are highly predictable from visual observations alone, causing the conditional mutual information between instructions and actions to vanish, a phenomenon we term Information Collapse. Consequently, models degenerate into vision-only policies that ignore language constraints and fail in out-of-distribution (OOD) settings. To address this, we propose BayesianVLA, a novel framework that enforces instruction following via Bayesian decomposition. By introducing learnable Latent Action Queries, we construct a dual-branch architecture to estimate both a vision-only prior $p(a \mid v)$ and a language-conditioned posterior $π(a \mid v, \ell)$. We then optimize the policy to maximize the conditional Pointwise Mutual Information (PMI) between actions and instructions. This objective effectively penalizes the vision shortcut and rewards actions that explicitly explain the language command. Without requiring new data, BayesianVLA significantly improves generalization. Extensive experiments across on SimplerEnv and RoboCasa demonstrate substantial gains, including an 11.3% improvement on the challenging OOD SimplerEnv benchmark, validating the ability of our approach to robustly ground language in action.
tldr: The paper introduces BayesianVLA, a novel Bayesian decomposition framework with Latent Action Queries to mitigate information collapse in Vision-Language-Action models, improving generalization in robot manipulation tasks by maximizing conditional Pointwise Mutual Information between actions and instructions.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了 BayesianVLA，一种新颖的贝叶斯分解框架，使用潜在动作查询来减轻视觉-语言-动作模型中的信息崩溃问题。通过最大化动作和指令之间的条件点互信息，从而提高了机器人操作任务中的泛化能力。
summary_zh: 视觉-语言-动作(VLA)模型在机器人操作方面展现出潜力，但经常难以泛化到新指令或复杂的多任务场景。我们发现当前训练范式中存在一个关键问题，即目标驱动的数据收集会产生数据集偏差。在此类数据集中，语言指令可以仅从视觉观察中高度预测出来，导致指令和动作之间的条件互信息消失，我们称之为信息坍塌现象。因此，模型退化成仅依赖视觉的策略，忽略了语言约束，并在分布外(OOD)环境中失效。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的框架 BayesianVLA，通过贝叶斯分解来强制执行指令遵循。通过引入可学习的潜在动作查询，我们构建了一个双分支架构，用于估计仅依赖视觉的先验 $p(a \mid v)$ 和语言条件化的后验 $π(a \mid v, \ell)$。然后，我们优化策略，以最大化动作和指令之间的条件点互信息(PMI)。这个目标有效地惩罚了视觉捷径，并奖励那些明确解释语言命令的动作。无需新数据，BayesianVLA 显著提高了泛化能力。在SimplerEnv 和 RoboCasa 上进行的大量实验证明了显著的提升，包括在具有挑战性的 OOD SimplerEnv 基准测试上提高了 11.3%，验证了我们方法在动作中稳健地关联语言指令的能力。

title: Knowledge Graphs are Implicit Reward Models: Path-Derived Signals Enable Compositional Reasoning
summary: Large language models have achieved near-expert performance in structured reasoning domains like mathematics and programming, yet their ability to perform compositional multi-hop reasoning in specialized scientific fields remains limited. We propose a bottom-up learning paradigm in which models are grounded in axiomatic domain facts and compose them to solve complex, unseen tasks. To this end, we present a post-training pipeline, based on a combination of supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning (RL), in which knowledge graphs act as implicit reward models. By deriving novel reward signals from knowledge graph paths, we provide verifiable, scalable, and grounded supervision that encourages models to compose intermediate axioms rather than optimize only final answers during RL. We validate this approach in the medical domain, training a 14B model on short-hop reasoning paths (1-3 hops) and evaluating its zero-shot generalization to complex multi-hop queries (4-5 hops). Our experiments show that path-derived rewards act as a "compositional bridge", enabling our model to significantly outperform much larger models and frontier systems like GPT-5.2 and Gemini 3 Pro, on the most difficult reasoning tasks. Furthermore, we demonstrate the robustness of our approach to adversarial perturbations against option-shuffling stress tests. This work suggests that grounding the reasoning process in structured knowledge is a scalable and efficient path toward intelligent reasoning.
tldr: This paper introduces a method to improve compositional multi-hop reasoning in LLMs by using knowledge graphs as implicit reward models, resulting in significant performance gains in the medical domain, even surpassing larger models.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种通过使用知识图谱作为隐式奖励模型来提升LLM中组合式多跳推理能力的方法。该方法在医疗领域取得了显著的性能提升，甚至超越了更大的模型。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型在结构化推理领域，例如数学和编程，已经取得了接近专家水平的表现，但它们在专业科学领域执行组合式多跳推理的能力仍然有限。我们提出一种自底向上的学习范式，在这种范式中，模型基于公理化的领域事实，并将它们组合起来以解决复杂的、未见过的任务。为此，我们提出一个基于监督微调和强化学习（RL）相结合的后训练流程，其中知识图谱充当隐式奖励模型。通过从知识图谱路径中推导出新的奖励信号，我们提供可验证的、可扩展的和基于可靠依据的监督，鼓励模型组合中间公理，而不是在强化学习过程中仅优化最终答案。我们在医学领域验证了这种方法，对一个140亿参数的模型进行短跳推理路径（1-3跳）的训练，并评估其对复杂多跳查询（4-5跳）的零样本泛化能力。我们的实验表明，基于路径推导的奖励充当了“组合桥梁”，使我们的模型在最困难的推理任务上能够显著优于更大的模型和前沿系统，如GPT-5.2和Gemini 3 Pro。此外，我们还证明了我们的方法对对抗性扰动具有鲁棒性，能够通过选项洗牌压力测试。这项工作表明，将推理过程建立在结构化知识的基础上是实现智能推理的可扩展且高效的途径。

title: V-CAGE: Context-Aware Generation and Verification for Scalable Long-Horizon Embodied Tasks
summary: Learning long-horizon embodied behaviors from synthetic data remains challenging because generated scenes are often physically implausible, language-driven programs frequently "succeed" without satisfying task semantics, and high-level instructions require grounding into executable action sequences. To address these limitations, we introduce V-CAGE, a closed-loop framework for generating robust, semantically aligned manipulation datasets at scale. First, we propose a context-aware instantiation mechanism that enforces geometric consistency during scene synthesis. By dynamically maintaining a map of prohibited spatial areas as objects are placed, our system prevents interpenetration and ensures reachable, conflict-free configurations in cluttered environments. Second, to bridge the gap between abstract intent and low-level control, we employ a hierarchical instruction decomposition module. This decomposes high-level goals (e.g., "get ready for work") into compositional action primitives, facilitating coherent long-horizon planning. Crucially, we enforce semantic correctness through a VLM-based verification loop. Acting as a visual critic, the VLM performs rigorous rejection sampling after each subtask, filtering out "silent failures" where code executes but fails to achieve the visual goal. Experiments demonstrate that V-CAGE yields datasets with superior physical and semantic fidelity, significantly boosting the success rate and generalization of downstream policies compared to non-verified baselines.
tldr: The paper introduces V-CAGE, a framework for generating high-quality synthetic datasets for long-horizon embodied tasks by enforcing geometric consistency and employing a VLM-based verification loop to ensure semantic correctness.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了V-CAGE，一个用于生成高质量合成数据集的框架，该数据集用于长时间范围的具身任务，通过强制执行几何一致性和使用基于VLM的验证循环来确保语义正确性。
summary_zh: 从合成数据中学习长期具身行为仍然具有挑战性，因为生成的场景通常在物理上不可信，语言驱动的程序常常在不满足任务语义的情况下 “成功”，并且高级指令需要转化为可执行的动作序列。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了 V-CAGE，一个闭环框架，用于大规模生成鲁棒、语义对齐的操纵数据集。首先，我们提出了一种上下文感知的实例化机制，以确保场景合成过程中的几何一致性。通过在放置物体时动态维护禁止空间区域的地图，我们的系统可以防止物体相互穿透，并确保在杂乱环境中可到达的、无冲突的配置。其次，为了弥合抽象意图和低层控制之间的差距，我们采用了一个分层Instruction分解模块。该模块将高级目标（例如，“准备上班”）分解为组合动作原语，从而促进连贯的长期规划。至关重要的是，我们通过基于 VLM 的验证循环来强制执行语义正确性。VLM 充当视觉评论员，在每个子任务之后执行严格的拒绝采样，过滤掉代码执行但未能实现视觉目标的“静默失败”。实验表明，与未经验证的基线相比，V-CAGE 生成的数据集具有卓越的物理和语义保真度，从而显著提高了下游策略的成功率和泛化能力。

title: TIDAL: Temporally Interleaved Diffusion and Action Loop for High-Frequency VLA Control
summary: Large-scale Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer semantic generalization but suffer from high inference latency, limiting them to low-frequency batch-and-execute paradigm. This frequency mismatch creates an execution blind spot, causing failures in dynamic environments where targets move during the open-loop execution window. We propose TIDAL (Temporally Interleaved Diffusion and Action Loop), a hierarchical framework that decouples semantic reasoning from high-frequency actuation. TIDAL operates as a backbone-agnostic module for diffusion-based VLAs, using a dual-frequency architecture to redistribute the computational budget. Specifically, a low-frequency macro-intent loop caches semantic embeddings, while a high-frequency micro-control loop interleaves single-step flow integration with execution. This design enables approximately 9 Hz control updates on edge hardware (vs. approximately 2.4 Hz baselines) without increasing marginal overhead. To handle the resulting latency shift, we introduce a temporally misaligned training strategy where the policy learns predictive compensation using stale semantic intent alongside real-time proprioception. Additionally, we address the insensitivity of static vision encoders to velocity by incorporating a differential motion predictor. TIDAL is architectural, making it orthogonal to system-level optimizations. Experiments show a 2x performance gain over open-loop baselines in dynamic interception tasks. Despite a marginal regression in static success rates, our approach yields a 4x increase in feedback frequency and extends the effective horizon of semantic embeddings beyond the native action chunk size. Under non-paused inference protocols, TIDAL remains robust where standard baselines fail due to latency.
tldr: The paper introduces TIDAL, a hierarchical framework for Vision-Language-Action models that decouples semantic reasoning from high-frequency actuation, achieving faster control updates in dynamic environments with a temporally misaligned training strategy and a differential motion predictor.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了TIDAL，一个视觉-语言-动作模型的分层框架，将语义推理与高频驱动分离，通过时间不对齐的训练策略和差分运动预测器，在动态环境中实现更快的控制更新。
summary_zh: 大规模视觉-语言-动作 (VLA) 模型具有语义泛化能力，但推理延迟较高，导致它们只能采用低频率的批处理-执行模式。这种频率不匹配会产生执行盲点，导致在动态环境中，即目标在开环执行窗口期间发生移动时，出现故障。我们提出了 TIDAL (时间交错扩散与动作循环)，这是一个分层框架，将语义推理与高频驱动解耦。TIDAL 作为一个与主干网络无关的模块，适用于基于扩散的 VLA 模型，它使用双频架构来重新分配计算预算。具体来说，一个低频宏指令循环缓存语义嵌入，而一个高频微控制循环将单步流积分与执行交错进行。这种设计使得在边缘硬件上能够实现约 9 Hz 的控制更新（相比于约 2.4 Hz 的基线），而无需增加边际开销。为了处理由此产生的延迟偏移，我们引入了一种时间错位训练策略，其中策略学习利用过时的语义指令以及实时本体感受信息进行预测补偿。此外，我们通过集成一个差分运动预测器来解决静态视觉编码器对速度不敏感的问题。TIDAL 具有架构上的优势，使其与系统级优化正交。实验表明，在动态拦截任务中，性能比开环基线提高了 2 倍。尽管静态成功率略有下降，但我们的方法使反馈频率提高了 4 倍，并将语义嵌入的有效范围扩展到本机动作块大小之外。在非暂停推理协议下，TIDAL 仍然保持稳健，而标准基线则因延迟而失效。

title: Vision-Language Models on the Edge for Real-Time Robotic Perception
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) enable multimodal reasoning for robotic perception and interaction, but their deployment in real-world systems remains constrained by latency, limited onboard resources, and privacy risks of cloud offloading. Edge intelligence within 6G, particularly Open RAN and Multi-access Edge Computing (MEC), offers a pathway to address these challenges by bringing computation closer to the data source. This work investigates the deployment of VLMs on ORAN/MEC infrastructure using the Unitree G1 humanoid robot as an embodied testbed. We design a WebRTC-based pipeline that streams multimodal data to an edge node and evaluate LLaMA-3.2-11B-Vision-Instruct deployed at the edge versus in the cloud under real-time conditions. Our results show that edge deployment preserves near-cloud accuracy while reducing end-to-end latency by 5\%. We further evaluate Qwen2-VL-2B-Instruct, a compact model optimized for resource-constrained environments, which achieves sub-second responsiveness, cutting latency by more than half but at the cost of accuracy.
tldr: This paper explores deploying Vision-Language Models (VLMs) on edge computing infrastructure for real-time robotic perception, demonstrating latency reductions compared to cloud deployment using LLaMA-3.2-11B-Vision-Instruct and Qwen2-VL-2B-Instruct on a Unitree G1 humanoid robot.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了在边缘计算基础设施上部署视觉语言模型（VLMs）以实现实时机器人感知，展示了使用Unitree G1人形机器人在LLaMA-3.2-11B-Vision-Instruct和Qwen2-VL-2B-Instruct上部署相比云部署的延迟降低。
summary_zh: 视觉-语言模型（VLMs）支持机器人感知与交互的多模态推理，但其在现实世界系统中的部署仍然受到延迟、有限的板载资源以及云卸载的隐私风险的限制。6G中的边缘智能，特别是开放式无线接入网络（Open RAN）和多接入边缘计算（MEC），通过将计算移至更靠近数据源的位置，为解决这些挑战提供了一条途径。本研究以宇树G1人形机器人为具身测试平台，探讨了VLMs在ORAN/MEC基础设施上的部署。我们设计了一条基于WebRTC的流水线，将多模态数据流传输到边缘节点，并评估了在实时条件下，部署在边缘与云端的LLaMA-3.2-11B-Vision-Instruct模型。我们的结果表明，边缘部署在保持接近云端的准确率的同时，将端到端延迟降低了5%。我们进一步评估了Qwen2-VL-2B-Instruct，这是一款针对资源受限环境优化的紧凑型模型，它实现了亚秒级的响应速度，将延迟缩短了一半以上，但代价是牺牲了准确率。

title: AutoDriDM: An Explainable Benchmark for Decision-Making of Vision-Language Models in Autonomous Driving
summary: Autonomous driving is a highly challenging domain that requires reliable perception and safe decision-making in complex scenarios. Recent vision-language models (VLMs) demonstrate reasoning and generalization abilities, opening new possibilities for autonomous driving; however, existing benchmarks and metrics overemphasize perceptual competence and fail to adequately assess decision-making processes. In this work, we present AutoDriDM, a decision-centric, progressive benchmark with 6,650 questions across three dimensions - Object, Scene, and Decision. We evaluate mainstream VLMs to delineate the perception-to-decision capability boundary in autonomous driving, and our correlation analysis reveals weak alignment between perception and decision-making performance. We further conduct explainability analyses of models' reasoning processes, identifying key failure modes such as logical reasoning errors, and introduce an analyzer model to automate large-scale annotation. AutoDriDM bridges the gap between perception-centered and decision-centered evaluation, providing guidance toward safer and more reliable VLMs for real-world autonomous driving.
tldr: The paper introduces AutoDriDM, a new benchmark for evaluating the decision-making capabilities of vision-language models in autonomous driving, highlighting the gap between perception and decision performance and providing explainability analyses of model failures.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了AutoDriDM，一个新的基准，用于评估视觉语言模型在自动驾驶中的决策能力，突出了感知和决策性能之间的差距，并提供了模型失败的可解释性分析。
summary_zh: 自动驾驶是一个极具挑战性的领域，需要在复杂场景中实现可靠的感知和安全的决策。 近期出现的视觉-语言模型（VLMs）展现了推理和泛化能力，为自动驾驶开启了新的可能性；然而，现有的基准和评价指标过度强调感知能力，而未能充分评估决策过程。 在这项工作中，我们提出了AutoDriDM，一个以决策为中心、渐进式的基准，包含跨越物体、场景和决策三个维度的6650个问题。我们评估了主流的VLMs，以界定在自动驾驶中从感知到决策的能力边界，并且我们的相关性分析揭示了感知和决策性能之间存在的弱关联。 我们进一步对模型的推理过程进行了可解释性分析，识别了诸如逻辑推理错误等关键失败模式，并引入了一个分析器模型来自动化大规模标注。 AutoDriDM弥合了以感知为中心和以决策为中心的评估之间的差距，为现实世界中更安全、更可靠的VLMs自动驾驶提供了指导。

title: FARE: Fast-Slow Agentic Robotic Exploration
summary: This work advances autonomous robot exploration by integrating agent-level semantic reasoning with fast local control. We introduce FARE, a hierarchical autonomous exploration framework that integrates a large language model (LLM) for global reasoning with a reinforcement learning (RL) policy for local decision making. FARE follows a fast-slow thinking paradigm. The slow-thinking LLM module interprets a concise textual description of the unknown environment and synthesizes an agent-level exploration strategy, which is then grounded into a sequence of global waypoints through a topological graph. To further improve reasoning efficiency, this module employs a modularity-based pruning mechanism that reduces redundant graph structures. The fast-thinking RL module executes exploration by reacting to local observations while being guided by the LLM-generated global waypoints. The RL policy is additionally shaped by a reward term that encourages adherence to the global waypoints, enabling coherent and robust closed-loop behavior. This architecture decouples semantic reasoning from geometric decision, allowing each module to operate in its appropriate temporal and spatial scale. In challenging simulated environments, our results show that FARE achieves substantial improvements in exploration efficiency over state-of-the-art baselines. We further deploy FARE on hardware and validate it in complex, large scale $200m\times130m$ building environment.
tldr: The paper introduces FARE, a hierarchical autonomous robot exploration framework that integrates a Large Language Model (LLM) for global reasoning and a Reinforcement Learning (RL) policy for local decision-making, validated in both simulation and real-world environments.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为FARE的分层自主机器人探索框架，该框架集成了大型语言模型（LLM）用于全局推理和强化学习（RL）策略用于局部决策，并在模拟和真实世界环境中进行了验证。
summary_zh: 本工作通过将智能体层面的语义推理与快速局部控制相集成，推进了自主机器人探索技术。我们提出了一种分层自主探索框架FARE，它集成了用于全局推理的大语言模型（LLM）和用于局部决策的强化学习（RL）策略。FARE遵循一种快慢思考范式。慢思考的LLM模块解读未知环境的简洁文本描述，并综合制定一个智能体层面的探索策略，然后通过拓扑图将其转化为一系列全局航路点。为了进一步提高推理效率，该模块采用一种基于模块性的修剪机制，以减少冗余的图结构。快思考的RL模块在LLM生成的全局航路点指导下，通过对局部观测的反应来执行探索。RL策略还受到奖励项的塑造，该奖励项鼓励遵守全局航路点，从而实现连贯且稳健的闭环行为。这种架构将语义推理与几何决策分离，使得每个模块都能在其适当的时间和空间尺度上运行。在具有挑战性的模拟环境中，我们的结果表明，FARE在探索效率方面比最先进的基线方法有了显著的提高。我们进一步将FARE部署在硬件上，并在复杂的大型200米×130米建筑物环境中对其进行了验证。

title: Spatially Generalizable Mobile Manipulation via Adaptive Experience Selection and Dynamic Imagination
summary: Mobile Manipulation (MM) involves long-horizon decision-making over multi-stage compositions of heterogeneous skills, such as navigation and picking up objects. Despite recent progress, existing MM methods still face two key limitations: (i) low sample efficiency, due to ineffective use of redundant data generated during long-term MM interactions; and (ii) poor spatial generalization, as policies trained on specific tasks struggle to transfer to new spatial layouts without additional training. In this paper, we address these challenges through Adaptive Experience Selection (AES) and model-based dynamic imagination. In particular, AES makes MM agents pay more attention to critical experience fragments in long trajectories that affect task success, improving skill chain learning and mitigating skill forgetting. Based on AES, a Recurrent State-Space Model (RSSM) is introduced for Model-Predictive Forward Planning (MPFP) by capturing the coupled dynamics between the mobile base and the manipulator and imagining the dynamics of future manipulations. RSSM-based MPFP can reinforce MM skill learning on the current task while enabling effective generalization to new spatial layouts. Comparative studies across different experimental configurations demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing MM policies. Real-world experiments further validate the feasibility and practicality of our method.
tldr: This paper introduces Adaptive Experience Selection (AES) and a Recurrent State-Space Model (RSSM) for mobile manipulation, improving sample efficiency and spatial generalization in long-horizon tasks.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了用于移动操作的自适应经验选择（AES）和循环状态空间模型（RSSM），提高了长时程任务中的样本效率和空间泛化能力。
summary_zh: 移动操作（MM）涉及对多阶段异构技能（如导航和拾取物体）进行长时域决策。尽管最近取得了一些进展，现有的MM方法仍然面临两个关键限制：（i）样本效率低，由于未有效利用长期MM交互过程中产生的冗余数据；以及（ii）空间泛化能力差，因为在特定任务上训练的策略难以在没有额外训练的情况下迁移到新的空间布局。在本文中，我们通过自适应经验选择（AES）和基于模型的动态想象来解决这些挑战。具体而言，AES使MM智能体更加关注长轨迹中影响任务成功的关键经验片段，从而改进技能链学习并减轻技能遗忘。基于AES，引入了循环状态空间模型（RSSM），用于模型预测前向规划（MPFP），通过捕捉移动底座和机械臂之间的耦合动力学，并想象未来操作的动力学。基于RSSM的MPFP可以加强当前任务上的MM技能学习，同时实现对新空间布局的有效泛化。跨不同实验配置的比较研究表明，我们的方法显著优于现有的MM策略。真实世界的实验进一步验证了我们方法的可行性和实用性。

title: A Brain-inspired Embodied Intelligence for Fluid and Fast Reflexive Robotics Control
summary: Recent advances in embodied intelligence have leveraged massive scaling of data and model parameters to master natural-language command following and multi-task control. In contrast, biological systems demonstrate an innate ability to acquire skills rapidly from sparse experience. Crucially, current robotic policies struggle to replicate the dynamic stability, reflexive responsiveness, and temporal memory inherent in biological motion. Here we present Neuromorphic Vision-Language-Action (NeuroVLA), a framework that mimics the structural organization of the bio-nervous system between the cortex, cerebellum, and spinal cord. We adopt a system-level bio-inspired design: a high-level model plans goals, an adaptive cerebellum module stabilizes motion using high-frequency sensors feedback, and a bio-inspired spinal layer executes lightning-fast actions generation. NeuroVLA represents the first deployment of a neuromorphic VLA on physical robotics, achieving state-of-the-art performance. We observe the emergence of biological motor characteristics without additional data or special guidance: it stops the shaking in robotic arms, saves significant energy(only 0.4w on Neuromorphic Processor), shows temporal memory ability and triggers safety reflexes in less than 20 milliseconds.
tldr: The paper introduces NeuroVLA, a bio-inspired framework mimicking the brain's structure for fast and energy-efficient robotic control, demonstrating improved stability, temporal memory, and reflexive actions on physical robots.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了NeuroVLA，一个模仿大脑结构的生物启发框架，用于快速且节能的机器人控制，展示了物理机器人上改进的稳定性、时间记忆和反射动作。
summary_zh: 具身智能领域的最新进展利用大规模的数据和模型参数来掌握自然语言命令跟随和多任务控制。相比之下，生物系统表现出一种从稀疏经验中快速获取技能的先天能力。至关重要的是，当前的机器人策略难以复制生物运动中固有的动态稳定性、反射响应和时间记忆。本文我们提出神经形态视觉-语言-动作（NeuroVLA）框架，该框架模仿大脑皮层、小脑和脊髓之间生物神经系统的结构组织。我们采用系统层面的生物启发式设计：一个高层模型规划目标，一个自适应小脑模块利用高频率传感器反馈来稳定运动，以及一个生物启发式脊髓层执行闪电般快速的动作生成。NeuroVLA代表了神经形态VLA在物理机器人上的首次部署，实现了最先进的性能。我们观察到生物运动特征在没有额外数据或特殊指导的情况下涌现：它停止了机械臂的抖动，节省了大量能源（在神经形态处理器上仅为0.4瓦），展现出时间记忆能力，并在不到20毫秒内触发安全反射。

title: Probing Prompt Design for Socially Compliant Robot Navigation with Vision Language Models
summary: Language models are increasingly used for social robot navigation, yet existing benchmarks largely overlook principled prompt design for socially compliant behavior. This limitation is particularly relevant in practice, as many systems rely on small vision language models (VLMs) for efficiency. Compared to large language models, small VLMs exhibit weaker decision-making capabilities, making effective prompt design critical for accurate navigation. Inspired by cognitive theories of human learning and motivation, we study prompt design along two dimensions: system guidance (action-focused, reasoning-oriented, and perception-reasoning prompts) and motivational framing, where models compete against humans, other AI systems, or their past selves. Experiments on two socially compliant navigation datasets reveal three key findings. First, for non-finetuned GPT-4o, competition against humans achieves the best performance, while competition against other AI systems performs worst. For finetuned models, competition against the model's past self yields the strongest results, followed by competition against humans, with performance further influenced by coupling effects among prompt design, model choice, and dataset characteristics. Second, inappropriate system prompt design can significantly degrade performance, even compared to direct finetuning. Third, while direct finetuning substantially improves semantic-level metrics such as perception, prediction, and reasoning, it yields limited gains in action accuracy. In contrast, our system prompts produce a disproportionately larger improvement in action accuracy, indicating that the proposed prompt design primarily acts as a decision-level constraint rather than a representational enhancement.
tldr: The paper investigates prompt design strategies for small vision-language models in socially compliant robot navigation, focusing on system guidance and motivational framing, and finds that appropriate prompting can significantly improve action accuracy, even surpassing finetuning gains in certain cases.
tldr_zh: 该论文研究了适用于小型视觉语言模型在社会规范机器人导航中的提示设计策略，重点关注系统指导和动机框架。研究发现，适当的提示可以显著提高动作准确性，在某些情况下甚至超过微调的增益。
summary_zh: 语言模型越来越多地应用于社交机器人导航，然而，现有的基准测试在很大程度上忽略了为实现符合社会规范行为的原则性提示设计。这一局限性在实践中尤为重要，因为许多系统依赖于小型视觉语言模型（VLMs）以提高效率。与大型语言模型相比，小型VLMs表现出较弱的决策能力，因此有效的提示设计对于准确导航至关重要。受到人类学习和动机的认知理论的启发，我们从两个维度研究提示设计：系统指导（以行动为中心、以推理为导向以及感知-推理提示）和动机框架，其中模型与人类、其他人工智能系统或过去的自身进行竞争。在两个符合社会规范的导航数据集上的实验揭示了三个关键发现。首先，对于未经过微调的GPT-4o，与人类的竞争实现了最佳性能，而与其他人工智能系统的竞争表现最差。对于经过微调的模型，与模型过去的自身竞争产生了最强的结果，其次是与人类的竞争，并且性能进一步受到提示设计、模型选择和数据集特征之间的耦合效应的影响。其次，不恰当的系统提示设计可能会显著降低性能，甚至与直接微调相比也是如此。第三，虽然直接微调显著提高了语义级别的指标，例如感知、预测和推理，但它在行动准确性方面产生的收益有限。相比之下，我们的系统提示在行动准确性方面产生了不成比例的更大的改进，表明所提出的提示设计主要充当决策层面的约束，而不是表征增强。

title: UniCon: A Unified System for Efficient Robot Learning Transfers
summary: Deploying learning-based controllers across heterogeneous robots is challenging due to platform differences, inconsistent interfaces, and inefficient middleware. To address these issues, we present UniCon, a lightweight framework that standardizes states, control flow, and instrumentation across platforms. It decomposes workflows into execution graphs with reusable components, separating system states from control logic to enable plug-and-play deployment across various robot morphologies. Unlike traditional middleware, it prioritizes efficiency through batched, vectorized data flow, minimizing communication overhead and improving inference latency. This modular, data-oriented approach enables seamless sim-to-real transfer with minimal re-engineering. We demonstrate that UniCon reduces code redundancy when transferring workflows and achieves higher inference efficiency compared to ROS-based systems. Deployed on over 12 robot models from 7 manufacturers, it has been successfully integrated into ongoing research projects, proving its effectiveness in real-world scenarios.
tldr: The paper introduces UniCon, a lightweight framework designed to standardize robot control and data flow across heterogeneous platforms, enabling efficient sim-to-real transfer and reducing code redundancy.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为UniCon的轻量级框架，旨在标准化异构平台上的机器人控制和数据流，从而实现高效的模拟到真实世界的迁移并减少代码冗余。
summary_zh: 在异构机器人上部署基于学习的控制器极具挑战性，原因在于平台差异、接口不一致以及中间件效率低下。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了UniCon，一个轻量级框架，用于标准化跨平台的状态、控制流和仪表设备。它将工作流程分解为具有可重用组件的执行图，将系统状态与控制逻辑分离，从而实现各种机器人形态的即插即用部署。与传统中间件不同，它通过批量化、向量化的数据流优先考虑效率，最大限度地减少通信开销并提高推理延迟。这种模块化、面向数据的方法能够在最小化的重新工程下实现无缝的仿真到现实转移。我们证明了UniCon在转移工作流程时减少了代码冗余，并且与基于ROS的系统相比实现了更高的推理效率。UniCon已部署在7家制造商的超过12种机器人模型上，并已成功集成到正在进行的研究项目中，证明了其在实际场景中的有效性。

title: Agentic AI Meets Edge Computing in Autonomous UAV Swarms
summary: The integration of agentic AI, powered by large language models (LLMs) with autonomous reasoning, planning, and execution, into unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) swarms opens new operational possibilities and brings the vision of the Internet of Drones closer to reality. However, infrastructure constraints, dynamic environments, and the computational demands of multi-agent coordination limit real-world deployment in high-risk scenarios such as wildfires and disaster response. This paper investigates the integration of LLM-based agentic AI and edge computing to realize scalable and resilient autonomy in UAV swarms. We first discuss three architectures for supporting UAV swarms - standalone, edge-enabled, and edge-cloud hybrid deployment - each optimized for varying autonomy and connectivity levels. Then, a use case for wildfire search and rescue (SAR) is designed to demonstrate the efficiency of the edge-enabled architecture, enabling high SAR coverage, reduced mission completion times, and a higher level of autonomy compared to traditional approaches. Finally, we highlight open challenges in integrating LLMs and edge computing for mission-critical UAV-swarm applications.
tldr: This paper explores the integration of LLM-based agentic AI and edge computing for scalable and resilient autonomous UAV swarms, highlighting its benefits in a wildfire search and rescue use case.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了基于LLM的代理AI与边缘计算在可扩展和弹性自主无人机群中的集成，并强调了其在野火搜索救援用例中的优势。
summary_zh: 基于大型语言模型 (LLM) 的自主推理、规划和执行能力驱动的能动人工智能 (Agentic AI) 与无人机 (UAV) 群的集成，为无人机群带来了新的运行可能性，并使无人机互联网的愿景更接近现实。然而，基础设施限制、动态环境以及多智能体协同的计算需求限制了其在野火和灾难响应等高风险场景中的实际部署。本文探讨了 LLM 基能动人工智能与边缘计算的集成，以实现无人机群的可扩展且有弹性的自主性。我们首先讨论了三种支持无人机群的架构——独立式、边缘赋能和边缘云混合部署——每种架构都针对不同的自主性和连接级别进行了优化。然后，设计了一个野火搜索与救援 (SAR) 的用例，以展示边缘赋能架构的效率，与传统方法相比，它实现了更高的 SAR 覆盖率、更短的任务完成时间以及更高程度的自主性。最后，我们强调了将 LLM 和边缘计算集成到任务关键型无人机群应用中的未解决挑战。

title: Q-learning with Adjoint Matching
summary: We propose Q-learning with Adjoint Matching (QAM), a novel TD-based reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm that tackles a long-standing challenge in continuous-action RL: efficient optimization of an expressive diffusion or flow-matching policy with respect to a parameterized Q-function. Effective optimization requires exploiting the first-order information of the critic, but it is challenging to do so for flow or diffusion policies because direct gradient-based optimization via backpropagation through their multi-step denoising process is numerically unstable. Existing methods work around this either by only using the value and discarding the gradient information, or by relying on approximations that sacrifice policy expressivity or bias the learned policy. QAM sidesteps both of these challenges by leveraging adjoint matching, a recently proposed technique in generative modeling, which transforms the critic's action gradient to form a step-wise objective function that is free from unstable backpropagation, while providing an unbiased, expressive policy at the optimum. Combined with temporal-difference backup for critic learning, QAM consistently outperforms prior approaches on hard, sparse reward tasks in both offline and offline-to-online RL.
tldr: The paper introduces Q-learning with Adjoint Matching (QAM), a novel reinforcement learning algorithm that addresses the challenge of optimizing expressive diffusion or flow-matching policies in continuous action spaces by using adjoint matching to avoid unstable backpropagation. It outperforms existing methods on hard, sparse reward tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Q-learning与伴随匹配（QAM），一种新颖的强化学习算法，通过使用伴随匹配来避免不稳定的反向传播，解决了在连续动作空间中优化表达扩散或流匹配策略的挑战。在困难的稀疏奖励任务中，它优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种基于伴随匹配的Q学习(QAM)，这是一种新型的基于时序差分 (TD) 的强化学习 (RL) 算法，旨在解决连续动作强化学习中一个长期存在的挑战：对于参数化的Q函数，高效优化具有表现力的扩散或流匹配策略。有效的优化需要利用批评网络的的一阶信息，但对于流或扩散策略来说，直接通过多步去噪过程进行基于梯度的反向传播优化在数值上是不稳定的，因此这具有挑战性。现有方法通过仅使用价值函数并丢弃梯度信息，或者依赖于牺牲策略表现力或偏差学习策略的近似来实现。QAM 通过利用伴随匹配来规避这两个挑战，伴随匹配是最近在生成建模中提出的一种技术，它转换批评网络的动作梯度以形成一个逐步的目标函数，该函数避免了不稳定的反向传播，同时在最优情况下提供了无偏且具有表现力的策略。结合用于批评网络学习的时序差分备份，QAM 在离线和离线到在线强化学习中，始终优于先前方法，尤其是在困难的、稀疏奖励任务中。

title: Outcome-Based RL Provably Leads Transformers to Reason, but Only With the Right Data
summary: Transformers trained via Reinforcement Learning (RL) with outcome-based supervision can spontaneously develop the ability to generate intermediate reasoning steps (Chain-of-Thought). Yet the mechanism by which sparse rewards drive gradient descent to discover such systematic reasoning remains poorly understood. We address this by analyzing the gradient flow dynamics of single-layer Transformers on a synthetic graph traversal task that cannot be solved without Chain-of-Thought (CoT) but admits a simple iterative solution. We prove that despite training solely on final-answer correctness, gradient flow drives the model to converge to a structured, interpretable algorithm that iteratively traverses the graph vertex-by-vertex. We characterize the distributional properties required for this emergence, identifying the critical role of "simple examples": instances requiring fewer reasoning steps. When the training distribution places sufficient mass on these simpler instances, the model learns a generalizable traversal strategy that extrapolates to longer chains; when this mass vanishes, gradient-based learning becomes infeasible. We corroborate our theoretical results through experiments on synthetic data and with real-world language models on mathematical reasoning tasks, validating that our theoretical findings carry over to practical settings.
tldr: This paper theoretically and empirically analyzes how outcome-based RL can lead Transformers to learn Chain-of-Thought reasoning, highlighting the importance of simpler examples in the training data.
tldr_zh: 本文从理论和实验上分析了基于结果的强化学习如何引导Transformer学习思维链推理，并强调了训练数据中简单样本的重要性。
summary_zh: 通过基于结果监督的强化学习（RL）训练的Transformer模型能够自发地发展出生成中间推理步骤（思维链，Chain-of-Thought）的能力。然而，稀疏奖励驱动梯度下降发现这种系统性推理的机制仍然知之甚少。我们通过分析单层Transformer在合成图遍历任务中的梯度流动力学来解决这个问题。该任务在没有思维链（CoT）的情况下无法解决，但允许一个简单的迭代解决方案。我们证明，尽管仅在最终答案的正确性上进行训练，梯度流仍然驱动模型收敛到一个结构化的、可解释的算法，该算法逐顶点地迭代遍历图。我们描述了这种涌现所需的分布属性，明确了“简单例子”的关键作用，即需要较少推理步骤的实例。当训练分布将足够的权重放在这些更简单的实例上时，模型会学习一种可泛化的遍历策略，并将其外推到更长的链条；当这种权重消失时，基于梯度的学习变得不可行。我们通过在合成数据和真实世界的语言模型上进行数学推理任务的实验来证实我们的理论结果，验证了我们的理论发现可以推广到实际环境中。

title: Emerging from Ground: Addressing Intent Deviation in Tool-Using Agents via Deriving Real Calls into Virtual Trajectories
summary: LLMs have advanced tool-using agents for real-world applications, yet they often lead to unexpected behaviors or results. Beyond obvious failures, the subtle issue of "intent deviation" severely hinders reliable evaluation and performance improvement. Existing post-training methods generally leverage either real system samples or virtual data simulated by LLMs. However, the former is costly due to reliance on hand-crafted user requests, while the latter suffers from distribution shift from the real tools in the wild. Additionally, both methods lack negative samples tailored to intent deviation scenarios, hindering effective guidance on preference learning. We introduce RISE, a "Real-to-Virtual" method designed to mitigate intent deviation. Anchoring on verified tool primitives, RISE synthesizes virtual trajectories and generates diverse negative samples through mutation on critical parameters. With synthetic data, RISE fine-tunes backbone LLMs via the two-stage training for intent alignment. Evaluation results demonstrate that data synthesized by RISE achieve promising results in eight metrics covering user requires, execution trajectories and agent responses. Integrating with training, RISE achieves an average 35.28% improvement in Acctask (task completion) and 23.27% in Accintent (intent alignment), outperforming SOTA baselines by 1.20--42.09% and 1.17--54.93% respectively.
tldr: The paper introduces RISE, a "Real-to-Virtual" method that addresses intent deviation in tool-using LLM agents by synthesizing virtual trajectories and generating negative samples for fine-tuning, achieving significant improvements in task completion and intent alignment.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为RISE的"Real-to-Virtual"方法，通过合成虚拟轨迹并生成负样本进行微调，以解决工具使用LLM代理中的意图偏差问题，并在任务完成和意图对齐方面取得了显著提升。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）推动了用于现实世界应用的工具使用型代理的发展，但它们往往会导致意外的行为或结果。除了明显的失败之外，“意图偏差”这一微妙问题严重阻碍了可靠的评估和性能提升。现有的后训练方法通常利用真实系统样本或由 LLM 模拟的虚拟数据。然而，前者由于依赖手工制作的用户请求而成本高昂，而后者则遭受来自真实工具的分布偏移。此外，两种方法都缺乏针对意图偏差场景定制的负样本，从而阻碍了对偏好学习的有效指导。我们介绍 RISE，一种旨在缓解意图偏差的“真实到虚拟”方法。RISE 基于经过验证的工具原语，合成虚拟轨迹，并通过关键参数的突变生成多样化的负样本。利用合成数据，RISE 通过两阶段训练微调骨干 LLM，以实现意图对齐。评估结果表明，RISE 合成的数据在涵盖用户需求、执行轨迹和代理响应的八个指标上取得了可喜的成果。与训练相结合，RISE 在 Acctask（任务完成）方面平均提高了 35.28%，在 Accintent（意图对齐）方面平均提高了 23.27%，优于 SOTA 基线分别为 1.20--42.09% 和 1.17--54.93%。

title: Memory Retention Is Not Enough to Master Memory Tasks in Reinforcement Learning
summary: Effective decision-making in the real world depends on memory that is both stable and adaptive: environments change over time, and agents must retain relevant information over long horizons while also updating or overwriting outdated content when circumstances shift. Existing Reinforcement Learning (RL) benchmarks and memory-augmented agents focus primarily on retention, leaving the equally critical ability of memory rewriting largely unexplored. To address this gap, we introduce a benchmark that explicitly tests continual memory updating under partial observability, i.e. the natural setting where an agent must rely on memory rather than current observations, and use it to compare recurrent, transformer-based, and structured memory architectures. Our experiments reveal that classic recurrent models, despite their simplicity, demonstrate greater flexibility and robustness in memory rewriting tasks than modern structured memories, which succeed only under narrow conditions, and transformer-based agents, which often fail beyond trivial retention cases. These findings expose a fundamental limitation of current approaches and emphasize the necessity of memory mechanisms that balance stable retention with adaptive updating. Our work highlights this overlooked challenge, introduces benchmarks to evaluate it, and offers insights for designing future RL agents with explicit and trainable forgetting mechanisms. Code: https://quartz-admirer.github.io/Memory-Rewriting/
tldr: This paper introduces a new RL benchmark focusing on memory rewriting under partial observability and finds that simple recurrent models outperform modern structured memory architectures and transformer-based agents in this task, highlighting the need for better memory updating mechanisms in RL.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一个新的强化学习基准，专注于部分可观察性下的记忆改写。研究发现，简单的循环模型在该任务中优于现代结构化记忆架构和基于Transformer的智能体，强调了强化学习中需要更好的记忆更新机制。
summary_zh: 真实世界中的有效决策依赖于既稳定又具适应性的记忆：环境随时间变化，智能体必须在长时域内保留相关信息，同时在情况发生变化时更新或覆盖过时的内容。现有的强化学习（RL）基准和增强记忆的智能体主要侧重于记忆保持，而严重忽视了同样至关重要的记忆改写能力。为了弥补这一差距，我们引入了一个基准，该基准显式地测试了部分可观测条件下的持续记忆更新，即智能体必须依赖记忆而非当前观测的自然环境，并使用该基准来比较循环神经网络、基于Transformer的网络以及结构化记忆架构。我们的实验表明，尽管结构简单，但经典的循环模型在记忆改写任务中表现出比现代结构化记忆更强的灵活性和鲁棒性，后者仅在狭窄的条件下成功，而基于Transformer的智能体通常在简单的记忆保持之外便会失效。这些发现暴露了当前方法的根本局限性，并强调了平衡稳定保持和自适应更新的记忆机制的必要性。我们的工作突出了这个被忽视的挑战，引入了用于评估它的基准，并为设计未来具有显式和可训练遗忘机制的强化学习智能体提供了见解。代码：https://quartz-admirer.github.io/Memory-Rewriting/

title: SpatialMem: Unified 3D Memory with Metric Anchoring and Fast Retrieval
summary: We present SpatialMem, a memory-centric system that unifies 3D geometry, semantics, and language into a single, queryable representation. Starting from casually captured egocentric RGB video, SpatialMem reconstructs metrically scaled indoor environments, detects structural 3D anchors (walls, doors, windows) as the first-layer scaffold, and populates a hierarchical memory with open-vocabulary object nodes -- linking evidence patches, visual embeddings, and two-layer textual descriptions to 3D coordinates -- for compact storage and fast retrieval. This design enables interpretable reasoning over spatial relations (e.g., distance, direction, visibility) and supports downstream tasks such as language-guided navigation and object retrieval without specialized sensors. Experiments across three real-life indoor scenes demonstrate that SpatialMem maintains strong anchor-description-level navigation completion and hierarchical retrieval accuracy under increasing clutter and occlusion, offering an efficient and extensible framework for embodied spatial intelligence.
tldr: SpatialMem is a memory system that unifies 3D geometry, semantics, and language for indoor environments, enabling language-guided navigation and object retrieval from egocentric video without specialized sensors.
tldr_zh: SpatialMem是一个统一3D几何、语义和语言的室内环境记忆系统，能够从自我中心视频中实现语言引导的导航和目标检索，无需专用传感器。
summary_zh: 我们提出了 SpatialMem，一个以记忆为中心的系统，它将3D几何、语义和语言统一成一个单一的可查询的表示。 从随意捕捉的以自我为中心的 RGB 视频开始，SpatialMem 重建具有度量尺度的室内环境，检测结构性的 3D 锚点（墙壁、门、窗户）作为第一层支架，并用开放词汇的对象节点填充分层记忆——将证据块、视觉嵌入和两层文本描述链接到 3D 坐标——以实现紧凑存储和快速检索。 这种设计支持对空间关系（例如，距离、方向、可见性）的可解释推理，并支持诸如语言引导的导航和物体检索等下游任务，而无需专门的传感器。 在三个真实室内场景中的实验表明，SpatialMem 在日益增加的杂乱和遮挡下，保持了强大的锚点-描述级别导航完成度和分层检索准确性，为具身空间智能提供了一个高效且可扩展的框架。

title: CI4A: Semantic Component Interfaces for Agents Empowering Web Automation
summary: While Large Language Models demonstrate remarkable proficiency in high-level semantic planning, they remain limited in handling fine-grained, low-level web component manipulations. To address this limitation, extensive research has focused on enhancing model grounding capabilities through techniques such as Reinforcement Learning. However, rather than compelling agents to adapt to human-centric interfaces, we propose constructing interaction interfaces specifically optimized for agents. This paper introduces Component Interface for Agent (CI4A), a semantic encapsulation mechanism that abstracts the complex interaction logic of UI components into a set of unified tool primitives accessible to agents. We implemented CI4A within Ant Design, an industrial-grade front-end framework, covering 23 categories of commonly used UI components. Furthermore, we developed a hybrid agent featuring an action space that dynamically updates according to the page state, enabling flexible invocation of available CI4A tools. Leveraging the CI4A-integrated Ant Design, we refactored and upgraded the WebArena benchmark to evaluate existing SoTA methods. Experimental results demonstrate that the CI4A-based agent significantly outperforms existing approaches, achieving a new SoTA task success rate of 86.3%, alongside substantial improvements in execution efficiency.
tldr: This paper introduces CI4A, a semantic encapsulation mechanism that provides agents with unified tool primitives for interacting with web UI components, achieving state-of-the-art results on web automation tasks. The approach focuses on optimizing the *interface* for AI Agents rather than optimizing the Agents to work with human-centric interfaces.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了CI4A，一种语义封装机制，为智能体提供统一的工具原语来与Web UI组件进行交互，在Web自动化任务上实现了最先进的结果。 重点是优化AI Agent的*接口*，而非优化智能体以使用以人为中心的接口。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型在高层次语义规划方面表现出卓越的性能，但它们在处理细粒度、低层次的Web组件操作方面仍然受限。为了解决这一局限性，大量研究集中于通过诸如强化学习等技术来增强模型的 grounding 能力。然而，我们并非强迫智能体适应以人为中心的界面，而是提出构建专门为智能体优化的交互界面。本文介绍了一种用于智能体的组件接口 (CI4A)，这是一种语义封装机制，可将UI组件的复杂交互逻辑抽象成一组智能体可访问的统一工具原语。我们在工业级前端框架 Ant Design 中实现了 CI4A，涵盖了23种常用UI组件类别。此外，我们开发了一种混合智能体，其动作空间根据页面状态动态更新，从而能够灵活调用可用的CI4A工具。利用集成了CI4A的Ant Design，我们重构和升级了 WebArena 基准，以评估现有的 SoTA 方法。实验结果表明，基于CI4A的智能体显著优于现有方法，实现了 86.3% 的新 SoTA 任务成功率，同时在执行效率方面也取得了显著提升。

title: CoScale-RL: Efficient Post-Training by Co-Scaling Data and Computation
summary: Training Large Reasoning Model (LRM) is usually unstable and unpredictable, especially on hard problems or weak foundation models. We found that the current post-training scaling strategy can still improve on these cases. We propose CoScale-RL, a novel scaling strategy with better data and computational efficiency. We first scale up solutions to make problems solvable. The core idea is to collect multiple solutions for each problem, rather than simply enlarging the dataset. Then, we scale up rollout computation to stabilize Reinforcement Learning. We further leverage a model merge technique called Re-distillation to sustain or even improve computational efficiency when scaling up. Our method significantly improves data and computational efficiency, with an average 3.76$\times$ accuracy improvement on four benchmarks. CoScale-RL is able to improve an LRM's ability boundary without an extensive SFT dataset. Our method provides a new scaling direction to further improve LRM's reasoning ability.
tldr: The paper proposes CoScale-RL, a post-training scaling strategy for Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) that improves data and computational efficiency by scaling up solutions and rollout computation, achieving significant accuracy improvements on benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了CoScale-RL，一种大型推理模型（LRM）的后训练缩放策略，通过缩放解决方案和rollout计算，提高了数据和计算效率，并在基准测试中实现了显著的准确性提升。
summary_zh: 训练大型推理模型（LRM）通常不稳定且不可预测，尤其是在难题或弱基础模型上。我们发现，当前的后训练缩放策略在这些情况下仍然可以改进。我们提出了一种新的缩放策略CoScale-RL，具有更好的数据和计算效率。我们首先放大解决方案，使问题变得可解决。核心思想是为每个问题收集多个解决方案，而不是简单地扩大数据集。然后，我们放大 rollout 计算来稳定强化学习。我们进一步利用一种名为重蒸馏的模型合并技术，在放大时保持甚至提高计算效率。我们的方法显著提高了数据和计算效率，在四个基准测试中平均提高了3.76倍的准确率。CoScale-RL能够在没有大量监督微调（SFT）数据集的情况下提升LRM的能力边界。我们的方法为进一步提高LRM的推理能力提供了一个新的缩放方向。

title: SearchGym: Bootstrapping Real-World Search Agents via Cost-Effective and High-Fidelity Environment Simulation
summary: Search agents have emerged as a pivotal paradigm for solving open-ended, knowledge-intensive reasoning tasks. However, training these agents via Reinforcement Learning (RL) faces a critical dilemma: interacting with live commercial Web APIs is prohibitively expensive, while relying on static data snapshots often introduces noise due to data misalignment. This misalignment generates corrupted reward signals that destabilize training by penalizing correct reasoning or rewarding hallucination. To address this, we propose SearchGym, a simulation environment designed to bootstrap robust search agents. SearchGym employs a rigorous generative pipeline to construct a verifiable knowledge graph and an aligned document corpus, ensuring that every reasoning task is factually grounded and strictly solvable. Building on this controllable environment, we introduce SearchGym-RL, a curriculum learning methodology that progressively optimizes agent policies through purified feedback, evolving from basic interactions to complex, long-horizon planning. Extensive experiments across the Llama and Qwen families demonstrate strong Sim-to-Real generalization. Notably, our Qwen2.5-7B-Base model trained within SearchGym surpasses the web-enhanced ASearcher baseline across nine diverse benchmarks by an average relative margin of 10.6%. Our results validate that high-fidelity simulation serves as a scalable and highly cost-effective methodology for developing capable search agents.
tldr: The paper introduces SearchGym, a simulation environment and curriculum learning methodology (SearchGym-RL) for training search agents, which addresses the cost and noise issues of training with real web APIs. It shows strong sim-to-real generalization and surpasses baselines in various benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SearchGym，一个用于训练搜索代理的仿真环境和课程学习方法（SearchGym-RL），解决了使用真实Web API进行训练的成本和噪声问题。它展示了强大的Sim-to-Real泛化能力，并在各种基准测试中超越了基线。
summary_zh: 搜索代理已成为解决开放式、知识密集型推理任务的关键范式。然而，通过强化学习（RL）训练这些代理面临着一个严峻的两难困境：与实时商业Web API交互的成本高得令人望而却步，而依赖静态数据快照则经常因数据不对齐而引入噪声。这种不对齐会产生受损的奖励信号，通过惩罚正确的推理或奖励幻觉来破坏训练的稳定性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了SearchGym，一个旨在引导训练出鲁棒搜索代理的模拟环境。SearchGym采用严格的生成式流程来构建可验证的知识图谱和一个对齐的文档语料库，以确保每个推理任务都基于事实依据并且严格可解。在此可控环境的基础上，我们引入了SearchGym-RL，一种课程学习方法，它通过纯净的反馈逐步优化代理策略，从基本交互演进到复杂的、长时程规划。基于Llama和Qwen系列的广泛实验证明了强大的Sim-to-Real泛化能力。值得注意的是，我们用SearchGym训练的Qwen2.5-7B-Base模型在九个不同的基准测试中，平均相对幅度超出web增强的ASearcher基线 10.6%。我们的结果验证了高保真模拟作为一种可扩展且高性价比的方法，适用于开发强大的搜索代理。

title: On the Generalization Gap in LLM Planning: Tests and Verifier-Reward RL
summary: Recent work shows that fine-tuned Large Language Models (LLMs) can achieve high valid plan rates on PDDL planning tasks. However, it remains unclear whether this reflects transferable planning competence or domain-specific memorization. In this work, we fine-tune a 1.7B-parameter LLM on 40,000 domain-problem-plan tuples from 10 IPC 2023 domains, and evaluate both in-domain and cross-domain generalization. While the model reaches 82.9% valid plan rate in in-domain conditions, it achieves 0% on two unseen domains. To analyze this failure, we introduce three diagnostic interventions, namely (i) instance-wise symbol anonymization, (ii) compact plan serialization, and (iii) verifier-reward fine-tuning using the VAL validator as a success-focused reinforcement signal. Symbol anonymization and compact serialization cause significant performance drops despite preserving plan semantics, thus revealing strong sensitivity to surface representations. Verifier-reward fine-tuning reaches performance saturation in half the supervised training epochs, but does not improve cross-domain generalization. For the explored configurations, in-domain performance plateaus around 80%, while cross-domain performance collapses, suggesting that our fine-tuned model relies heavily on domain-specific patterns rather than transferable planning competence in this setting. Our results highlight a persistent generalization gap in LLM-based planning and provide diagnostic tools for studying its causes.
tldr: This paper investigates the generalization capabilities of fine-tuned LLMs in PDDL planning, revealing a significant gap between in-domain and cross-domain performance and highlighting the model's reliance on domain-specific patterns rather than transferable planning competence. They also introduce diagnostic tools to analyze this failure.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了微调的大型语言模型在PDDL规划中的泛化能力，揭示了域内和跨域性能之间的显著差距，并强调了模型对特定领域模式的依赖，而非可转移的规划能力。他们还引入了诊断工具来分析这一失败。
summary_zh: 最近的研究表明，微调的大型语言模型（LLMs）可以在PDDL规划任务上实现很高的有效规划率。然而，这是否反映了可迁移的规划能力或领域特定的记忆仍然不清楚。在这项工作中，我们使用来自10个IPC 2023领域的40,000个领域-问题-规划元组对一个17亿参数的LLM进行微调，并评估其领域内和跨领域的泛化能力。虽然该模型在领域内条件下达到了82.9%的有效规划率，但在两个未见领域上的表现为0%。为了分析这种失败，我们引入了三种诊断干预措施，即（i）实例级的符号匿名化，（ii）紧凑的规划序列化，以及（iii）使用VAL验证器作为以成功为中心的强化信号的验证器奖励微调。符号匿名化和紧凑序列化导致了显著的性能下降，尽管它们保留了规划语义，因此揭示了对表面表示的强烈敏感性。验证器奖励微调在监督训练周期的一半时间内达到了性能饱和，但并未改善跨领域泛化能力。对于所探索的配置，领域内性能稳定在80% 左右，而跨领域性能瓦解，这表明我们微调后的模型在这种情况下严重依赖于领域特定的模式，而不是可迁移的规划能力。我们的结果突出了基于LLM的规划中持续存在的泛化差距，并为研究其原因提供了诊断工具。

title: Diffusion Large Language Models for Black-Box Optimization
summary: Offline black-box optimization (BBO) aims to find optimal designs based solely on an offline dataset of designs and their labels. Such scenarios frequently arise in domains like DNA sequence design and robotics, where only a few labeled data points are available. Traditional methods typically rely on task-specific proxy or generative models, overlooking the in-context learning capabilities of pre-trained large language models (LLMs). Recent efforts have adapted autoregressive LLMs to BBO by framing task descriptions and offline datasets as natural language prompts, enabling direct design generation. However, these designs often contain bidirectional dependencies, which left-to-right models struggle to capture. In this paper, we explore diffusion LLMs for BBO, leveraging their bidirectional modeling and iterative refinement capabilities. This motivates our in-context denoising module: we condition the diffusion LLM on the task description and the offline dataset, both formatted in natural language, and prompt it to denoise masked designs into improved candidates. To guide the generation toward high-performing designs, we introduce masked diffusion tree search, which casts the denoising process as a step-wise Monte Carlo Tree Search that dynamically balances exploration and exploitation. Each node represents a partially masked design, each denoising step is an action, and candidates are evaluated via expected improvement under a Gaussian Process trained on the offline dataset. Our method, dLLM, achieves state-of-the-art results in few-shot settings on design-bench.
tldr: The paper introduces dLLM, a diffusion large language model for black-box optimization that leverages in-context learning and masked diffusion tree search to generate improved designs from offline datasets, achieving state-of-the-art results in few-shot learning.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种用于黑盒优化的扩散大语言模型 dLLM，它利用上下文学习和掩码扩散树搜索从离线数据集中生成改进的设计，并在少样本学习中取得了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 离线黑盒优化（BBO）旨在仅根据设计方案及其标签的离线数据集寻找最优设计方案。这种场景常见于DNA序列设计和机器人等领域，在这些领域中，只有少量带标签的数据点可用。传统方法通常依赖于特定于任务的代理模型或生成模型，而忽略了预训练大型语言模型（LLM）的上下文学习能力。最近的研究工作已将自回归 LLM 应用于 BBO，通过将任务描述和离线数据集框架化为自然语言提示，从而实现直接设计生成。然而，这些设计方案通常包含双向依赖关系，而从左到右的模型难以捕捉这些依赖关系。在本文中，我们探索了用于 BBO 的扩散 LLM，利用它们的双向建模和迭代改进能力。这促使我们提出上下文去噪模块：我们将扩散 LLM 以自然语言格式描述的任务描述和离线数据集为条件，并提示它将掩码设计方案去噪为改进的候选方案。为了引导生成过程朝着高性能设计方案发展，我们引入了掩码扩散树搜索，该方法将去噪过程转化为逐步蒙特卡洛树搜索，动态平衡探索和利用。每个节点代表一个部分掩码的设计方案，每个去噪步骤都是一个动作，候选方案通过在高斯过程下训练的离线数据集的期望改进进行评估。我们的方法 dLLM 在 design-bench 上的少样本设置中取得了最先进的结果。

title: VisTIRA: Closing the Image-Text Modality Gap in Visual Math Reasoning via Structured Tool Integration
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) lag behind text-only language models on mathematical reasoning when the same problems are presented as images rather than text. We empirically characterize this as a modality gap: the same question in text form yields markedly higher accuracy than its visually typeset counterpart, due to compounded failures in reading dense formulas, layout, and mixed symbolic-diagrammatic context. First, we introduce VisTIRA (Vision and Tool-Integrated Reasoning Agent), a tool-integrated reasoning framework that enables structured problem solving by iteratively decomposing a given math problem (as an image) into natural language rationales and executable Python steps to determine the final answer. Second, we build a framework to measure and improve visual math reasoning: a LaTeX-based pipeline that converts chain-of-thought math corpora (e.g., NuminaMath) into challenging image counterparts, and a large set of synthetic tool-use trajectories derived from a real-world, homework-style image dataset (called SnapAsk) for fine-tuning VLMs. Our experiments show that tool-integrated supervision improves image-based reasoning, and OCR grounding can further narrow the gap for smaller models, although its benefit diminishes at scale. These findings highlight that modality gap severity inversely correlates with model size, and that structured reasoning and OCR-based grounding are complementary strategies for advancing visual mathematical reasoning.
tldr: This paper introduces VisTIRA, a tool-integrated framework to improve visual math reasoning in VLMs by addressing the modality gap between text and image-based math problems using structured reasoning and OCR grounding. They create a pipeline to convert math corpora into challenging image counterparts and large sets of tool-use trajectories for fine-tuning VLMs.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍VisTIRA，一个工具集成框架，通过结构化推理和OCR将文本和图像数学问题之间的模态差距缩小，从而提高视觉语言模型在视觉数学推理方面的能力。作者构建了一个pipeline，将数学语料库转换为具有挑战性的图像对应物，并生成大量的工具使用轨迹，用于微调视觉语言模型。
summary_zh: 当相同的数学问题以图像而非文本的形式呈现时，视觉语言模型 (VLMs) 在数学推理方面落后于纯文本语言模型。我们通过实验将其定性为一种模态差距：以文本形式提出的相同问题比其视觉排版的对应问题产生明显更高的准确性，这是由于在阅读密集公式、布局以及混合符号-图解上下文中出现的复合错误导致的。首先，我们引入了 VisTIRA（视觉和工具集成推理代理），这是一种工具集成推理框架，它通过迭代地将给定的数学问题（作为图像）分解为自然语言的理由和可执行的 Python 步骤来确定最终答案，从而实现结构化的解决问题。其次，我们构建了一个框架来测量和改进视觉数学推理：一个基于 LaTeX 的流水线，用于将思维链数学语料库（例如，NuminaMath）转换为具有挑战性的图像对应物，以及一个来自真实世界、家庭作业风格的图像数据集（称为 SnapAsk）的大型合成工具使用轨迹集，用于微调 VLM。我们的实验表明，集成工具的监督可以提高基于图像的推理能力，并且 OCR 接地可以进一步缩小较小模型的差距，尽管其益处随着规模的扩大而减弱。这些发现表明，模态差距的严重程度与模型大小成反比，并且结构化推理和基于 OCR 的接地是推进视觉数学推理的互补策略。

title: Vision-Based Natural Language Scene Understanding for Autonomous Driving: An Extended Dataset and a New Model for Traffic Scene Description Generation
summary: Traffic scene understanding is essential for enabling autonomous vehicles to accurately perceive and interpret their environment, thereby ensuring safe navigation. This paper presents a novel framework that transforms a single frontal-view camera image into a concise natural language description, effectively capturing spatial layouts, semantic relationships, and driving-relevant cues. The proposed model leverages a hybrid attention mechanism to enhance spatial and semantic feature extraction and integrates these features to generate contextually rich and detailed scene descriptions. To address the limited availability of specialized datasets in this domain, a new dataset derived from the BDD100K dataset has been developed, with comprehensive guidelines provided for its construction. Furthermore, the study offers an in-depth discussion of relevant evaluation metrics, identifying the most appropriate measures for this task. Extensive quantitative evaluations using metrics such as CIDEr and SPICE, complemented by human judgment assessments, demonstrate that the proposed model achieves strong performance and effectively fulfills its intended objectives on the newly developed dataset.
tldr: This paper introduces a vision-based natural language scene understanding framework for autonomous driving, featuring a new model with hybrid attention and a dataset derived from BDD100K for generating traffic scene descriptions.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于视觉的自然语言场景理解框架，用于自动驾驶，提出了一种具有混合注意力的新模型，并从 BDD100K 数据集中衍生出一个新数据集，用于生成交通场景描述。
summary_zh: 交通场景理解对于使自动驾驶车辆能够准确感知和解读其环境至关重要，从而确保安全导航。本文提出了一种新颖的框架，可以将单个前视摄像头图像转换为简洁的自然语言描述，有效地捕捉空间布局、语义关系以及与驾驶相关的线索。所提出的模型利用混合注意力机制来增强空间和语义特征提取，并将这些特征整合以生成上下文丰富且详细的场景描述。为了解决该领域专业数据集可用性有限的问题，开发了一个基于BDD100K数据集的新数据集，并为数据集构建提供了全面的指南。此外，该研究还深入讨论了相关的评估指标，确定了最适合此任务的度量标准。 使用诸如CIDEr和SPICE等指标进行的广泛定量评估，以及人工判断评估的补充，表明所提出的模型实现了强大的性能，并有效地完成了其在新开发数据集上的预期目标。

title: InT: Self-Proposed Interventions Enable Credit Assignment in LLM Reasoning
summary: Outcome-reward reinforcement learning (RL) has proven effective at improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). However, standard RL assigns credit only at the level of the final answer, penalizing entire reasoning traces when the outcome is incorrect and uniformly reinforcing all steps when it is correct. As a result, correct intermediate steps may be discouraged in failed traces, while spurious steps may be reinforced in successful ones. We refer to this failure mode as the problem of credit assignment. While a natural remedy is to train a process reward model, accurately optimizing such models to identify corrective reasoning steps remains challenging. We introduce Intervention Training (InT), a training paradigm in which the model performs fine-grained credit assignment on its own reasoning traces by proposing short, targeted corrections that steer trajectories toward higher reward. Using reference solutions commonly available in mathematical reasoning datasets and exploiting the fact that verifying a model-generated solution is easier than generating a correct one from scratch, the model identifies the first error in its reasoning and proposes a single-step intervention to redirect the trajectory toward the correct solution. We then apply supervised fine-tuning (SFT) to the on-policy rollout up to the point of error concatenated with the intervention, localizing error to the specific step that caused failure. We show that the resulting model serves as a far better initialization for RL training. After running InT and subsequent fine-tuning with RL, we improve accuracy by nearly 14% over a 4B-parameter base model on IMO-AnswerBench, outperforming larger open-source models such as gpt-oss-20b.
tldr: The paper introduces Intervention Training (InT), a novel method for credit assignment in LLM reasoning by allowing the model to propose self-corrections, leading to improved RL performance, especially on mathematical reasoning tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为干预训练 (InT) 的新方法，通过允许模型提出自我修正来改进 LLM 推理中的信用分配，从而提高 RL 性能，特别是在数学推理任务上。
summary_zh: 结果奖励强化学习（RL）已被证明能有效提升大型语言模型（LLMs）的推理能力。然而，标准的RL仅在最终答案层面分配信用，当结果错误时惩罚整个推理过程，而结果正确时则一致性地强化所有步骤。因此，正确的中间步骤可能在失败的轨迹中受到抑制，而虚假的步骤可能在成功的轨迹中得到强化。我们将这种失效模式称为信用分配问题。一个自然的补救方法是训练一个过程奖励模型，但精确地优化此类模型以识别纠正性的推理步骤仍然具有挑战性。我们引入干预训练（InT），这是一种训练范式，模型通过提出短小、有针对性的修正来引导轨迹朝着更高的奖励前进，从而对其自身的推理轨迹进行细粒度的信用分配。利用数学推理数据集中常见的参考答案，并利用验证模型生成的解决方案比从头开始生成正确解决方案更容易这一事实，模型识别其推理中的第一个错误，并提出一个单步干预来将轨迹导向正确的解决方案。然后，我们应用监督微调（SFT）到策略内的回滚，直至错误点，并将其与干预相结合，从而将错误定位到导致失败的特定步骤。我们表明，由此产生的模型为RL训练提供了一个更好的初始化。在运行InT并随后使用RL进行微调后，我们在IMO-AnswerBench上将一个40亿参数的基础模型的准确率提高了近14%，超过了诸如gpt-oss-20b等更大的开源模型。

title: CLEANER: Self-Purified Trajectories Boost Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Agentic Reinforcement Learning (RL) has empowered Large Language Models (LLMs) to utilize tools like Python interpreters for complex problem-solving. However, for parameter-constrained models (e.g., 4B--7B), the exploration phase is often plagued by frequent execution failures, creating noisy trajectories that hinder policy optimization. Under standard outcome-based reward settings, this noise leads to a critical credit assignment issue, where erroneous actions are inadvertently reinforced alongside successful outcomes. Existing mitigations face a dilemma: dense rewards often trigger reward hacking, while supersampling incurs prohibitive computational costs. To address these challenges, we propose CLEANER. Distinct from external filtering methods, CLEANER exploits the model's intrinsic self-correction capabilities to eliminate error-contaminated context directly during data collection. At its core, the Similarity-Aware Adaptive Rollback (SAAR) mechanism autonomously constructs clean, purified trajectories by retrospectively replacing failures with successful self-corrections. Based on semantic similarity, SAAR adaptively regulates replacement granularity from shallow execution repairs to deep reasoning substitutions. By training on these self-purified paths, the model internalizes correct reasoning patterns rather than error-recovery loops. Empirical results on AIME24/25, GPQA, and LiveCodeBench show average accuracy gains of 6%, 3%, and 5% over baselines. Notably, CLEANER matches state-of-the-art performance using only one-third of the training steps, highlighting trajectory purification as a scalable solution for efficient agentic RL. Our models and code are available at GitHub
tldr: The paper introduces CLEANER, a method for agentic RL that uses self-purified trajectories to improve policy optimization by autonomously correcting errors during data collection, leading to increased accuracy and training efficiency, especially for parameter-constrained LLMs.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了CLEANER，一种用于Agentic RL的方法，通过使用自净化轨迹来改进策略优化，在数据收集过程中自动纠正错误，从而提高准确性和训练效率，尤其适用于参数受限的LLM。
summary_zh: 自主强化学习(RL)已赋能大型语言模型(LLM)利用Python解释器等工具解决复杂问题。然而，对于参数受限的模型（例如，4B--7B），探索阶段往往受到频繁执行失败的困扰，产生干扰策略优化的噪声轨迹。在标准的基于结果的奖励设置下，这种噪声会导致关键的信用分配问题，即错误的行动会与成功的结果一起被无意中加强。现有的缓解方案面临一个两难境地：密集奖励常常触发奖励黑客，而超采样则会产生过高的计算成本。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了CLEANER。与外部过滤方法不同，CLEANER利用模型内在的自我纠正能力，在数据收集过程中直接消除受错误污染的上下文。其核心是相似度感知自适应回滚(SAAR)机制，它通过回顾性地用成功的自我纠正替换失败，从而自主构建干净的、纯化的轨迹。基于语义相似性，SAAR自适应地调节替换粒度，从浅层的执行修复到深层的推理替代。通过在这些自我纯化的路径上训练，模型内化了正确的推理模式，而不是错误恢复循环。在AIME24/25、GPQA和LiveCodeBench上的经验结果表明，与基线相比，平均准确率分别提高了6%、3%和5%。值得注意的是，CLEANER仅使用三分之一的训练步骤就达到了最先进的性能，突出了轨迹纯化作为一种可扩展的解决方案，可用于高效的自主强化学习。我们的模型和代码可在GitHub上获得。

title: Non-Stationary Functional Bilevel Optimization
summary: Functional bilevel optimization (FBO) provides a powerful framework for hierarchical learning in function spaces, yet current methods are limited to static offline settings and perform suboptimally in online, non-stationary scenarios. We propose SmoothFBO, the first algorithm for non-stationary FBO with both theoretical guarantees and practical scalability. SmoothFBO introduces a time-smoothed stochastic hypergradient estimator that reduces variance through a window parameter, enabling stable outer-loop updates with sublinear regret. Importantly, the classical parametric bilevel case is a special reduction of our framework, making SmoothFBO a natural extension to online, non-stationary settings. Empirically, SmoothFBO consistently outperforms existing FBO methods in non-stationary hyperparameter optimization and model-based reinforcement learning, demonstrating its practical effectiveness. Together, these results establish SmoothFBO as a general, theoretically grounded, and practically viable foundation for bilevel optimization in online, non-stationary scenarios.
tldr: This paper introduces SmoothFBO, the first algorithm for non-stationary functional bilevel optimization with theoretical guarantees and practical scalability, demonstrating its effectiveness in online hyperparameter optimization and model-based reinforcement learning.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SmoothFBO，这是一种用于非平稳函数双层优化的首个算法，具有理论保证和实际可扩展性，并在在线超参数优化和基于模型的强化学习中展示了其有效性。
summary_zh: 函数双层优化 (FBO) 为函数空间中的层级学习提供了一个强大的框架，但当前的方法仅限于静态离线设置，并且在在线非平稳场景中表现欠佳。我们提出了 SmoothFBO，这是第一个用于非平稳FBO的算法，兼具理论保证和实际可扩展性。SmoothFBO 引入了一种时间平滑的随机超梯度估计器，通过窗口参数来降低方差，从而实现具有亚线性后悔值的稳定外循环更新。重要的是，经典的参数化双层情况是我们框架的一个特例简化，这使得 SmoothFBO 成为在线非平稳设置的自然扩展。在经验上，SmoothFBO 在非平稳超参数优化和基于模型的强化学习中始终优于现有的 FBO 方法，证明了其在实践中的有效性。总之，这些结果确立了 SmoothFBO 作为在线非平稳场景中双层优化的通用、具有理论基础且实际可行的基础。

title: Jet-RL: Enabling On-Policy FP8 Reinforcement Learning with Unified Training and Rollout Precision Flow
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is essential for enhancing the complex reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). However, existing RL training pipelines are computationally inefficient and resource-intensive, with the rollout phase accounting for over 70% of total training time. Quantized RL training, particularly using FP8 precision, offers a promising approach to mitigating this bottleneck. A commonly adopted strategy applies FP8 precision during rollout while retaining BF16 precision for training. In this work, we present the first comprehensive study of FP8 RL training and demonstrate that the widely used BF16-training + FP8-rollout strategy suffers from severe training instability and catastrophic accuracy collapse under long-horizon rollouts and challenging tasks. Our analysis shows that these failures stem from the off-policy nature of the approach, which introduces substantial numerical mismatch between training and inference. Motivated by these observations, we propose Jet-RL, an FP8 RL training framework that enables robust and stable RL optimization. The key idea is to adopt a unified FP8 precision flow for both training and rollout, thereby minimizing numerical discrepancies and eliminating the need for inefficient inter-step calibration. Extensive experiments validate the effectiveness of Jet-RL: our method achieves up to 33% speedup in the rollout phase, up to 41% speedup in the training phase, and a 16% end-to-end speedup over BF16 training, while maintaining stable convergence across all settings and incurring negligible accuracy degradation.
tldr: The paper introduces Jet-RL, an FP8 reinforcement learning framework using unified FP8 precision for both training and rollout, addressing instability issues with BF16-training + FP8-rollout strategies, achieving significant speedups with negligible accuracy degradation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Jet-RL，一个使用统一FP8精度进行训练和rollout的FP8强化学习框架，解决了BF16训练+FP8 rollout策略中的不稳定性问题，并在精度损失极小的情况下实现了显著的加速。
summary_zh: 强化学习（RL）对于增强大型语言模型（LLM）的复杂推理能力至关重要。然而，现有的RL训练流程计算效率低下且资源密集，其中rollout阶段占总训练时间的70%以上。量化RL训练，尤其是使用FP8精度，为缓解这一瓶颈提供了一种有前景的方法。一种常用的策略是在rollout期间应用FP8精度，同时为训练保留BF16精度。在这项工作中，我们首次对FP8 RL训练进行了全面的研究，并表明广泛使用的BF16训练+FP8 rollout策略在长时程rollout和具有挑战性的任务下，会遭受严重的训练不稳定性和灾难性的精度崩溃。我们的分析表明，这些失败源于该方法的离策略本质，这会在训练和推理之间引入大量的数值不匹配。受这些观察结果的启发，我们提出了Jet-RL，一种能够实现鲁棒和稳定的RL优化的FP8 RL训练框架。其核心思想是采用统一的FP8精度流程来进行训练和rollout，从而最大限度地减少数值差异，并消除对低效的步间校准的需求。广泛的实验验证了Jet-RL的有效性：我们的方法在rollout阶段实现了高达33%的加速，在训练阶段实现了高达41%的加速，与BF16训练相比，端到端加速了16%，同时在所有设置中保持了稳定的收敛性，并且只产生了可忽略不计的精度下降。

title: Attention-Based Offline Reinforcement Learning and Clustering for Interpretable Sepsis Treatment
summary: Sepsis remains one of the leading causes of mortality in intensive care units, where timely and accurate treatment decisions can significantly impact patient outcomes. In this work, we propose an interpretable decision support framework. Our system integrates four core components: (1) a clustering-based stratification module that categorizes patients into low, intermediate, and high-risk groups upon ICU admission, using clustering with statistical validation; (2) a synthetic data augmentation pipeline leveraging variational autoencoders (VAE) and diffusion models to enrich underrepresented trajectories such as fluid or vasopressor administration; (3) an offline reinforcement learning (RL) agent trained using Advantage Weighted Regression (AWR) with a lightweight attention encoder and supported by an ensemble models for conservative, safety-aware treatment recommendations; and (4) a rationale generation module powered by a multi-modal large language model (LLM), which produces natural-language justifications grounded in clinical context and retrieved expert knowledge. Evaluated on the MIMIC-III and eICU datasets, our approach achieves high treatment accuracy while providing clinicians with interpretable and robust policy recommendations.
tldr: This paper presents an interpretable offline reinforcement learning framework for sepsis treatment, combining clustering, synthetic data augmentation, attention-based RL, and rationale generation using LLMs, demonstrating high treatment accuracy on ICU datasets.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于败血症治疗的可解释离线强化学习框架，结合了聚类、合成数据增强、基于注意力的强化学习和使用LLM的理由生成，并在ICU数据集上展示了较高的治疗准确性。
summary_zh: 脓毒症仍然是重症监护病房死亡的主要原因之一，在此环境中及时准确的治疗决策可能显著影响患者的预后。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个可解释的决策支持框架。我们的系统集成了四个核心组件：（1）一个基于聚类的分层模块，该模块在 ICU 入院时使用具有统计验证的聚类将患者分为低、中、高风险组；（2）一个合成数据增强管道，利用变分自编码器 (VAE) 和扩散模型来丰富代表性不足的轨迹，例如液体或血管升压药的给药；（3）一个离线强化学习 (RL) 智能体，使用优势加权回归 (AWR) 训练，配备轻量级注意力编码器，并由集成模型支持，以实现保守、安全感知的治疗建议；（4）一个由多模态大型语言模型 (LLM) 驱动的理由生成模块，该模块生成以临床背景和检索到的专家知识为基础的自然语言理由。在 MIMIC-III 和 eICU 数据集上的评估表明，我们的方法在提供可解释和稳健的策略建议的同时，实现了高治疗准确率。

title: VJEPA: Variational Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures as Probabilistic World Models
summary: Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPA) offer a scalable paradigm for self-supervised learning by predicting latent representations rather than reconstructing high-entropy observations. However, existing formulations rely on \textit{deterministic} regression objectives, which mask probabilistic semantics and limit its applicability in stochastic control. In this work, we introduce \emph{Variational JEPA (VJEPA)}, a \textit{probabilistic} generalization that learns a predictive distribution over future latent states via a variational objective. We show that VJEPA unifies representation learning with Predictive State Representations (PSRs) and Bayesian filtering, establishing that sequential modeling does not require autoregressive observation likelihoods. Theoretically, we prove that VJEPA representations can serve as sufficient information states for optimal control without pixel reconstruction, while providing formal guarantees for collapse avoidance. We further propose \emph{Bayesian JEPA (BJEPA)}, an extension that factorizes the predictive belief into a learned dynamics expert and a modular prior expert, enabling zero-shot task transfer and constraint (e.g. goal, physics) satisfaction via a Product of Experts. Empirically, through a noisy environment experiment, we demonstrate that VJEPA and BJEPA successfully filter out high-variance nuisance distractors that cause representation collapse in generative baselines. By enabling principled uncertainty estimation (e.g. constructing credible intervals via sampling) while remaining likelihood-free regarding observations, VJEPA provides a foundational framework for scalable, robust, uncertainty-aware planning in high-dimensional, noisy environments.
tldr: The paper introduces Variational and Bayesian Joint Embedding Predictive Architectures (VJEPA/BJEPA), probabilistic generalizations of JEPA for learning latent state representations that enable robust, uncertainty-aware planning in high-dimensional, noisy environments, with theoretical guarantees and empirical validation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了变分和贝叶斯联合嵌入预测架构（VJEPA/BJEPA），是JEPA的概率泛化，用于学习潜在状态表示，从而在高维、噪声环境中实现稳健的、能感知不确定性的规划，并具有理论保证和实验验证。
summary_zh: 联合嵌入预测架构 (JEPA) 通过预测潜在表征而非重构高熵观测，为自监督学习提供了一个可扩展的范式。然而，现有的公式依赖于\textit{确定性}回归目标，这掩盖了概率语义并限制了其在随机控制中的适用性。在这项工作中，我们引入了\emph{变分 JEPA (VJEPA)}，一种\textit{概率}泛化，它通过变分目标学习未来潜在状态的预测分布。我们证明了 VJEPA 将表征学习与预测状态表征 (PSR) 和贝叶斯滤波统一起来，确立了序列建模不需要自回归观测似然。从理论上讲，我们证明了 VJEPA 表征可以作为最优控制的充分信息状态，而无需像素重构，同时为避免崩溃提供形式化保证。我们进一步提出了 \emph{贝叶斯 JEPA (BJEPA)}，一种扩展，它将预测信念分解为一个学习的动力学专家和一个模块化的先验专家，从而通过专家乘积实现零样本任务迁移和约束（例如目标、物理）满足。在经验上，通过一个噪声环境实验，我们证明了 VJEPA 和 BJEPA 成功地过滤掉了导致生成基线中表征崩溃的高方差干扰项。通过在保持与观测无关的无似然性的同时，实现有原则的不确定性估计（例如，通过采样构建可信区间），VJEPA 为高维、噪声环境中可扩展、鲁棒、不确定性感知的规划提供了一个基础框架。

title: CADGrasp: Learning Contact and Collision Aware General Dexterous Grasping in Cluttered Scenes
summary: Dexterous grasping in cluttered environments presents substantial challenges due to the high degrees of freedom of dexterous hands, occlusion, and potential collisions arising from diverse object geometries and complex layouts. To address these challenges, we propose CADGrasp, a two-stage algorithm for general dexterous grasping using single-view point cloud inputs. In the first stage, we predict sparse IBS, a scene-decoupled, contact- and collision-aware representation, as the optimization target. Sparse IBS compactly encodes the geometric and contact relationships between the dexterous hand and the scene, enabling stable and collision-free dexterous grasp pose optimization. To enhance the prediction of this high-dimensional representation, we introduce an occupancy-diffusion model with voxel-level conditional guidance and force closure score filtering. In the second stage, we develop several energy functions and ranking strategies for optimization based on sparse IBS to generate high-quality dexterous grasp poses. Extensive experiments in both simulated and real-world settings validate the effectiveness of our approach, demonstrating its capability to mitigate collisions while maintaining a high grasp success rate across diverse objects and complex scenes.
tldr: CADGrasp addresses dexterous grasping in cluttered environments using a two-stage algorithm that predicts a contact- and collision-aware representation (sparse IBS) optimized with an occupancy-diffusion model, achieving high grasp success rates in simulations and real-world scenarios.
tldr_zh: CADGrasp提出了一种两阶段算法，用于解决杂乱环境中灵巧抓取的问题。该算法预测了一种接触感知和碰撞感知的表示（稀疏IBS），并使用占用扩散模型进行优化，在模拟和真实场景中实现了较高的抓取成功率。
summary_zh: 在杂乱环境中进行灵巧抓取面临巨大挑战，这源于灵巧手的高自由度、遮挡以及因各种物体几何形状和复杂布局而产生的潜在碰撞。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种名为CADGrasp的两阶段算法，用于使用单视角点云输入进行通用灵巧抓取。在第一阶段，我们预测稀疏IBS，这是一种场景解耦的、具有接触和碰撞意识的表示，作为优化目标。稀疏IBS紧凑地编码了灵巧手和场景之间的几何和接触关系，从而实现稳定且无碰撞的灵巧抓取姿态优化。为了增强这种高维表示的预测，我们引入了一个带有体素级条件指导和力封闭评分过滤的占据扩散模型。在第二阶段，我们基于稀疏IBS，开发了几种能量函数和排序策略进行优化，以生成高质量的灵巧抓取姿态。在模拟和现实世界环境中的大量实验验证了我们方法的有效性，证明了其在减轻碰撞的同时，也能在各种物体和复杂场景中保持高抓取成功率的能力。

title: ExPrIS: Knowledge-Level Expectations as Priors for Object Interpretation from Sensor Data
summary: While deep learning has significantly advanced robotic object recognition, purely data-driven approaches often lack semantic consistency and fail to leverage valuable, pre-existing knowledge about the environment. This report presents the ExPrIS project, which addresses this challenge by investigating how knowledge-level expectations can serve as to improve object interpretation from sensor data. Our approach is based on the incremental construction of a 3D Semantic Scene Graph (3DSSG). We integrate expectations from two sources: contextual priors from past observations and semantic knowledge from external graphs like ConceptNet. These are embedded into a heterogeneous Graph Neural Network (GNN) to create an expectation-biased inference process. This method moves beyond static, frame-by-frame analysis to enhance the robustness and consistency of scene understanding over time. The report details this architecture, its evaluation, and outlines its planned integration on a mobile robotic platform.
tldr: The paper introduces ExPrIS, a system that uses knowledge-level expectations from past observations and semantic knowledge graphs to improve object interpretation in robotic scene understanding by using a heterogeneous GNN on a 3D Semantic Scene Graph.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ExPrIS，一个利用来自过去观察的知识水平预期和语义知识图谱的系统，通过在3D语义场景图上使用异构GNN来改进机器人场景理解中的对象解释。
summary_zh: 深度学习显著提升了机器人目标识别能力，但纯粹的数据驱动方法通常缺乏语义一致性，且未能利用环境中宝贵的先验知识。本报告介绍了ExPrIS项目，该项目通过研究知识层面的期望如何改进来自传感器数据的目标解释，来应对这一挑战。我们的方法基于3D语义场景图（3DSSG）的增量构建。我们整合来自两个来源的期望：来自过去观测的上下文先验和来自诸如ConceptNet等外部图的语义知识。这些期望被嵌入到一个异构图神经网络（GNN）中，以创建一个具有期望偏差的推理过程。该方法超越了静态的、逐帧分析，从而提高了场景理解的鲁棒性和随时间推移的一致性。本报告详细介绍了该架构、其评估，并概述了其在移动机器人平台上的计划集成。

title: Graph-Based Adaptive Planning for Coordinated Dual-Arm Robotic Disassembly of Electronic Devices (eGRAP)
summary: E-waste is growing rapidly while recycling rates remain low. We propose an electronic-device Graph-based Adaptive Planning (eGRAP) that integrates vision, dynamic planning, and dual-arm execution for autonomous disassembly. A camera-equipped arm identifies parts and estimates their poses, and a directed graph encodes which parts must be removed first. A scheduler uses topological ordering of this graph to select valid next steps and assign them to two robot arms, allowing independent tasks to run in parallel. One arm carries a screwdriver (with an eye-in-hand depth camera) and the other holds or handles components. We demonstrate eGRAP on 3.5in hard drives: as parts are unscrewed and removed, the system updates its graph and plan online. Experiments show consistent full disassembly of each HDD, with high success rates and efficient cycle times, illustrating the method's ability to adaptively coordinate dual-arm tasks in real time.
tldr: The paper introduces eGRAP, a graph-based adaptive planning system for coordinated dual-arm robotic disassembly of electronic devices, demonstrating successful disassembly of hard drives.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种基于图的自适应规划系统eGRAP，用于协调双臂机器人拆卸电子设备，并成功演示了硬盘的拆卸。
summary_zh: 电子垃圾正迅速增长，而回收率仍然很低。我们提出了一种基于电子设备图的自适应规划（eGRAP）方法，该方法集成了视觉、动态规划和双臂执行，用于自主拆卸。配备相机的机械臂识别零件并估计它们的姿态，而有向图则编码了哪些零件必须首先被移除。调度器使用该图的拓扑排序来选择有效的下一步操作，并将它们分配给两个机器人手臂，从而允许独立的任务并行运行。一个机械臂携带螺丝刀（带有手眼深度相机），另一个机械臂则夹持或处理组件。我们展示了eGRAP在3.5英寸硬盘上的应用：随着零件被拧下和移除，系统在线更新其图和计划。实验表明，每个硬盘都能一致地完全拆卸，具有高成功率和高效的周期时间，这说明了该方法实时自适应协调双臂任务的能力。

title: HumanDiffusion: A Vision-Based Diffusion Trajectory Planner with Human-Conditioned Goals for Search and Rescue UAV
summary: Reliable human--robot collaboration in emergency scenarios requires autonomous systems that can detect humans, infer navigation goals, and operate safely in dynamic environments. This paper presents HumanDiffusion, a lightweight image-conditioned diffusion planner that generates human-aware navigation trajectories directly from RGB imagery. The system combines YOLO-11--based human detection with diffusion-driven trajectory generation, enabling a quadrotor to approach a target person and deliver medical assistance without relying on prior maps or computationally intensive planning pipelines. Trajectories are predicted in pixel space, ensuring smooth motion and a consistent safety margin around humans. We evaluate HumanDiffusion in simulation and real-world indoor mock-disaster scenarios. On a 300-sample test set, the model achieves a mean squared error of 0.02 in pixel-space trajectory reconstruction. Real-world experiments demonstrate an overall mission success rate of 80% across accident-response and search-and-locate tasks with partial occlusions. These results indicate that human-conditioned diffusion planning offers a practical and robust solution for human-aware UAV navigation in time-critical assistance settings.
