tldr: This paper introduces HumanDiffusion, a vision-based diffusion trajectory planner for UAVs that generates human-aware navigation trajectories directly from RGB imagery in search and rescue scenarios, achieving promising results in both simulation and real-world experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了HumanDiffusion，一种基于视觉的扩散轨迹规划器，用于无人机在搜救场景中直接从RGB图像生成人类感知的导航轨迹，并在仿真和真实世界实验中取得了有希望的结果。
summary_zh: 在紧急情况下实现可靠的人机协作需要自主系统具备检测人类、推断导航目标以及在动态环境中安全运行的能力。本文提出HumanDiffusion，一种轻量级的图像条件扩散规划器，可以直接从RGB图像中生成人机感知的导航轨迹。该系统结合了基于YOLO-11的人类检测和扩散驱动的轨迹生成，使得四旋翼飞行器能够在不依赖于先验地图或计算密集型规划流程的情况下，接近目标人员并提供医疗援助。轨迹在像素空间中进行预测，确保平稳运动并保持围绕人类的一致安全距离。我们在模拟和真实的室内模拟灾难场景中对HumanDiffusion进行了评估。在一个包含300个样本的测试集上，该模型在像素空间轨迹重建中实现了0.02的均方误差。真实世界的实验表明，在存在部分遮挡的情况下，该模型在事故响应和搜索定位任务中的总体任务成功率为80%。这些结果表明，人类条件扩散规划为时间紧迫的援助场景中的人机感知无人机导航提供了一种实用且稳健的解决方案。

title: HumanoidVLM: Vision-Language-Guided Impedance Control for Contact-Rich Humanoid Manipulation
summary: Humanoid robots must adapt their contact behavior to diverse objects and tasks, yet most controllers rely on fixed, hand-tuned impedance gains and gripper settings. This paper introduces HumanoidVLM, a vision-language driven retrieval framework that enables the Unitree G1 humanoid to select task-appropriate Cartesian impedance parameters and gripper configurations directly from an egocentric RGB image. The system couples a vision-language model for semantic task inference with a FAISS-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) module that retrieves experimentally validated stiffness-damping pairs and object-specific grasp angles from two custom databases, and executes them through a task-space impedance controller for compliant manipulation. We evaluate HumanoidVLM on 14 visual scenarios and achieve a retrieval accuracy of 93%. Real-world experiments show stable interaction dynamics, with z-axis tracking errors typically within 1-3.5 cm and virtual forces consistent with task-dependent impedance settings. These results demonstrate the feasibility of linking semantic perception with retrieval-based control as an interpretable path toward adaptive humanoid manipulation.
tldr: The paper presents HumanoidVLM, a vision-language-driven system that retrieves appropriate impedance parameters and gripper configurations for a humanoid robot from a database based on visual input, enabling adaptive, contact-rich manipulation.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了HumanoidVLM，一个视觉-语言驱动的系统，它根据视觉输入从数据库中检索适合人形机器人的阻抗参数和夹爪配置，从而实现自适应的、富接触的操纵。
summary_zh: 人形机器人必须使其接触行为适应不同的目标和任务，然而大多数控制器依赖于固定的、手工调整的阻抗增益和夹爪设置。本文介绍了一种名为HumanoidVLM的、视觉语言驱动的检索框架，该框架使宇树G1人形机器人能够直接从以自我为中心的RGB图像中选择任务相关的笛卡尔阻抗参数和夹爪配置。该系统将用于语义任务推断的视觉语言模型与基于FAISS的检索增强生成（RAG）模块相结合，该模块从两个自定义数据库中检索经过实验验证的刚度-阻尼对和特定于物体的抓取角度，并通过任务空间阻抗控制器执行它们以实现柔顺操作。我们在14个视觉场景中评估了HumanoidVLM，并实现了93%的检索准确率。真实世界的实验表明了稳定的交互动力学，z轴跟踪误差通常在1-3.5厘米范围内，虚拟力与任务相关的阻抗设置一致。这些结果证明了将语义感知与基于检索的控制联系起来作为一种可解释的自适应人形机器人操作路径的可行性。

title: Stochastic Decision-Making Framework for Human-Robot Collaboration in Industrial Applications
summary: Collaborative robots, or cobots, are increasingly integrated into various industrial and service settings to work efficiently and safely alongside humans. However, for effective human-robot collaboration, robots must reason based on human factors such as motivation level and aggression level. This paper proposes an approach for decision-making in human-robot collaborative (HRC) environments utilizing stochastic modeling. By leveraging probabilistic models and control strategies, the proposed method aims to anticipate human actions and emotions, enabling cobots to adapt their behavior accordingly. So far, most of the research has been done to detect the intentions of human co-workers. This paper discusses the theoretical framework, implementation strategies, simulation results, and potential applications of the bilateral collaboration approach for safety and efficiency in collaborative robotics.
tldr: This paper introduces a stochastic decision-making framework for cobots that accounts for human factors like motivation and aggression levels to improve safety and efficiency in human-robot collaboration.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一个用于协作机器人的随机决策框架，该框架考虑了人类的动机和攻击性等因素，以提高人机协作的安全性和效率。
summary_zh: 协作机器人（Cobot）越来越多地被集成到各种工业和服务环境中，以便与人类高效、安全地协同工作。然而，为了实现有效的人机协作，机器人必须基于人类因素（例如动机水平和攻击性水平）进行推理。本文提出了一种在人机协作（HRC）环境中使用随机建模进行决策的方法。通过利用概率模型和控制策略，该方法旨在预测人类的动作和情感，使协作机器人能够相应地调整其行为。到目前为止，大多数研究都集中在检测人类合作者的意图上。本文讨论了双边协作方法的理论框架、实施策略、仿真结果以及在协作机器人中实现安全性和效率的潜在应用。

title: Explainable OOHRI: Communicating Robot Capabilities and Limitations as Augmented Reality Affordances
summary: Human interaction is essential for issuing personalized instructions and assisting robots when failure is likely. However, robots remain largely black boxes, offering users little insight into their evolving capabilities and limitations. To address this gap, we present explainable object-oriented HRI (X-OOHRI), an augmented reality (AR) interface that conveys robot action possibilities and constraints through visual signifiers, radial menus, color coding, and explanation tags. Our system encodes object properties and robot limits into object-oriented structures using a vision-language model, allowing explanation generation on the fly and direct manipulation of virtual twins spatially aligned within a simulated environment. We integrate the end-to-end pipeline with a physical robot and showcase diverse use cases ranging from low-level pick-and-place to high-level instructions. Finally, we evaluate X-OOHRI through a user study and find that participants effectively issue object-oriented commands, develop accurate mental models of robot limitations, and engage in mixed-initiative resolution.
tldr: This paper introduces X-OOHRI, an AR interface that visualizes robot capabilities and limitations to improve human-robot interaction through object-oriented commands and augmented reality feedback.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为X-OOHRI的增强现实界面，该界面通过可视化机器人能力和局限性，并通过面向对象的指令和增强现实反馈来改善人机交互。
summary_zh: 人为交互对于发出个性化指令和帮助机器人应对潜在故障至关重要。然而，机器人仍然很大程度上是黑盒，几乎不向用户提供关于其不断演变的能力和局限性的洞察。为了解决这一差距，我们提出了可解释的面向对象人机交互（X-OOHRI），一种增强现实（AR）界面，通过视觉指示符、径向菜单、颜色编码和解释标签来传达机器人的动作可能性和约束。我们的系统使用视觉-语言模型将对象属性和机器人限制编码到面向对象的结构中，从而允许动态生成解释并直接操纵空间对齐在模拟环境中的虚拟孪生体。我们将端到端流水线与物理机器人集成，并展示了从低级抓取放置到高级指令的各种用例。最后，我们通过用户研究评估X-OOHRI，发现参与者能够有效地发出面向对象指令，建立对机器人局限性的准确心理模型，并参与混合倡议的解决方案。

title: TacUMI: A Multi-Modal Universal Manipulation Interface for Contact-Rich Tasks
summary: Task decomposition is critical for understanding and learning complex long-horizon manipulation tasks. Especially for tasks involving rich physical interactions, relying solely on visual observations and robot proprioceptive information often fails to reveal the underlying event transitions. This raises the requirement for efficient collection of high-quality multi-modal data as well as robust segmentation method to decompose demonstrations into meaningful modules. Building on the idea of the handheld demonstration device Universal Manipulation Interface (UMI), we introduce TacUMI, a multi-modal data collection system that integrates additionally ViTac sensors, force-torque sensor, and pose tracker into a compact, robot-compatible gripper design, which enables synchronized acquisition of all these modalities during human demonstrations. We then propose a multi-modal segmentation framework that leverages temporal models to detect semantically meaningful event boundaries in sequential manipulations. Evaluation on a challenging cable mounting task shows more than 90 percent segmentation accuracy and highlights a remarkable improvement with more modalities, which validates that TacUMI establishes a practical foundation for both scalable collection and segmentation of multi-modal demonstrations in contact-rich tasks.
tldr: The paper introduces TacUMI, a multi-modal data collection system for contact-rich robotic tasks, along with a segmentation framework that leverages temporal models to decompose demonstrations. It shows significant improvement with multi-modal data in a cable mounting task.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于接触丰富型机器人任务的多模态数据收集系统TacUMI，以及一个利用时间模型分解演示的分割框架。 在电缆安装任务中，多模态数据显著提高了分割的准确率。
summary_zh: 任务分解对于理解和学习复杂的长时程操作任务至关重要。特别是对于涉及丰富物理交互的任务，仅依赖视觉观察和机器人本体感受信息往往无法揭示底层事件转换。 这就对高效收集高质量多模态数据以及稳健的分割方法提出了要求，以便将演示分解为有意义的模块。 基于手持演示设备通用操作界面（UMI）的思想，我们引入了TacUMI，一个多模态数据收集系统，它将ViTac传感器、力/力矩传感器和姿态追踪器集成到一个紧凑的、与机器人兼容的夹爪设计中，从而能够在人类演示期间同步采集所有这些模态的数据。 然后，我们提出了一个多模态分割框架，该框架利用时间模型来检测序列操作中语义上有意义的事件边界。 在一项具有挑战性的电缆安装任务上的评估显示，分割准确率超过 90%，并突出了包含更多模态时的显著改进，这验证了TacUMI为接触丰富任务中多模态演示的可扩展收集和分割奠定了实践基础。

title: UNCLE-Grasp: Uncertainty-Aware Grasping of Leaf-Occluded Strawberries
summary: Robotic strawberry harvesting is challenging under partial occlusion, where leaves induce significant geometric uncertainty and make grasp decisions based on a single deterministic shape estimate unreliable. From a single partial observation, multiple incompatible 3D completions may be plausible, causing grasps that appear feasible on one completion to fail on another. We propose an uncertainty-aware grasping pipeline for partially occluded strawberries that explicitly models completion uncertainty arising from both occlusion and learned shape reconstruction. Our approach uses point cloud completion with Monte Carlo dropout to sample multiple shape hypotheses, generates candidate grasps for each completion, and evaluates grasp feasibility using physically grounded force-closure-based metrics. Rather than selecting a grasp based on a single estimate, we aggregate feasibility across completions and apply a conservative lower confidence bound (LCB) criterion to decide whether a grasp should be attempted or safely abstained. We evaluate the proposed method in simulation and on a physical robot across increasing levels of synthetic and real leaf occlusion. Results show that uncertainty-aware decision making enables reliable abstention from high-risk grasp attempts under severe occlusion while maintaining robust grasp execution when geometric confidence is sufficient, outperforming deterministic baselines in both simulated and physical robot experiments.
tldr: The paper introduces an uncertainty-aware robotic grasping pipeline for strawberries occluded by leaves, using Monte Carlo dropout for shape completion and a lower confidence bound criterion for grasp selection, showing improved robustness compared to deterministic methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种针对叶片遮挡草莓的不确定性感知机器人抓取流程，该流程使用蒙特卡罗dropout进行形状补全，并使用置信下界准则进行抓取选择，与确定性方法相比，显示出更高的鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 机器人草莓采摘在部分遮挡情况下极具挑战性，树叶会引起显著的几何不确定性，使得基于单一确定性形状估计的抓取决策不可靠。从单一的部分观测来看，多种不兼容的3D补全可能是合理的，导致在一个补全上看似可行的抓取在另一个补全上失败。我们提出了一种针对部分遮挡草莓的、感知不确定性的抓取流程，该流程显式地建模了由遮挡和学习的形状重建引起的不确定性。我们的方法利用带有蒙特卡洛Dropout的点云补全来采样多个形状假设，为每个补全生成候选抓取，并使用基于物理约束的力闭合指标来评估抓取可行性。我们没有基于单一估计选择抓取，而是汇总了多个补全上的可行性，并应用保守的置信下界（LCB）标准来决定是应该尝试抓取还是安全地放弃。我们在模拟和物理机器人上，针对递增水平的合成和真实树叶遮挡评估了所提出的方法。结果表明，感知不确定性的决策能够在严重遮挡下可靠地放弃高风险的抓取尝试，并在几何置信度充足时保持稳健的抓取执行，在模拟和物理机器人实验中均优于确定性基线。

title: A Curriculum-Based Deep Reinforcement Learning Framework for the Electric Vehicle Routing Problem
summary: The electric vehicle routing problem with time windows (EVRPTW) is a complex optimization problem in sustainable logistics, where routing decisions must minimize total travel distance, fleet size, and battery usage while satisfying strict customer time constraints. Although deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has shown great potential as an alternative to classical heuristics and exact solvers, existing DRL models often struggle to maintain training stability-failing to converge or generalize when constraints are dense. In this study, we propose a curriculum-based deep reinforcement learning (CB-DRL) framework designed to resolve this instability. The framework utilizes a structured three-phase curriculum that gradually increases problem complexity: the agent first learns distance and fleet optimization (Phase A), then battery management (Phase B), and finally the full EVRPTW (Phase C). To ensure stable learning across phases, the framework employs a modified proximal policy optimization algorithm with phase-specific hyperparameters, value and advantage clipping, and adaptive learning-rate scheduling. The policy network is built upon a heterogeneous graph attention encoder enhanced by global-local attention and feature-wise linear modulation. This specialized architecture explicitly captures the distinct properties of depots, customers, and charging stations. Trained exclusively on small instances with N=10 customers, the model demonstrates robust generalization to unseen instances ranging from N=5 to N=100, significantly outperforming standard baselines on medium-scale problems. Experimental results confirm that this curriculum-guided approach achieves high feasibility rates and competitive solution quality on out-of-distribution instances where standard DRL baselines fail, effectively bridging the gap between neural speed and operational reliability.
tldr: This paper introduces a curriculum-based deep reinforcement learning framework (CB-DRL) for the electric vehicle routing problem (EVRPTW), enhancing training stability and generalization compared to standard DRL baselines, particularly on out-of-distribution instances.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于课程的深度强化学习框架（CB-DRL），用于解决电动汽车路径问题（EVRPTW）。与标准的DRL基线相比，该框架增强了训练的稳定性和泛化能力，尤其是在分布外的实例上。
summary_zh: 具有时间窗的电动汽车路径问题（EVRPTW）是可持续物流中的一个复杂优化问题，其路径决策必须在满足严格的客户时间约束的同时，最大限度地减少总行驶距离、车队规模和电池使用量。尽管深度强化学习 (DRL) 已显示出作为传统启发式算法和精确求解器的替代方案的巨大潜力，但现有的 DRL 模型通常难以保持训练稳定性——在约束条件密集时无法收敛或泛化。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于课程的深度强化学习 (CB-DRL) 框架，旨在解决这种不稳定性。该框架利用一个结构化的三阶段课程来逐步增加问题的复杂性：智能体首先学习距离和车队优化（A阶段），然后学习电池管理（B阶段），最后学习完整的 EVRPTW（C阶段）。为了确保跨阶段的稳定学习，该框架采用一种改进的近端策略优化算法，该算法具有特定于阶段的超参数、价值和优势剪裁以及自适应学习率调度。策略网络构建于异构图注意力编码器之上，并通过全局-局部注意力和特征级线性调制进行增强。这种特殊的架构明确地捕捉了站点、客户和充电站的不同属性。该模型仅在具有 N=10 个客户的小规模实例上进行训练，便展示了对从 N=5 到 N=100 的未见实例的稳健泛化能力，在中等规模问题上明显优于标准基线。实验结果证实，这种课程引导的方法在标准 DRL 基线失败的分布外实例上实现了高可行性率和具有竞争力的解决方案质量，有效地弥合了神经速度和运营可靠性之间的差距。

title: Q-Probe: Scaling Image Quality Assessment to High Resolution via Context-Aware Agentic Probing
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has empowered Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to achieve superior human preference alignment in Image Quality Assessment (IQA). However, existing RL-based IQA models typically rely on coarse-grained global views, failing to capture subtle local degradations in high-resolution scenarios. While emerging "Thinking with Images" paradigms enable multi-scale visual perception via zoom-in mechanisms, their direct adaptation to IQA induces spurious "cropping-implies-degradation" biases and misinterprets natural depth-of-field as artifacts. To address these challenges, we propose Q-Probe, the first agentic IQA framework designed to scale IQA to high resolution via context-aware probing. First, we construct Vista-Bench, a pioneering benchmark tailored for fine-grained local degradation analysis in high-resolution IQA settings. Furthermore, we propose a three-stage training paradigm that progressively aligns the model with human preferences, while simultaneously eliminating causal bias through a novel context-aware cropping strategy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Q-Probe achieves state-of-the-art performance in high-resolution settings while maintaining superior efficacy across resolution scales.
tldr: The paper introduces Q-Probe, a reinforcement learning-based IQA framework that addresses the challenges of high-resolution image quality assessment by using context-aware probing to avoid biases and improve accuracy. They also release Vista-Bench, a new benchmark tailored for this specific IQA task.
tldr_zh: 这篇论文介绍了Q-Probe，一个基于强化学习的IQA框架，通过使用上下文感知的探测来避免偏差并提高准确性，从而解决了高分辨率图像质量评估的挑战。他们还发布了一个新的基准测试Vista-Bench，专门针对这项特殊的IQA任务。
summary_zh: 强化学习（RL）已赋能多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）在图像质量评估（IQA）中实现更优的人类偏好对齐。然而，现有的基于RL的IQA模型通常依赖于粗粒度的全局视图，无法捕捉高分辨率场景中细微的局部退化。虽然新兴的“图像思考”范式通过放大机制实现了多尺度视觉感知，但将其直接应用于IQA会导致虚假的“裁剪暗示退化”偏差，并将自然景深误解为伪影。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了Q-Probe，这是第一个旨在通过上下文感知探测将IQA扩展到高分辨率的智能体IQA框架。首先，我们构建了Vista-Bench，这是一个为高分辨率IQA设置中细粒度的局部退化分析量身定制的开创性基准。此外，我们提出了一种三阶段训练范式，逐步将模型与人类偏好对齐，同时通过一种新颖的上下文感知裁剪策略消除因果偏差。大量的实验表明，Q-Probe在高分辨率设置中实现了最先进的性能，同时在各种分辨率尺度上保持了卓越的有效性。

title: Proximal Policy Optimization with Evolutionary Mutations
summary: Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) is a widely used reinforcement learning algorithm known for its stability and sample efficiency, but it often suffers from premature convergence due to limited exploration. In this paper, we propose POEM (Proximal Policy Optimization with Evolutionary Mutations), a novel modification to PPO that introduces an adaptive exploration mechanism inspired by evolutionary algorithms. POEM enhances policy diversity by monitoring the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence between the current policy and a moving average of previous policies. When policy changes become minimal, indicating stagnation, POEM triggers an adaptive mutation of policy parameters to promote exploration. We evaluate POEM on four OpenAI Gym environments: CarRacing, MountainCar, BipedalWalker, and LunarLander. Through extensive fine-tuning using Bayesian optimization techniques and statistical testing using Welch's t-test, we find that POEM significantly outperforms PPO on three of the four tasks (BipedalWalker: t=-2.0642, p=0.0495; CarRacing: t=-6.3987, p=0.0002; MountainCar: t=-6.2431, p<0.0001), while performance on LunarLander is not statistically significant (t=-1.8707, p=0.0778). Our results highlight the potential of integrating evolutionary principles into policy gradient methods to overcome exploration-exploitation tradeoffs.
tldr: The paper introduces POEM, a modification to PPO that uses evolutionary mutations to enhance exploration and overcome premature convergence, demonstrating improved performance on several OpenAI Gym environments.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了POEM， 一种PPO的改进方法， 通过使用进化突变来增强探索并克服过早收敛的问题， 并在几个OpenAI Gym环境中展示了性能的提升。
summary_zh: 近端策略优化（PPO）是一种广泛应用的强化学习算法，以其稳定性和样本效率而闻名，但通常由于探索不足而导致过早收敛。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的PPO改进算法POEM（基于进化突变的近端策略优化），它引入了一种受进化算法启发的自适应探索机制。POEM通过监测当前策略与先前策略移动平均之间的Kullback-Leibler（KL）散度来增强策略多样性。当策略变化变得极小，表明停滞时，POEM会触发策略参数的自适应突变以促进探索。我们评估了POEM在四个OpenAI Gym环境中的表现：CarRacing、MountainCar、BipedalWalker和LunarLander。通过使用贝叶斯优化技术进行广泛的精调，并使用Welch's t检验进行统计测试，我们发现POEM在四个任务中的三个任务上显著优于PPO（BipedalWalker：t=-2.0642，p=0.0495；CarRacing：t=-6.3987，p=0.0002；MountainCar：t=-6.2431，p<0.0001），而在LunarLander上的表现没有统计学意义（t=-1.8707，p=0.0778）。我们的结果突出了将进化原则整合到策略梯度方法中，以克服探索-利用权衡的潜力。

title: MAS-Orchestra: Understanding and Improving Multi-Agent Reasoning Through Holistic Orchestration and Controlled Benchmarks
summary: While multi-agent systems (MAS) promise elevated intelligence through coordination of agents, current approaches to automatic MAS design under-deliver. Such shortcomings stem from two key factors: (1) methodological complexity - agent orchestration is performed using sequential, code-level execution that limits global system-level holistic reasoning and scales poorly with agent complexity - and (2) efficacy uncertainty - MAS are deployed without understanding if there are tangible benefits compared to single-agent systems (SAS). We propose MAS-Orchestra, a training-time framework that formulates MAS orchestration as a function-calling reinforcement learning problem with holistic orchestration, generating an entire MAS at once. In MAS-Orchestra, complex, goal-oriented sub-agents are abstracted as callable functions, enabling global reasoning over system structure while hiding internal execution details. To rigorously study when and why MAS are beneficial, we introduce MASBENCH, a controlled benchmark that characterizes tasks along five axes: Depth, Horizon, Breadth, Parallel, and Robustness. Our analysis reveals that MAS gains depend critically on task structure, verification protocols, and the capabilities of both orchestrator and sub-agents, rather than holding universally. Guided by these insights, MAS-Orchestra achieves consistent improvements on public benchmarks including mathematical reasoning, multi-hop QA, and search-based QA. Together, MAS-Orchestra and MASBENCH enable better training and understanding of MAS in the pursuit of multi-agent intelligence.
tldr: The paper introduces MAS-Orchestra, a framework for training multi-agent systems using function-calling reinforcement learning, and MASBENCH, a benchmark for analyzing when MAS are beneficial, showing improvements on several benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MAS-Orchestra，一个使用函数调用强化学习训练多智能体系统的框架，以及MASBENCH，一个分析多智能体系统何时有益的基准测试，并在多个基准测试上取得了改进。
summary_zh: 多智能体系统(MAS)有望通过智能体间的协同提升智能水平，但目前自动MAS设计方法未能充分实现这一目标。这种不足源于两个关键因素：(1)方法论的复杂性——智能体编排采用连续的、代码级的执行方式，限制了全局系统级的整体推理，且难以随智能体复杂度的增加而扩展；(2)有效性不确定性——MAS的部署缺乏对其相比单智能体系统(SAS)是否具有切实益处的理解。我们提出了MAS-Orchestra，一个训练时框架，它将MAS编排形式化为一个具有整体编排的函数调用强化学习问题，从而一次性生成整个MAS。在MAS-Orchestra中，复杂且目标导向的子智能体被抽象为可调用函数，在隐藏内部执行细节的同时，实现了对系统结构的全局推理。为了严格研究MAS何时以及为何有益，我们引入了MASBENCH，一个受控基准测试，它沿着五个轴来描述任务：深度、视野、广度、并行性和鲁棒性。我们的分析表明，MAS的收益关键取决于任务结构、验证协议以及编排器和子智能体的能力，而非普遍适用。在这些见解的指导下，MAS-Orchestra在包括数学推理、多跳问答和基于搜索的问答等公共基准测试中取得了持续的改进。MAS-Orchestra和MASBENCH共同促进了MAS的更好训练和理解，以追求多智能体智能。

title: Forest-Chat: Adapting Vision-Language Agents for Interactive Forest Change Analysis
summary: The increasing availability of high-resolution satellite imagery, together with advances in deep learning, creates new opportunities for enhancing forest monitoring workflows. Two central challenges in this domain are pixel-level change detection and semantic change interpretation, particularly for complex forest dynamics. While large language models (LLMs) are increasingly adopted for data exploration, their integration with vision-language models (VLMs) for remote sensing image change interpretation (RSICI) remains underexplored, especially beyond urban environments. We introduce Forest-Chat, an LLM-driven agent designed for integrated forest change analysis. The proposed framework enables natural language querying and supports multiple RSICI tasks, including change detection, change captioning, object counting, deforestation percentage estimation, and change reasoning. Forest-Chat builds upon a multi-level change interpretation (MCI) vision-language backbone with LLM-based orchestration, and incorporates zero-shot change detection via a foundation change detection model together with an interactive point-prompt interface to support fine-grained user guidance. To facilitate adaptation and evaluation in forest environments, we introduce the Forest-Change dataset, comprising bi-temporal satellite imagery, pixel-level change masks, and multi-granularity semantic change captions generated through a combination of human annotation and rule-based methods. Experimental results demonstrate that Forest-Chat achieves strong performance on Forest-Change and on LEVIR-MCI-Trees, a tree-focused subset of LEVIR-MCI, for joint change detection and captioning, highlighting the potential of interactive, LLM-driven RSICI systems to improve accessibility, interpretability, and analytical efficiency in forest change analysis.
tldr: Forest-Chat is an LLM-driven agent for interactive forest change analysis using satellite imagery, with a new dataset (Forest-Change) for evaluation. The system demonstrates strong performance in change detection and captioning.
tldr_zh: Forest-Chat 是一种基于 LLM 的智能体，用于交互式森林变化分析，使用卫星图像，并提供了一个新的数据集 (Forest-Change) 用于评估。该系统在变化检测和描述方面表现出色。
summary_zh: 高分辨率卫星图像日益普及，以及深度学习的进步，为增强森林监测工作流程创造了新的机遇。该领域面临的两大核心挑战是像素级变化检测和语义变化解释，特别是对于复杂的森林动态。大型语言模型（LLMs）越来越多地被用于数据探索，但将它们与视觉-语言模型（VLMs）集成以进行遥感影像变化解释（RSICI）的研究仍然不足，尤其是在城市环境之外。我们引入了 Forest-Chat，一个由 LLM 驱动的智能体，专为集成森林变化分析而设计。该框架支持自然语言查询，并能处理多种 RSICI 任务，包括变化检测、变化描述、目标计数、森林砍伐百分比估计以及变化推理。Forest-Chat 构建于一个具有 LLM 编排的多层变化解释（MCI）视觉-语言骨干网络之上，并集成了基于基础变化检测模型的零样本变化检测，以及一个交互式点提示界面，以支持细粒度的用户指导。为了促进在森林环境中的适应和评估，我们引入了 Forest-Change 数据集，其中包含双时相卫星图像、像素级变化掩膜以及通过人工标注和基于规则的方法相结合生成的多粒度语义变化描述。实验结果表明，Forest-Chat 在 Forest-Change 和 LEVIR-MCI-Trees（LEVIR-MCI 中以树木为中心的子集）上实现了强大的联合变化检测和描述性能，突显了交互式、LLM 驱动的 RSICI 系统在提高森林变化分析的可访问性、可解释性和分析效率方面的潜力。

title: XD-MAP: Cross-Modal Domain Adaptation using Semantic Parametric Mapping
summary: Until open-world foundation models match the performance of specialized approaches, the effectiveness of deep learning models remains heavily dependent on dataset availability. Training data must align not only with the target object categories but also with the sensor characteristics and modalities. To bridge the gap between available datasets and deployment domains, domain adaptation strategies are widely used. In this work, we propose a novel approach to transferring sensor-specific knowledge from an image dataset to LiDAR, an entirely different sensing domain. Our method XD-MAP leverages detections from a neural network on camera images to create a semantic parametric map. The map elements are modeled to produce pseudo labels in the target domain without any manual annotation effort. Unlike previous domain transfer approaches, our method does not require direct overlap between sensors and enables extending the angular perception range from a front-view camera to a full 360 view. On our large-scale road feature dataset, XD-MAP outperforms single shot baseline approaches by +19.5 mIoU for 2D semantic segmentation, +19.5 PQth for 2D panoptic segmentation, and +32.3 mIoU in 3D semantic segmentation. The results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach achieving strong performance on LiDAR data without any manual labeling.
tldr: The paper introduces XD-MAP, a novel cross-modal domain adaptation method that transfers knowledge from camera images to LiDAR by generating pseudo labels for 3D semantic segmentation without manual annotation, achieving significant performance gains.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了XD-MAP，一种新颖的跨模态领域自适应方法，通过为3D语义分割生成伪标签，将知识从相机图像迁移到LiDAR，无需手动标注，并实现了显著的性能提升。
summary_zh: 在开放世界基础模型性能达到专业方法水平之前，深度学习模型的有效性仍然严重依赖于数据集的可用性。训练数据不仅必须与目标对象类别对齐，还必须与传感器特性和模态一致。为了弥合可用数据集和部署领域之间的差距，领域自适应策略被广泛应用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，可以将传感器特定知识从图像数据集迁移到 LiDAR，这是一个完全不同的传感领域。我们的方法 XD-MAP 利用来自相机图像神经网络的检测结果来创建一个语义参数地图。地图元素被建模为在目标域中生成伪标签，而无需任何手动标注。与之前的领域迁移方法不同，我们的方法不需要传感器之间的直接重叠，并且能够将视角范围从前视相机扩展到完整的 360 度视角。在我们的大规模道路特征数据集上，XD-MAP 在 2D 语义分割方面比单次基线方法高 +19.5 mIoU，在 2D 全景分割方面高 +19.5 PQth，在 3D 语义分割方面高 +32.3 mIoU。结果表明，我们的方法在没有任何手动标注的情况下，在 LiDAR 数据上实现了强大的性能，证明了其有效性。

title: KAGE-Bench: Fast Known-Axis Visual Generalization Evaluation for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Pixel-based reinforcement learning agents often fail under purely visual distribution shift even when latent dynamics and rewards are unchanged, but existing benchmarks entangle multiple sources of shift and hinder systematic analysis. We introduce KAGE-Env, a JAX-native 2D platformer that factorizes the observation process into independently controllable visual axes while keeping the underlying control problem fixed. By construction, varying a visual axis affects performance only through the induced state-conditional action distribution of a pixel policy, providing a clean abstraction for visual generalization. Building on this environment, we define KAGE-Bench, a benchmark of six known-axis suites comprising 34 train-evaluation configuration pairs that isolate individual visual shifts. Using a standard PPO-CNN baseline, we observe strong axis-dependent failures, with background and photometric shifts often collapsing success, while agent-appearance shifts are comparatively benign. Several shifts preserve forward motion while breaking task completion, showing that return alone can obscure generalization failures. Finally, the fully vectorized JAX implementation enables up to 33M environment steps per second on a single GPU, enabling fast and reproducible sweeps over visual factors. Code: https://avanturist322.github.io/KAGEBench/.
tldr: This paper introduces KAGE-Env and KAGE-Bench, a JAX-native platform for evaluating visual generalization in reinforcement learning by isolating visual shift factors, enabling fast experimentation and analysis of agent failures.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了KAGE-Env和KAGE-Bench，一个JAX原生的平台，用于评估强化学习中的视觉泛化能力，它通过隔离视觉偏移因素，实现了快速的实验和对智能体失败情况的分析。
summary_zh: 基于像素的强化学习智能体常常在纯视觉分布偏移下失效，即使潜在动力学和奖励保持不变，但现有的基准测试将多种偏移源混杂在一起，阻碍了系统分析。我们引入KAGE-Env，一个JAX原生的2D横版游戏平台，它将观测过程分解为独立可控的视觉轴，同时保持底层控制问题不变。通过构造，改变一个视觉轴仅通过像素策略诱导的状态条件动作分布来影响性能，为视觉泛化提供了一个清晰的抽象。基于这个环境，我们定义了KAGE-Bench，一个由六个已知轴套件组成的基准测试，包含34个训练-评估配置对，这些配置对隔离了单独的视觉偏移。使用标准的PPO-CNN基线，我们观察到强烈的轴依赖失效，其中背景和光度偏移经常导致成功率骤降，而智能体外观偏移相对良性。一些偏移保留了向前运动，但破坏了任务完成，表明仅依靠回报可能会掩盖泛化失效。最后，完全向量化的JAX实现能够在单个GPU上实现高达每秒3300万个环境步数，从而能够对视觉因素进行快速且可复现的扫描。代码：https://avanturist322.github.io/KAGEBench/。

title: MASCOT: Towards Multi-Agent Socio-Collaborative Companion Systems
summary: Multi-agent systems (MAS) have recently emerged as promising socio-collaborative companions for emotional and cognitive support. However, these systems frequently suffer from persona collapse--where agents revert to generic, homogenized assistant behaviors--and social sycophancy, which produces redundant, non-constructive dialogue. We propose MASCOT, a generalizable framework for multi-perspective socio-collaborative companions. MASCOT introduces a novel bi-level optimization strategy to harmonize individual and collective behaviors: 1) Persona-Aware Behavioral Alignment, an RLAIF-driven pipeline that finetunes individual agents for strict persona fidelity to prevent identity loss; and 2) Collaborative Dialogue Optimization, a meta-policy guided by group-level rewards to ensure diverse and productive discourse. Extensive evaluations across psychological support and workplace domains demonstrate that MASCOT significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving improvements of up to +14.1 in Persona Consistency and +10.6 in Social Contribution. Our framework provides a practical roadmap for engineering the next generation of socially intelligent multi-agent systems.
tldr: The paper introduces MASCOT, a framework for multi-agent systems that addresses persona collapse and social sycophancy through a bi-level optimization strategy, demonstrating improved persona consistency and social contribution.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了MASCOT，一个用于多智能体系统的框架，通过双层优化策略解决了个性崩溃和社会谄媚问题，并展示了在个性一致性和社会贡献方面的改进。
summary_zh: 多智能体系统 (MAS) 近来已成为提供情感和认知支持的有前景的社会协同伙伴。然而，这些系统经常面临人格崩塌——智能体退化为通用、同质化的助手行为——以及社会奉承，导致冗余、非建设性的对话。我们提出MASCOT，一个用于多视角社会协同伙伴的通用框架。 MASCOT 引入了一种新颖的双层优化策略，以协调个体和集体行为：1) 人格感知行为对齐，这是一个 RLAIF 驱动的流程，用于微调个体智能体，使其严格遵守人格特性，以防止身份丢失；以及 2) 协同对话优化，一种由群体层面奖励引导的元策略，以确保多样化和富有成效的讨论。 在心理支持和工作场所领域的广泛评估表明，MASCOT 显著优于最先进的基线方法，在人格一致性方面实现了高达 +14.1 的改进，在社会贡献方面实现了 +10.6 的改进。 我们的框架为工程化下一代具有社会智能的多智能体系统提供了一个切实可行的路线图。

title: Reconstruction-Anchored Diffusion Model for Text-to-Motion Generation
summary: Diffusion models have seen widespread adoption for text-driven human motion generation and related tasks due to their impressive generative capabilities and flexibility. However, current motion diffusion models face two major limitations: a representational gap caused by pre-trained text encoders that lack motion-specific information, and error propagation during the iterative denoising process. This paper introduces Reconstruction-Anchored Diffusion Model (RAM) to address these challenges. First, RAM leverages a motion latent space as intermediate supervision for text-to-motion generation. To this end, RAM co-trains a motion reconstruction branch with two key objective functions: self-regularization to enhance the discrimination of the motion space and motion-centric latent alignment to enable accurate mapping from text to the motion latent space. Second, we propose Reconstructive Error Guidance (REG), a testing-stage guidance mechanism that exploits the diffusion model's inherent self-correction ability to mitigate error propagation. At each denoising step, REG uses the motion reconstruction branch to reconstruct the previous estimate, reproducing the prior error patterns. By amplifying the residual between the current prediction and the reconstructed estimate, REG highlights the improvements in the current prediction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RAM achieves significant improvements and state-of-the-art performance. Our code will be released.
tldr: This paper introduces Reconstruction-Anchored Diffusion Model (RAM) with Reconstructive Error Guidance (REG) to improve text-to-motion generation by addressing the representational gap and error propagation limitations of current motion diffusion models. Experimental results demonstrate state-of-the-art performance.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了重建锚定扩散模型（RAM），并结合重建误差引导（REG），通过解决现有运动扩散模型的表征差距和误差传播限制，来改进文本到运动的生成。实验结果表明该方法达到了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 扩散模型因其令人印象深刻的生成能力和灵活性，在文本驱动的人体运动生成和相关任务中得到了广泛应用。然而，当前的运动扩散模型面临两大局限：由于预训练的文本编码器缺乏运动特定信息而导致的表征差距，以及迭代去噪过程中的误差传播。本文提出了一种重构锚定的扩散模型（RAM）来应对这些挑战。首先，RAM利用运动隐空间作为文本到运动生成的中间监督。为此，RAM共同训练一个运动重构分支，包含两个关键目标函数：用于增强运动空间判别性的自正则化，以及用于实现从文本到运动隐空间精确映射的运动中心隐空间对齐。其次，我们提出了一种重构误差引导（REG），这是一种测试阶段的引导机制，利用扩散模型固有的自我纠正能力来减轻误差传播。在每个去噪步骤中，REG使用运动重构分支来重建先前的估计，从而重现先前的误差模式。通过放大当前预测与重构估计之间的残差，REG突出了当前预测的改进。大量实验表明，RAM取得了显著提升，并实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码将会发布。

title: SimD3: A Synthetic drone Dataset with Payload and Bird Distractor Modeling for Robust Detection
summary: Reliable drone detection is challenging due to limited annotated real-world data, large appearance variability, and the presence of visually similar distractors such as birds. To address these challenges, this paper introduces SimD3, a large-scale high-fidelity synthetic dataset designed for robust drone detection in complex aerial environments. Unlike existing synthetic drone datasets, SimD3 explicitly models drones with heterogeneous payloads, incorporates multiple bird species as realistic distractors, and leverages diverse Unreal Engine 5 environments with controlled weather, lighting, and flight trajectories captured using a 360 six-camera rig. Using SimD3, we conduct an extensive experimental evaluation within the YOLOv5 detection framework, including an attention-enhanced variant termed Yolov5m+C3b, where standard bottleneck-based C3 blocks are replaced with C3b modules. Models are evaluated on synthetic data, combined synthetic and real data, and multiple unseen real-world benchmarks to assess robustness and generalization. Experimental results show that SimD3 provides effective supervision for small-object drone detection and that Yolov5m+C3b consistently outperforms the baseline across in-domain and cross-dataset evaluations. These findings highlight the utility of SimD3 for training and benchmarking robust drone detection models under diverse and challenging conditions.
tldr: The paper introduces SimD3, a large-scale synthetic dataset for robust drone detection, featuring heterogeneous payloads, bird distractors, and diverse environments, and demonstrates its effectiveness in training YOLOv5-based models for both synthetic and real-world drone detection tasks.
tldr_zh: 这篇论文介绍了SimD3，它是一个大规模的合成数据集，用于稳健的无人机检测，具有异构有效载荷、鸟类干扰物和多样化的环境。研究表明，该数据集能有效地训练基于YOLOv5的模型，从而实现合成和真实世界的无人机检测任务。
summary_zh: 可靠的无人机检测极具挑战，原因在于带标注的真实世界数据有限、外观变化巨大，以及存在视觉上相似的干扰因素，例如鸟类。为了应对这些挑战，本文介绍 SimD3，这是一个大规模、高保真的合成数据集，专为在复杂空中环境中实现鲁棒的无人机检测而设计。与现有的合成无人机数据集不同，SimD3 显式地对具有异构载荷的无人机进行建模，纳入多种鸟类作为真实的干扰因素，并利用了具有受控天气、光照和飞行轨迹的多样化虚幻引擎 5 环境，这些轨迹通过一个 360 度六相机阵列捕获。 利用 SimD3，我们在 YOLOv5 检测框架内进行了广泛的实验评估，包括一个注意力增强变体，称为 Yolov5m+C3b，其中标准的基于瓶颈的 C3 模块被 C3b 模块所取代。 模型在合成数据、合成数据和真实数据的组合以及多个未见过的真实世界基准数据集上进行评估，以评估其鲁棒性和泛化能力。 实验结果表明，SimD3 为小目标无人机检测提供了有效的监督，并且 Yolov5m+C3b 在域内和跨数据集评估中的表现始终优于基线模型。 这些发现突显了 SimD3 在训练和评估各种具有挑战性条件下鲁棒无人机检测模型的效用。

title: LaVR: Scene Latent Conditioned Generative Video Trajectory Re-Rendering using Large 4D Reconstruction Models
summary:
Given a monocular video, the goal of video re-rendering is to generate views of the scene from a novel camera trajectory. Existing methods face two distinct challenges. Geometrically unconditioned models lack spatial awareness, leading to drift and deformation under viewpoint changes. On the other hand, geometrically-conditioned models depend on estimated depth and explicit reconstruction, making them susceptible to depth inaccuracies and calibration errors.
  We propose to address these challenges by using the implicit geometric knowledge embedded in the latent space of a large 4D reconstruction model to condition the video generation process. These latents capture scene structure in a continuous space without explicit reconstruction. Therefore, they provide a flexible representation that allows the pretrained diffusion prior to regularize errors more effectively. By jointly conditioning on these latents and source camera poses, we demonstrate that our model achieves state-of-the-art results on the video re-rendering task. Project webpage is https://lavr-4d-scene-rerender.github.io/
tldr: The paper introduces LaVR, a novel video re-rendering method leveraging the latent space of a large 4D reconstruction model to overcome limitations of existing geometrically unconditioned and conditioned approaches, achieving state-of-the-art results.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了 LaVR，一种新颖的视频重渲染方法，利用大型 4D 重建模型的潜在空间来克服现有无几何条件和有几何条件方法的局限性，实现了最先进的结果。
summary_zh:
给定单目视频，视频重渲染的目标是从新的相机轨迹生成场景的视图。现有方法面临两个不同的挑战。几何无条件模型缺乏空间感知能力，导致视点变化时产生漂移和变形。另一方面，几何条件模型依赖于估计的深度和显式重建，使其容易受到深度不准确和校准误差的影响。

我们提出利用大型 4D 重建模型的潜在空间中嵌入的隐式几何知识来调节视频生成过程，以应对这些挑战。这些潜在变量在没有显式重建的情况下捕获连续空间中的场景结构。因此，它们提供了一种灵活的表示，允许预训练的扩散先验更有效地规范化误差。通过联合调节这些潜在变量和源相机位姿，我们证明了我们的模型在视频重渲染任务上实现了最先进的结果。项目网页为 https://lavr-4d-scene-rerender.github.io/

title: Gaussian Based Adaptive Multi-Modal 3D Semantic Occupancy Prediction
summary: The sparse object detection paradigm shift towards dense 3D semantic occupancy prediction is necessary for dealing with long-tail safety challenges for autonomous vehicles. Nonetheless, the current voxelization methods commonly suffer from excessive computation complexity demands, where the fusion process is brittle, static, and breaks down under dynamic environmental settings. To this end, this research work enhances a novel Gaussian-based adaptive camera-LiDAR multimodal 3D occupancy prediction model that seamlessly bridges the semantic strengths of camera modality with the geometric strengths of LiDAR modality through a memory-efficient 3D Gaussian model. The proposed solution has four key components: (1) LiDAR Depth Feature Aggregation (LDFA), where depth-wise deformable sampling is employed for dealing with geometric sparsity, (2) Entropy-Based Feature Smoothing, where cross-entropy is employed for handling domain-specific noise, (3) Adaptive Camera-LiDAR Fusion, where dynamic recalibration of sensor outputs is performed based on model outputs, and (4) Gauss-Mamba Head that uses Selective State Space Models for global context decoding that enjoys linear computation complexity.
tldr: The paper introduces a novel Gaussian-based adaptive camera-LiDAR fusion model for 3D semantic occupancy prediction in autonomous vehicles, addressing computational complexity and robustness issues in dynamic environments by using techniques like depth-wise deformable sampling, entropy-based feature smoothing, and a Gauss-Mamba head.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新的基于高斯的自适应相机-激光雷达融合模型，用于自动驾驶汽车中的3D语义占用预测。该模型通过深度方向可变形采样、基于熵的特征平滑和Gauss-Mamba头等技术，解决了在动态环境中计算复杂度和鲁棒性问题。
summary_zh: 稀疏目标检测范式向密集3D语义占据预测的转变，对于应对自动驾驶车辆中的长尾安全挑战至关重要。然而，当前的体素化方法通常面临过高的计算复杂度需求，且融合过程脆弱、静态，并在动态环境设置下失效。为此，本研究改进了一种新颖的基于高斯的自适应相机-激光雷达多模态3D占据预测模型，该模型通过内存高效的3D高斯模型，无缝衔接相机模态的语义优势与激光雷达模态的几何优势。所提出的解决方案具有四个关键组成部分：（1）激光雷达深度特征聚合（LDFA），其中采用深度方向可变形采样处理几何稀疏性；（2）基于熵的特征平滑，其中采用交叉熵处理特定领域的噪声；（3）自适应相机-激光雷达融合，其中基于模型输出执行传感器输出的动态重新校准；（4）高斯-Mamba头，它使用选择性状态空间模型进行全局上下文解码，并具有线性计算复杂度。

title: Copy-Trasform-Paste: Zero-Shot Object-Object Alignment Guided by Vision-Language and Geometric Constraints
summary: We study zero-shot 3D alignment of two given meshes, using a text prompt describing their spatial relation -- an essential capability for content creation and scene assembly. Earlier approaches primarily rely on geometric alignment procedures, while recent work leverages pretrained 2D diffusion models to model language-conditioned object-object spatial relationships. In contrast, we directly optimize the relative pose at test time, updating translation, rotation, and isotropic scale with CLIP-driven gradients via a differentiable renderer, without training a new model. Our framework augments language supervision with geometry-aware objectives: a variant of soft-Iterative Closest Point (ICP) term to encourage surface attachment and a penetration loss to discourage interpenetration. A phased schedule strengthens contact constraints over time, and camera control concentrates the optimization on the interaction region. To enable evaluation, we curate a benchmark containing diverse categories and relations, and compare against baselines. Our method outperforms all alternatives, yielding semantically faithful and physically plausible alignments.
tldr: The paper introduces a zero-shot method for 3D object alignment using vision-language models and geometric constraints, outperforming existing methods in generating semantically faithful and physically plausible alignments.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种使用视觉-语言模型和几何约束的零样本3D对象对齐方法，在生成语义上忠实且物理上合理的对齐结果方面优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 我们研究了两个给定网格的零样本三维对齐，使用描述它们空间关系的文本提示——这是内容创作和场景组装的一项关键能力。早期的方法主要依赖于几何对齐程序，而最近的工作则利用预训练的二维扩散模型来建模语言条件下的对象-对象空间关系。与此不同，我们在测试时直接优化相对位姿，通过可微渲染器，利用CLIP驱动的梯度更新平移、旋转和各向同性缩放，而无需训练新模型。我们的框架利用几何感知目标增强了语言监督：一种软迭代最近点（ICP）项的变体，以鼓励表面附着，以及一种穿透损失，以避免相互穿透。分阶段的时间表会随着时间的推移加强接触约束，而相机控制则将优化集中在交互区域。为了进行评估，我们整理了一个包含各种类别和关系的基准测试，并与基线进行比较。我们的方法优于所有替代方案，产生了语义上忠实且物理上合理的对齐结果。

title: Plug-and-Play Benchmarking of Reinforcement Learning Algorithms for Large-Scale Flow Control
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) has shown promising results in active flow control (AFC), yet progress in the field remains difficult to assess as existing studies rely on heterogeneous observation and actuation schemes, numerical setups, and evaluation protocols. Current AFC benchmarks attempt to address these issues but heavily rely on external computational fluid dynamics (CFD) solvers, are not fully differentiable, and provide limited 3D and multi-agent support. To overcome these limitations, we introduce FluidGym, the first standalone, fully differentiable benchmark suite for RL in AFC. Built entirely in PyTorch on top of the GPU-accelerated PICT solver, FluidGym runs in a single Python stack, requires no external CFD software, and provides standardized evaluation protocols. We present baseline results with PPO and SAC and release all environments, datasets, and trained models as public resources. FluidGym enables systematic comparison of control methods, establishes a scalable foundation for future research in learning-based flow control, and is available at https://github.com/safe-autonomous-systems/fluidgym.
tldr: The paper introduces FluidGym, a novel, fully differentiable PyTorch-based benchmark suite for reinforcement learning in active flow control, aiming to standardize evaluation and facilitate research in this area.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了FluidGym，一个基于PyTorch的新型全可微基准测试套件，用于主动流动控制中的强化学习，旨在标准化评估并促进该领域的研究。
summary_zh: 强化学习（RL）在主动流动控制（AFC）中展现出了令人鼓舞的结果，但由于现有研究依赖于异构的观测和驱动方案、数值设置以及评估协议，使得该领域的进展难以评估。当前的AFC基准测试试图解决这些问题，但严重依赖外部计算流体动力学（CFD）求解器，并非完全可微，并且对3D和多智能体支持有限。为了克服这些限制，我们推出了FluidGym，它是第一个用于AFC中RL的独立、完全可微的基准测试套件。FluidGym完全基于PyTorch构建，利用GPU加速的PICT求解器，在单个Python堆栈中运行，无需外部CFD软件，并提供标准化的评估协议。我们展示了使用PPO和SAC的基准结果，并将所有环境、数据集和训练好的模型作为公共资源发布。FluidGym能够系统地比较控制方法，为未来基于学习的流动控制研究建立了一个可扩展的基础，并可在https://github.com/safe-autonomous-systems/fluidgym获取。

title: Improving Regret Approximation for Unsupervised Dynamic Environment Generation
summary: Unsupervised Environment Design (UED) seeks to automatically generate training curricula for reinforcement learning (RL) agents, with the goal of improving generalisation and zero-shot performance. However, designing effective curricula remains a difficult problem, particularly in settings where small subsets of environment parameterisations result in significant increases in the complexity of the required policy. Current methods struggle with a difficult credit assignment problem and rely on regret approximations that fail to identify challenging levels, both of which are compounded as the size of the environment grows. We propose Dynamic Environment Generation for UED (DEGen) to enable a denser level generator reward signal, reducing the difficulty of credit assignment and allowing for UED to scale to larger environment sizes. We also introduce a new regret approximation, Maximised Negative Advantage (MNA), as a significantly improved metric to optimise for, that better identifies more challenging levels. We show empirically that MNA outperforms current regret approximations and when combined with DEGen, consistently outperforms existing methods, especially as the size of the environment grows. We have made all our code available here: https://github.com/HarryMJMead/Dynamic-Environment-Generation-for-UED.
tldr: The paper introduces Dynamic Environment Generation (DEGen) and Maximised Negative Advantage (MNA) for Unsupervised Environment Design (UED) in RL, improving curriculum generation and scaling to larger environments by addressing regret approximation and credit assignment problems.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了强化学习中用于无监督环境设计（UED）的动态环境生成（DEGen）和最大化负优势（MNA），通过解决遗憾近似和信用分配问题，改进了课程生成并扩展到更大的环境。
summary_zh: 非监督环境设计（UED）旨在使用强化学习（RL）智能体自动生成训练课程，以提高泛化能力和零样本性能。然而，设计有效的课程仍然是一个难题，特别是在环境参数化的较小子集会导致所需策略复杂性显著增加的情况下。当前的方法面临着信用分配难题，并且依赖于无法识别具有挑战性水平的后悔值近似，这些问题会随着环境规模的增大而加剧。我们提出了用于UED的动态环境生成（DEGen），以实现更密集的水平生成器奖励信号，降低信用分配的难度，并允许UED扩展到更大的环境规模。我们还引入了一种新的后悔值近似，最大化的负优势（MNA），作为一个显著改进的优化指标，可以更好地识别更具挑战性的水平。经验表明，MNA的性能优于当前的后悔值近似，并且当与DEGen结合使用时，它始终优于现有方法，尤其是在环境规模增大时。我们在此处提供了所有代码：https://github.com/HarryMJMead/Dynamic-Environment-Generation-for-UED.

title: Statistical Reinforcement Learning in the Real World: A Survey of Challenges and Future Directions
summary:
Reinforcement learning (RL) has achieved remarkable success in real-world decision-making across diverse domains, including gaming, robotics, online advertising, public health, and natural language processing. Despite these advances, a substantial gap remains between RL research and its deployment in many practical settings. Two recurring challenges often underlie this gap. First, many settings offer limited opportunity for the agent to interact extensively with the target environment due to practical constraints. Second, many target environments often undergo substantial changes, requiring redesign and redeployment of RL systems (e.g., advancements in science and technology that change the landscape of healthcare delivery). Addressing these challenges and bridging the gap between basic research and application requires theory and methodology that directly inform the design, implementation, and continual improvement of RL systems in real-world settings.
  In this paper, we frame the application of RL in practice as a three-component process: (i) online learning and optimization during deployment, (ii) post- or between-deployment offline analyses, and (iii) repeated cycles of deployment and redeployment to continually improve the RL system. We provide a narrative review of recent advances in statistical RL that address these components, including methods for maximizing data utility for between-deployment inference, enhancing sample efficiency for online learning within-deployment, and designing sequences of deployments for continual improvement. We also outline future research directions in statistical RL that are use-inspired -- aiming for impactful application of RL in practice.
tldr: This survey paper reviews statistical reinforcement learning methods addressing challenges in real-world RL deployment, focusing on online learning, offline analysis, and continual improvement through repeated deployment cycles, and outlines future research directions.
tldr_zh: 这篇综述论文回顾了统计强化学习方法，旨在解决现实世界强化学习部署中的挑战，重点关注在线学习、离线分析以及通过重复部署周期实现的持续改进，并概述了未来的研究方向。
summary_zh:
强化学习 (RL) 在包括游戏、机器人、在线广告、公共卫生和自然语言处理等多个领域中，已经在现实世界的决策制定中取得了显著成功。尽管取得了这些进展，但 RL 研究与其在许多实际环境中的部署之间仍然存在相当大的差距。这种差距通常源于两个反复出现的挑战。首先，由于实际的限制，许多环境为智能体提供与目标环境进行广泛交互的机会有限。其次，许多目标环境往往会经历实质性的变化，需要对 RL 系统进行重新设计和重新部署（例如，科学技术的进步改变了医疗保健服务的面貌）。要应对这些挑战并弥合基础研究和应用之间的差距，需要理论和方法能够直接指导 RL 系统在现实世界环境中的设计、实施和持续改进。

在本文中，我们将 RL 在实践中的应用框定为一个由三个部分组成的过程： (i) 部署期间的在线学习和优化，(ii) 部署后或部署间的离线分析，以及 (iii) 用于持续改进 RL 系统的部署和重新部署的重复周期。我们对统计 RL 的最新进展进行了综述，这些进展针对了这些部分，包括最大化部署间推断的数据效用、增强部署内在的在线学习的样本效率以及设计用于持续改进的部署序列的方法。我们还概述了统计 RL 中受实际应用启发的未来研究方向，旨在实现 RL 在实践中的有影响力的应用。

title: Spatiotemporal Wildfire Prediction and Reinforcement Learning for Helitack Suppression
summary: Wildfires are growing in frequency and intensity, devastating ecosystems and communities while causing billions of dollars in suppression costs and economic damage annually in the U.S. Traditional wildfire management is mostly reactive, addressing fires only after they are detected. We introduce \textit{FireCastRL}, a proactive artificial intelligence (AI) framework that combines wildfire forecasting with intelligent suppression strategies. Our framework first uses a deep spatiotemporal model to predict wildfire ignition. For high-risk predictions, we deploy a pre-trained reinforcement learning (RL) agent to execute real-time suppression tactics with helitack units inside a physics-informed 3D simulation. The framework generates a threat assessment report to help emergency responders optimize resource allocation and planning. In addition, we are publicly releasing a large-scale, spatiotemporal dataset containing $\mathbf{9.5}$ million samples of environmental variables for wildfire prediction. Our work demonstrates how deep learning and RL can be combined to support both forecasting and tactical wildfire response. More details can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/firecastrl.
tldr: This paper presents FireCastRL, an AI framework combining deep spatiotemporal wildfire prediction with reinforcement learning for helitack suppression, supported by a large-scale dataset.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了FireCastRL，一个结合深度时空野火预测和强化学习直升机攻击抑制的AI框架，并提供了一个大规模数据集。
summary_zh:
摘要：
野火的频率和强度日益增长，破坏生态系统和社区，同时每年给美国造成数十亿美元的扑灭成本和经济损失。传统的野火管理主要以被动为主，仅在发现火灾后才采取行动。我们推出 \textit{FireCastRL}，这是一个主动的人工智能（AI）框架，将野火预测与智能扑灭策略相结合。我们的框架首先使用深度时空模型来预测野火的发生。对于高风险预测，我们部署一个预训练的强化学习（RL）智能体，在受物理信息约束的3D模拟环境中，利用直升机速降部队执行实时扑灭战术。该框架生成威胁评估报告，以帮助应急响应人员优化资源分配和规划。此外，我们公开发布一个大规模的时空数据集，其中包含 $\mathbf{9.5}$  百万个环境变量的样本，用于野火预测。我们的工作展示了如何将深度学习和强化学习相结合，以支持野火的预测和战术响应。更多详情请访问 https://sites.google.com/view/firecastrl。

title: Risk Estimation for Automated Driving
summary: Safety is a central requirement for automated vehicles. As such, the assessment of risk in automated driving is key in supporting both motion planning technologies and safety evaluation. In automated driving, risk is characterized by two aspects. The first aspect is the uncertainty on the state estimates of other road participants by an automated vehicle. The second aspect is the severity of a collision event with said traffic participants. Here, the uncertainty aspect typically causes the risk to be non-zero for near-collision events. This makes risk particularly useful for automated vehicle motion planning. Namely, constraining or minimizing risk naturally navigates the automated vehicle around traffic participants while keeping a safety distance based on the level of uncertainty and the potential severity of the impending collision. Existing approaches to calculate the risk either resort to empirical modeling or severe approximations, and, hence, lack generalizability and accuracy. In this paper, we combine recent advances in collision probability estimation with the concept of collision severity to develop a general method for accurate risk estimation. The proposed method allows us to assign individual severity functions for different collision constellations, such as, e.g., frontal or side collisions. Furthermore, we show that the proposed approach is computationally efficient, which is beneficial, e.g., in real-time motion planning applications. The programming code for an exemplary implementation of Gaussian uncertainties is also provided.
tldr: This paper presents a novel, computationally efficient method for accurate risk estimation in automated driving by combining collision probability and severity, with considerations for different collision types and uncertainty.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的、计算高效的方法，用于准确估计自动驾驶中的风险，该方法结合了碰撞概率和严重性，并考虑了不同类型的碰撞和不确定性。
summary_zh: 安全性是自动驾驶车辆的核心要求。因此，自动驾驶中风险评估对于支持运动规划技术和安全评估至关重要。在自动驾驶中，风险由两个方面表征。第一方面是自动驾驶车辆对其他道路参与者状态估计的不确定性。第二方面是与上述交通参与者发生碰撞事件的严重程度。其中，不确定性通常会导致近碰撞事件的风险非零。这使得风险对于自动驾驶车辆的运动规划尤为有用。具体而言，约束或最小化风险可以在保持基于不确定性水平和即将发生的碰撞潜在严重性的安全距离的同时，自然地引导自动驾驶车辆绕开交通参与者。现有的风险计算方法要么诉诸经验建模，要么进行严重近似，因此缺乏通用性和准确性。在本文中，我们将碰撞概率估计的最新进展与碰撞严重程度的概念相结合，开发了一种通用的准确风险估计方法。所提出的方法允许我们为不同的碰撞情况分配单独的严重性函数，例如正面碰撞或侧面碰撞。此外，我们表明所提出的方法在计算上是高效的，这在实时运动规划应用中尤其有利。我们还提供了高斯不确定性示例实现的编程代码。

title: On-the-fly hand-eye calibration for the da Vinci surgical robot
summary: In Robot-Assisted Minimally Invasive Surgery (RMIS), accurate tool localization is crucial to ensure patient safety and successful task execution. However, this remains challenging for cable-driven robots, such as the da Vinci robot, because erroneous encoder readings lead to pose estimation errors. In this study, we propose a calibration framework to produce accurate tool localization results through computing the hand-eye transformation matrix on-the-fly. The framework consists of two interrelated algorithms: the feature association block and the hand-eye calibration block, which provide robust correspondences for key points detected on monocular images without pre-training, and offer the versatility to accommodate various surgical scenarios by adopting an array of filter approaches, respectively. To validate its efficacy, we test the framework extensively on publicly available video datasets that feature multiple surgical instruments conducting tasks in both in vitro and ex vivo scenarios, under varying illumination conditions and with different levels of key point measurement accuracy. The results show a significant reduction in tool localization errors under the proposed calibration framework, with accuracies comparable to other state-of-the-art methods while being more time-efficient.
tldr: The paper proposes an on-the-fly hand-eye calibration framework for the da Vinci surgical robot to improve tool localization accuracy using visual keypoint correspondences without pre-training, demonstrating comparable or better accuracy and improved efficiency on surgical datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于达芬奇手术机器人的即时手眼标定框架，通过使用视觉关键点对应关系（无需预训练）来提高工具定位精度，并在手术数据集上展示了可比甚至更好的精度和更高的效率。
summary_zh: 在机器人辅助微创手术（RMIS）中，精准的工具定位对于确保患者安全和成功执行任务至关重要。然而，对于缆索驱动机器人（如达芬奇机器人）而言，这仍然充满挑战，因为错误的编码器读数会导致位姿估计误差。在本研究中，我们提出了一种校准框架，通过动态计算手眼变换矩阵来产生精确的工具定位结果。该框架由两个相互关联的算法组成：特征关联模块和手眼校准模块，前者为在单目图像上检测到的关键点提供无需预训练的鲁棒对应关系，后者通过采用一系列滤波方法，提供适应各种手术场景的通用性。为了验证其有效性，我们在公开的视频数据集上对该框架进行了广泛测试，这些数据集涵盖了多个手术器械在体外和离体场景下执行任务的情况，并具有不同的光照条件和不同程度的关键点测量精度。结果表明，在所提出的校准框架下，工具定位误差显著降低，精度与其他最先进的方法相当，同时更具时间效率。

title: Moving Beyond Compliance in Soft-Robotic Catheters Through Modularity for Precision Therapies
summary: Soft robotic instruments could navigate delicate, tortuous anatomy more safely than rigid tools, but clinical adoption is limited by insufficient tip functionalization and real-time feedback at the tissue interface. Few sensing and therapeutic modules are compact, robust, and adaptable enough to measure, and respond to, subtle physiological cues during intraluminal procedures. We present a 1.47 mm diameter modular soft robotic catheter that integrates sensing, actuation, and therapy while retaining the compliance needed for safe endoluminal navigation. Validated across multiple in vivo settings, we emphasize its utility in endoscopic retrograde cholangiopancreatography (ERCP), a highly technical procedure and a key access route to the pancreas, an organ that is fragile, difficult to instrument, and central to diseases such as pancreatic cancer. Our architecture supports up to four independently controlled functional units, allowing customizable combinations of anchoring, manipulation, sensing, and targeted drug delivery. In a live porcine model, we demonstrate semi-autonomous deployment into the pancreatic duct and 7.5 cm of endoscopic navigation within it, a region currently inaccessible with standard catheters. A closed-loop autonomous/shared-control system that combines a learned model, magnetic actuation, onboard shape sensing, and visual marker tracking further improves cannulation accuracy. Together, these results establish a scalable platform for multifunctional soft robotic catheters and a new paradigm for complex endoluminal interventions, with potential to reduce radiation exposure, shorten training, and accelerate clinical translation of soft robotic technologies.
tldr: This paper presents a modular soft robotic catheter with integrated sensing, actuation, and therapy capabilities, demonstrating its potential for precise navigation and intervention in complex endoluminal procedures such as ERCP, showcasing improved cannulation accuracy through a closed-loop control system.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种模块化的软体机器人导管，集成了传感、驱动和治疗功能，展示了其在复杂腔内手术（如ERCP）中进行精确导航和干预的潜力，并通过闭环控制系统展示了改进的插管精度。
summary_zh: 软体机器人器械比刚性工具能更安全地通过脆弱、弯曲的解剖结构，但临床应用受到尖端功能化不足以及组织界面的实时反馈的限制。很少有传感和治疗模块足够紧凑、坚固且适应性强，能够测量并响应管腔内手术中的细微生理信号。我们提出了一种直径为1.47毫米的模块化软体机器人导管，该导管集成了传感、驱动和治疗功能，同时保持了安全内腔导航所需的顺应性。经过多个体内环境验证，我们强调了其在内窥镜逆行胆胰管造影术（ERCP）中的效用，这是一种高度专业的手术，也是通往胰腺的关键途径，胰腺是一个脆弱的、难以进行器械操作的器官，并且是胰腺癌等疾病的核心。我们的架构最多支持四个独立控制的功能单元，允许定制锚定、操纵、传感和靶向药物递送的组合。在一个活体猪模型中，我们展示了半自主部署到胰管中并在其中进行7.5厘米的内窥镜导航，这是一个目前标准导管无法到达的区域。一个结合了学习模型、磁驱动、板载形状传感和视觉标记跟踪的闭环自主/共享控制系统进一步提高了插管精度。总之，这些结果建立了一个用于多功能软体机器人导管的可扩展平台，以及一种用于复杂管腔内干预的新范例，有可能减少辐射暴露、缩短培训时间并加速软体机器人技术的临床转化。

title: Vehicle Routing with Finite Time Horizon using Deep Reinforcement Learning with Improved Network Embedding
summary: In this paper, we study the vehicle routing problem with a finite time horizon. In this routing problem, the objective is to maximize the number of customer requests served within a finite time horizon. We present a novel routing network embedding module which creates local node embedding vectors and a context-aware global graph representation. The proposed Markov decision process for the vehicle routing problem incorporates the node features, the network adjacency matrix and the edge features as components of the state space. We incorporate the remaining finite time horizon into the network embedding module to provide a proper routing context to the embedding module. We integrate our embedding module with a policy gradient-based deep Reinforcement Learning framework to solve the vehicle routing problem with finite time horizon. We trained and validated our proposed routing method on real-world routing networks, as well as synthetically generated Euclidean networks. Our experimental results show that our method achieves a higher customer service rate than the existing routing methods. Additionally, the solution time of our method is significantly lower than that of the existing methods.
tldr: The paper proposes a deep reinforcement learning approach with a novel network embedding module for the vehicle routing problem with a finite time horizon, achieving higher customer service rates and faster solution times compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的方法，采用了一种新的网络嵌入模块，用于解决有限时间范围内的车辆路径问题，与现有方法相比，实现了更高的客户服务率和更快的解决时间。
summary_zh: 本文研究了具有有限时间范围的车辆路径问题。 在该路径问题中，目标是在有限的时间范围内最大化服务的客户请求数量。 我们提出了一种新颖的路径网络嵌入模块，用于创建局部节点嵌入向量和上下文感知的全局图表示。 针对车辆路径问题，我们提出的马尔可夫决策过程将节点特征、网络邻接矩阵和边特征作为状态空间的分量。 我们将剩余的有限时间范围整合到网络嵌入模块中，以便为嵌入模块提供适当的路径选择上下文。 我们将嵌入模块与基于策略梯度的深度强化学习框架相结合，以解决具有有限时间范围的车辆路径问题。 我们在真实世界的路径网络以及合成生成的欧几里德网络上训练和验证了我们提出的路径选择方法。 实验结果表明，我们的方法比现有的路径选择方法实现了更高的客户服务率。 此外，我们方法的求解时间明显低于现有方法。

title: Visual and Cognitive Demands of a Large Language Model-Powered In-vehicle Conversational Agent
summary: Driver distraction remains a leading contributor to motor vehicle crashes, necessitating rigorous evaluation of new in-vehicle technologies. This study assessed the visual and cognitive demands associated with an advanced Large Language Model (LLM) conversational agent (Gemini Live) during on-road driving, comparing it against handsfree phone calls, visual turn-by-turn guidance (low load baseline), and the Operation Span (OSPAN) task (high load anchor). Thirty-two licensed drivers completed five secondary tasks while visual and cognitive demands were measured using the Detection Response Task (DRT) for cognitive load, eye-tracking for visual attention, and subjective workload ratings. Results indicated that Gemini Live interactions (both single-turn and multi-turn) and hands-free phone calls shared similar levels of cognitive load, between that of visual turn-by-turn guidance and OSPAN. Exploratory analysis showed that cognitive load remained stable across extended multi-turn conversations. All tasks maintained mean glance durations well below the well-established 2-second safety threshold, confirming low visual demand. Furthermore, drivers consistently dedicated longer glances to the roadway between brief off-road glances toward the device during task completion, particularly during voice-based interactions, rendering longer total-eyes-off-road time findings less consequential. Subjective ratings mirrored objective data, with participants reporting low effort, demands, and perceived distraction for Gemini Live. These findings demonstrate that advanced LLM conversational agents, when implemented via voice interfaces, impose cognitive and visual demands comparable to established, low-risk hands-free benchmarks, supporting their safe deployment in the driving environment.
tldr: This study evaluates the visual and cognitive demands of an in-vehicle LLM conversational agent (Gemini Live) during driving, finding it comparable to hands-free phone calls and posing low visual demand.
tldr_zh: 该研究评估了在驾驶过程中车载LLM对话代理(Gemini Live)的视觉和认知需求，发现其与免提电话相当，且视觉需求较低。
summary_zh: 驾驶员分心仍然是导致机动车碰撞的主要原因之一，因此需要对新型车载技术进行严格评估。本研究评估了先进的大型语言模型（LLM）对话代理（Gemini Live）在实际道路驾驶中产生的视觉和认知负荷，并将其与免提电话、视觉逐向导航（低负荷基线）以及操作跨度（OSPAN）任务（高负荷锚点）进行了比较。三十二名持证驾驶员在完成五个次要任务的同时，通过检测反应任务（DRT）测量认知负荷，通过眼动追踪测量视觉注意力，并通过主观工作负荷评定量表测量主观工作负荷。结果表明，Gemini Live互动（包括单轮和多轮）和免提电话的认知负荷水平相似，均介于视觉逐向导航和OSPAN任务之间。探索性分析表明，认知负荷在较长的多轮对话中保持稳定。所有任务的平均注视时长均远低于既定的2秒安全阈值，证实了较低的视觉负荷。此外，在完成任务期间，驾驶员在短暂注视道路之外设备后，会始终将更长的注视时间分配给道路，尤其是在基于语音的互动中，这使得较长的总视线离开道路时间的发现变得不那么重要。主观评定与客观数据相符，参与者报告Gemini Live的任务努力程度、需求和感知到的分心程度均较低。这些发现表明，先进的LLM对话代理在通过语音界面实施时，产生的认知和视觉负荷与已建立的、低风险的免提标准相当，支持它们在驾驶环境中安全部署。

title: Beyond Error-Based Optimization: Experience-Driven Symbolic Regression with Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning
summary: Symbolic Regression aims to automatically identify compact and interpretable mathematical expressions that model the functional relationship between input and output variables. Most existing search-based symbolic regression methods typically rely on the fitting error to inform the search process. However, in the vast expression space, numerous candidate expressions may exhibit similar error values while differing substantially in structure, leading to ambiguous search directions and hindering convergence to the underlying true function. To address this challenge, we propose a novel framework named EGRL-SR (Experience-driven Goal-conditioned Reinforcement Learning for Symbolic Regression). In contrast to traditional error-driven approaches, EGRL-SR introduces a new perspective: leveraging precise historical trajectories and optimizing the action-value network to proactively guide the search process, thereby achieving a more robust expression search. Specifically, we formulate symbolic regression as a goal-conditioned reinforcement learning problem and incorporate hindsight experience replay, allowing the action-value network to generalize common mapping patterns from diverse input-output pairs. Moreover, we design an all-point satisfaction binary reward function that encourages the action-value network to focus on structural patterns rather than low-error expressions, and concurrently propose a structure-guided heuristic exploration strategy to enhance search diversity and space coverage. Experiments on public benchmarks show that EGRL-SR consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods in recovery rate and robustness, and can recover more complex expressions under the same search budget. Ablation results validate that the action-value network effectively guides the search, with both the reward function and the exploration strategy playing critical roles.
tldr: The paper introduces EGRL-SR, a reinforcement learning framework for symbolic regression that uses experience replay and a goal-conditioned approach to guide the search for mathematical expressions, outperforming traditional error-driven methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种基于强化学习的符号回归框架EGRL-SR，该框架利用经验回放和目标条件方法来指导数学表达式的搜索，优于传统的基于误差驱动的方法。
summary_zh: 符号回归旨在自动识别简洁且可解释的数学表达式，用于建模输入和输出变量之间的函数关系。大多数现有的基于搜索的符号回归方法通常依赖于拟合误差来指导搜索过程。然而，在广阔的表达式空间中，大量候选表达式可能表现出相似的误差值，但结构差异很大，导致模糊的搜索方向并阻碍收敛到潜在的真实函数。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种名为EGRL-SR（基于经验的目标条件强化学习符号回归）的新框架。与传统的误差驱动方法不同，EGRL-SR引入了一个新的视角：利用精确的历史轨迹并优化动作价值网络，从而主动指导搜索过程，实现更稳健的表达式搜索。具体而言，我们将符号回归问题形式化为一个目标条件强化学习问题，并结合追溯经验回放，使动作价值网络能够泛化来自各种输入-输出对的常见映射模式。此外，我们设计了一个全点满足二元奖励函数，鼓励动作价值网络专注于结构模式而不是低误差表达式，并同时提出了一种结构引导的启发式探索策略，以增强搜索多样性和空间覆盖率。在公共基准上的实验表明，EGRL-SR在恢复率和鲁棒性方面始终优于最先进的方法，并且可以在相同的搜索预算下恢复更复杂的表达式。消融实验结果验证了动作价值网络有效地指导了搜索，其中奖励函数和探索策略都起着关键作用。

title: HCVR Scene Generation: High Compatibility Virtual Reality Environment Generation for Extended Redirected Walking
summary: Natural walking enhances immersion in virtual environments (VEs), but physical space limitations and obstacles hinder exploration, especially in large virtual scenes. Redirected Walking (RDW) techniques mitigate this by subtly manipulating the virtual camera to guide users away from physical collisions within pre-defined VEs. However, RDW efficacy diminishes significantly when substantial geometric divergence exists between the physical and virtual environments, leading to unavoidable collisions. Existing scene generation methods primarily focus on object relationships or layout aesthetics, often neglecting the crucial aspect of physical compatibility required for effective RDW. To address this, we introduce HCVR (High Compatibility Virtual Reality Environment Generation), a novel framework that generates virtual scenes inherently optimized for alignment-based RDW controllers. HCVR first employs ENI++, a novel, boundary-sensitive metric to evaluate the incompatibility between physical and virtual spaces by comparing rotation-sensitive visibility polygons. Guided by the ENI++ compatibility map and user prompts, HCVR utilizes a Large Language Model (LLM) for context-aware 3D asset retrieval and initial layout generation. The framework then strategically adjusts object selection, scaling, and placement to maximize coverage of virtually incompatible regions, effectively guiding users towards RDW-feasible paths. User studies evaluating physical collisions and layout quality demonstrate HCVR's effectiveness with HCVR-generated scenes, resulting in 22.78 times fewer physical collisions and received 35.89\% less on ENI++ score compared to LLM-based generation with RDW, while also receiving 12.5\% higher scores on user feedback to layout design.
tldr: The paper introduces HCVR, a framework using LLMs and a novel incompatibility metric (ENI++) to generate VR scenes that are highly compatible with Redirected Walking (RDW) techniques, reducing physical collisions and improving user experience over LLM-based generated scenes.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍HCVR，一个利用LLM和新型不兼容性度量标准(ENI++)生成与重定向行走(RDW)技术高度兼容的VR场景的框架，与基于LLM生成的场景相比，减少了物理碰撞并改善了用户体验。
summary_zh: 自然行走可以增强在虚拟环境（VEs）中的沉浸感，但物理空间限制和障碍物会阻碍探索，尤其是在大型虚拟场景中。重定向行走（RDW）技术通过巧妙地操纵虚拟摄像机，引导用户避开预定义虚拟环境中的物理碰撞，从而缓解这一问题。然而，当物理环境和虚拟环境之间存在显著的几何差异时，RDW 的有效性会显著降低，导致不可避免的碰撞。现有的场景生成方法主要关注对象关系或布局美学，常常忽略了有效 RDW 所需的关键方面——物理兼容性。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 HCVR（高兼容性虚拟现实环境生成），这是一个新颖的框架，用于生成本质上针对基于对齐的 RDW 控制器进行优化的虚拟场景。HCVR 首先采用 ENI++，一种新颖的、对边界敏感的指标，通过比较旋转敏感的可见多边形来评估物理空间和虚拟空间之间的不兼容性。在 ENI++ 兼容性图和用户提示的指导下，HCVR 利用大型语言模型（LLM）进行上下文感知的 3D 资产检索和初始布局生成。然后，该框架策略性地调整对象选择、缩放和放置，以最大限度地覆盖虚拟不兼容区域，从而有效地引导用户走向 RDW 可行的路径。评估物理碰撞和布局质量的用户研究表明，HCVR 对于 HCVR 生成的场景是有效的，与基于 LLM 的 RDW 生成方法相比，物理碰撞次数减少了 22.78 倍，ENI++ 分数降低了 35.89％，同时用户对布局设计的反馈得分也提高了 12.5％。

title: HyperNet-Adaptation for Diffusion-Based Test Case Generation
summary: The increasing deployment of deep learning systems requires systematic evaluation of their reliability in real-world scenarios. Traditional gradient-based adversarial attacks introduce small perturbations that rarely correspond to realistic failures and mainly assess robustness rather than functional behavior. Generative test generation methods offer an alternative but are often limited to simple datasets or constrained input domains. Although diffusion models enable high-fidelity image synthesis, their computational cost and limited controllability restrict their applicability to large-scale testing. We present HyNeA, a generative testing method that enables direct and efficient control over diffusion-based generation. HyNeA provides dataset-free controllability through hypernetworks, allowing targeted manipulation of the generative process without relying on architecture-specific conditioning mechanisms or dataset-driven adaptations such as fine-tuning. HyNeA employs a distinct training strategy that supports instance-level tuning to identify failure-inducing test cases without requiring datasets that explicitly contain examples of similar failures. This approach enables the targeted generation of realistic failure cases at substantially lower computational cost than search-based methods. Experimental results show that HyNeA improves controllability and test diversity compared to existing generative test generators and generalizes to domains where failure-labeled training data is unavailable.
tldr: The paper introduces HyNeA, a hypernetwork-based method for controllable and efficient test case generation using diffusion models, enabling targeted failure identification in deep learning systems without reliance on specific datasets or architecture adaptations.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种基于超网络的 HyNeA 方法，用于使用扩散模型进行可控且高效的测试用例生成，从而能够在深度学习系统中进行有针对性的故障识别，而无需依赖特定的数据集或架构调整。
summary_zh: 深度学习系统日益广泛的部署要求对其在真实场景中的可靠性进行系统评估。传统的基于梯度的对抗性攻击引入的微小扰动很少对应于实际故障，并且主要评估鲁棒性而非功能行为。生成式测试生成方法提供了一种替代方案，但通常仅限于简单数据集或受限输入域。虽然扩散模型能够实现高保真图像合成，但其计算成本和有限的可控性限制了其在大规模测试中的适用性。我们提出HyNeA，一种生成式测试方法，可直接且高效地控制基于扩散的生成过程。HyNeA通过超网络提供无数据集的可控性，允许对生成过程进行有针对性的操纵，而无需依赖于特定于架构的条件机制或数据集驱动的自适应（如微调）。HyNeA采用独特的训练策略，支持实例级别的调整，以识别导致故障的测试用例，而不需要明确包含类似故障示例的数据集。与基于搜索的方法相比，这种方法能够以显著更低的计算成本有针对性地生成真实的故障用例。实验结果表明，与现有的生成式测试生成器相比，HyNeA提高了可控性和测试多样性，并且可以推广到缺乏故障标记训练数据的领域。

title: Influence of Operator Expertise on Robot Supervision and Intervention
summary: With increasing levels of robot autonomy, robots are increasingly being supervised by users with varying levels of robotics expertise. As the diversity of the user population increases, it is important to understand how users with different expertise levels approach the supervision task and how this impacts performance of the human-robot team. This exploratory study investigates how operators with varying expertise levels perceive information and make intervention decisions when supervising a remote robot. We conducted a user study (N=27) where participants supervised a robot autonomously exploring four unknown tunnel environments in a simulator, and provided waypoints to intervene when they believed the robot had encountered difficulties. By analyzing the interaction data and questionnaire responses, we identify differing patterns in intervention timing and decision-making strategies across novice, intermediate, and expert users.
tldr: This study explores how different levels of user expertise affect remote robot supervision and intervention strategies in simulated tunnel exploration, revealing differences in intervention timing and decision-making among novice, intermediate, and expert users.
tldr_zh: 该研究探讨了不同专业水平的用户如何影响远程机器人监控和干预策略，在模拟隧道探索中，揭示了新手、中级和专家用户在干预时间和决策方面的差异。
summary_zh: 随着机器人自主程度的不断提高，越来越多的机器人受到具有不同机器人专业知识水平用户的监督。随着用户群体多样性的增加，重要的是了解不同专业知识水平的用户如何处理监督任务，以及这如何影响人机团队的绩效。本探索性研究调查了具有不同专业知识水平的操作员在监督远程机器人时，如何感知信息并做出干预决策。我们进行了一项用户研究（N=27），参与者在一个模拟器中监督一个自主探索四个未知隧道环境的机器人，并在他们认为机器人遇到困难时提供航路点进行干预。通过分析交互数据和问卷调查回复，我们发现了新手、中级和专家用户在干预时机和决策策略上的不同模式。

title: Systematic Evaluation of Hip Exoskeleton Assistance Parameters for Enhancing Gait Stability During Ground Slip Perturbations
summary: Falls are the leading cause of injury related hospitalization and mortality among older adults. Consequently, mitigating age-related declines in gait stability and reducing fall risk during walking is a critical goal for assistive devices. Lower-limb exoskeletons have the potential to support users in maintaining stability during walking. However, most exoskeleton controllers are optimized to reduce the energetic cost of walking rather than to improve stability. While some studies report stability benefits with assistance, the effects of specific parameters, such as assistance magnitude and duration, remain unexplored. To address this gap, we systematically modulated the magnitude and duration of torque provided by a bilateral hip exoskeleton during slip perturbations in eight healthy adults, quantifying stability using whole-body angular momentum (WBAM). WBAM responses were governed by a significant interaction between assistance magnitude and duration, with duration determining whether exoskeleton assistance was stabilizing or destabilizing relative to not wearing the exoskeleton device. Compared to an existing energy-optimized controller, experimentally identified stability-optimal parameters reduced WBAM range by 25.7% on average. Notably, substantial inter-subject variability was observed in the parameter combinations that minimized WBAM during perturbations. We found that optimizing exoskeleton assistance for energetic outcomes alone is insufficient for improving reactive stability during gait perturbations. Stability-focused exoskeleton control should prioritize temporal assistance parameters and include user-specific personalization. This study represents an important step toward personalized, stability-focused exoskeleton control, with direct implications for improving stability and reducing fall risk in older adults.
tldr: This paper systematically evaluates hip exoskeleton assistance parameters (magnitude and duration) to enhance gait stability during slip perturbations, finding that temporally optimized and personalized assistance reduces instability better than energy-optimized assistance, highlighting the need for stability-focused exoskeleton control.
tldr_zh: 本文系统地评估了髋关节外骨骼辅助参数（幅度和持续时间）以增强滑倒扰动期间的步态稳定性，发现时间优化和个性化的辅助比能量优化辅助更能减少不稳定性，强调了对外骨骼进行稳定性聚焦控制的需求。
summary_zh: 跌倒是老年人因受伤住院和死亡的主要原因。因此，减轻与年龄相关的步态稳定性下降并降低行走过程中的跌倒风险是辅助设备的关键目标。下肢外骨骼有潜力帮助使用者在行走过程中保持稳定。然而，大多数外骨骼控制器都经过优化，以降低行走的能量消耗，而不是提高稳定性。虽然一些研究报告了辅助带来的稳定性益处，但诸如辅助幅度和持续时间等特定参数的影响仍未得到探索。为了弥补这一差距，我们系统地调节了双侧髋关节外骨骼在滑倒扰动期间提供的扭矩幅度和持续时间，并在八名健康成年人身上使用全身角动量 (WBAM) 来量化稳定性。WBAM 响应取决于辅助幅度和持续时间之间的显著交互作用，其中持续时间决定了相对于不穿戴外骨骼设备，外骨骼辅助是稳定的还是不稳定的。与现有的能量优化控制器相比，实验确定的稳定性最优参数平均降低了 25.7% 的 WBAM 范围。值得注意的是，在扰动期间最小化 WBAM 的参数组合中观察到显著的个体间差异。我们发现，仅针对能量消耗优化外骨骼辅助不足以改善步态扰动期间的反应性稳定性。以稳定性为中心的外骨骼控制应优先考虑时间辅助参数，并包含用户特定的个性化。这项研究代表了朝着个性化的、以稳定性为中心的外骨骼控制迈出的重要一步，对提高老年人的稳定性和降低跌倒风险具有直接影响。

title: DWPP: Dynamic Window Pure Pursuit Considering Velocity and Acceleration Constraints
summary: Pure pursuit and its variants are widely used for mobile robot path tracking owing to their simplicity and computational efficiency. However, many conventional approaches do not explicitly account for velocity and acceleration constraints, resulting in discrepancies between commanded and actual velocities that result in overshoot and degraded tracking performance. To address this problem, this paper proposes dynamic window pure pursuit (DWPP), which fundamentally reformulates the command velocity computation process to explicitly incorporate velocity and acceleration constraints. Specifically, DWPP formulates command velocity computation in the velocity space (the $v$-$ω$ plane) and selects the command velocity as the point within the dynamic window that is closest to the line $ω= κv$. Experimental results demonstrate that DWPP avoids constraint-violating commands and achieves superior path-tracking accuracy compared with conventional pure pursuit methods. The proposed method has been integrated into the official Nav2 repository and is publicly available (https://github.com/ros-navigation/navigation2).
tldr: The paper introduces Dynamic Window Pure Pursuit (DWPP), a path tracking algorithm for mobile robots that incorporates velocity and acceleration constraints, leading to improved tracking accuracy. The algorithm has been integrated into the Nav2 repository.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了动态窗口纯粹追踪（DWPP）算法，这是一种用于移动机器人路径跟踪的算法，它考虑了速度和加速度约束，从而提高了跟踪精度。该算法已集成到Nav2存储库中。
summary_zh: 纯粹跟踪及其变体因其简单性和计算效率而被广泛应用于移动机器人路径跟踪。然而，许多传统方法没有明确考虑速度和加速度约束，导致指令速度与实际速度之间存在差异，从而导致过冲和跟踪性能下降。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种动态窗口纯粹跟踪（DWPP）算法，该算法从根本上重新制定了指令速度计算过程，以明确地纳入速度和加速度约束。具体而言，DWPP在速度空间（$v$-$ω$平面）中建立指令速度计算，并将指令速度选择为动态窗口内最接近直线$ω= κv$的点。实验结果表明，与传统的纯粹跟踪方法相比，DWPP避免了违反约束的指令，并实现了卓越的路径跟踪精度。所提出的方法已集成到官方Nav2存储库中，并可公开获取（https://github.com/ros-navigation/navigation2）。

title: Implementing Knowledge Representation and Reasoning with Object Oriented Design
summary: This paper introduces KRROOD, a framework designed to bridge the integration gap between modern software engineering and Knowledge Representation & Reasoning (KR&R) systems. While Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) is the standard for developing complex applications, existing KR&R frameworks often rely on external ontologies and specialized languages that are difficult to integrate with imperative code. KRROOD addresses this by treating knowledge as a first-class programming abstraction using native class structures, bridging the gap between the logic programming and OOP paradigms. We evaluate the system on the OWL2Bench benchmark and a human-robot task learning scenario. Experimental results show that KRROOD achieves strong performance while supporting the expressive reasoning required for real-world autonomous systems.
tldr: The paper introduces KRROOD, a framework integrating Knowledge Representation & Reasoning with Object-Oriented Programming by treating knowledge as native class structures, demonstrating strong performance in OWL2Bench and human-robot task learning. This aims to close the integration gap between KR&R systems and modern software engineering.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 KRROOD 框架，通过将知识视为原生类结构，将知识表示与推理和面向对象编程集成在一起，并在 OWL2Bench 和人机任务学习中表现出强大的性能。这旨在弥合 KR&R 系统与现代软件工程之间的集成差距。
summary_zh: 本文介绍KRROOD，一种旨在弥合现代软件工程与知识表示与推理（KR&R）系统之间集成鸿沟的框架。虽然面向对象编程（OOP）是开发复杂应用程序的标准，但现有的KR&R框架通常依赖于外部本体和专用语言，这些语言难以与命令式代码集成。KRROOD通过使用原生类结构将知识视为一流的编程抽象来解决这个问题，从而弥合了逻辑编程和OOP范式之间的差距。我们在OWL2Bench基准测试和人机任务学习场景中评估了该系统。实验结果表明，KRROOD在支持现实世界自主系统所需的富有表现力的推理的同时，也实现了强大的性能。

title: Robust Haptic Rendering Using a Nonlinear Impedance Matching Approach (NIMA) for Robotic Laparoscopic Surgery
summary: Background: The integration of haptic feedback into robot-assisted minimally invasive surgery (RAMIS) has long been limited by challenges in accurately rendering forces and ensuring system safety. The need for robust, high-fidelity haptic systems is critical for enhancing the precision and reliability of teleoperated surgical tools. Methods: In this study, we present a Nonlinear Impedance Matching Approach (NIMA) designed to improve force rendering by accurately modelling complex tool-tissue interactions. Based on our previously validated Impedance Matching Approach (IMA), our novel NIMA method includes nonlinear dynamics to capture and render tool-tissue forces effectively. Results: NIMA improves force feedback accuracy with a mean absolute error (MAE) of 0.01 (SD 0.02) N, achieving a 95% reduction in MAE compared to IMA. Furthermore, NIMA effectively eliminates haptic "kickback" by ensuring no force is applied by the haptic device to the user's hand when they release the handle, enhancing both patient safety and user comfort. Conclusion: NIMA's ability to account for nonlinearities in tool-tissue interactions provides an improvement in force fidelity, responsiveness, and precision across various surgical conditions.
