Our findings promote the advancement of haptic feedback systems for robotic surgery, offering a realistic and reliable interface for robot-assisted surgical procedures.
tldr: The paper introduces a Nonlinear Impedance Matching Approach (NIMA) for haptic rendering in robotic laparoscopic surgery, demonstrating significant improvements in force feedback accuracy and eliminating haptic "kickback" compared to previous methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种用于机器人腹腔镜手术中触觉渲染的非线性阻抗匹配方法（NIMA），与以往方法相比，该方法在力反馈精度方面有显著提高，并消除了触觉“反冲”。
summary_zh: 背景：触觉反馈集成到机器人辅助微创手术（RAMIS）中长期以来受到精确渲染力和确保系统安全性的挑战限制。对于增强远程操作手术工具的精确性和可靠性而言，稳健、高保真的触觉系统至关重要。方法：在本研究中，我们提出了一种非线性阻抗匹配方法（NIMA），旨在通过精确建模复杂的工具-组织相互作用来提高力渲染能力。基于我们先前验证的阻抗匹配方法（IMA），我们新的NIMA方法包含非线性动力学以有效捕捉和渲染工具-组织力。结果：NIMA提高了力反馈精度，平均绝对误差（MAE）为0.01（SD 0.02） N，与IMA相比，MAE降低了95%。此外，NIMA通过确保用户松开手柄时触觉设备不对用户的手施加任何力，有效地消除了触觉“反冲”，从而提高了患者安全性和用户舒适度。结论：NIMA能够考虑工具-组织相互作用中的非线性，从而在各种手术条件下改进了力的保真度、响应性和精度。我们的发现促进了机器人手术触觉反馈系统的进步，为机器人辅助手术程序提供了一个真实可靠的界面。

title: Real-Time Wildfire Localization on the NASA Autonomous Modular Sensor using Deep Learning
summary:
High-altitude, multi-spectral, aerial imagery is scarce and expensive to acquire, yet it is necessary for algorithmic advances and application of machine learning models to high-impact problems such as wildfire detection. We introduce a human-annotated dataset from the NASA Autonomous Modular Sensor (AMS) using 12-channel, medium to high altitude (3 - 50 km) aerial wildfire images similar to those used in current US wildfire missions. Our dataset combines spectral data from 12 different channels, including infrared (IR), short-wave IR (SWIR), and thermal. We take imagery from 20 wildfire missions and randomly sample small patches to generate over 4000 images with high variability, including occlusions by smoke/clouds, easily-confused false positives, and nighttime imagery.
  We demonstrate results from a deep-learning model to automate the human-intensive process of fire perimeter determination. We train two deep neural networks, one for image classification and the other for pixel-level segmentation. The networks are combined into a unique real-time segmentation model to efficiently localize active wildfire on an incoming image feed. Our model achieves 96% classification accuracy, 74% Intersection-over-Union(IoU), and 84% recall surpassing past methods, including models trained on satellite data and classical color-rule algorithms. By leveraging a multi-spectral dataset, our model is able to detect active wildfire at nighttime and behind clouds, while distinguishing between false positives. We find that data from the SWIR, IR, and thermal bands is the most important to distinguish fire perimeters. Our code and dataset can be found here: https://github.com/nasa/Autonomous-Modular-Sensor-Wildfire-Segmentation/tree/main and https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1-u4vs9rqwkwgdeeeoUhftCxrfe_4QPTn?=usp=drive_link
tldr: This paper introduces a new multi-spectral wildfire dataset from NASA's Autonomous Modular Sensor and presents a deep learning model for real-time wildfire localization, achieving high accuracy in challenging conditions like nighttime and cloud cover.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个来自NASA自主模块化传感器的新的多光谱野火数据集，并提出了一个用于实时野火定位的深度学习模型，该模型在夜间和云层覆盖等具有挑战性的条件下实现了高精度。
summary_zh:
高空、多光谱航空影像的获取成本高昂且稀缺，但对于算法进步以及机器学习模型应用于诸如野火探测等高影响力问题至关重要。我们引入了一个由人工标注的数据集，该数据集来自 NASA 自主模块化传感器（AMS），使用 12 通道、中高空（3-50 公里）的航空野火图像，这些图像与当前美国野火任务中使用的图像相似。我们的数据集结合了来自 12 个不同通道的光谱数据，包括红外（IR）、短波红外（SWIR）和热红外。我们选取了来自 20 个野火任务的影像，并随机采样小块以生成超过 4000 张具有高度变异性的图像，其中包括烟雾/云层的遮挡、容易混淆的假阳性以及夜间图像。

我们展示了一个深度学习模型的结果，该模型旨在自动执行人工密集型的火 perimeter 确定过程。我们训练了两个深度神经网络，一个用于图像分类，另一个用于像素级分割。这两个网络被组合成一个独特的实时分割模型，以有效地定位传入图像馈送中的活跃野火。我们的模型达到了 96% 的分类准确率、74% 的交并比（IoU）和 84% 的召回率，超越了过去的方法，包括在卫星数据和经典颜色规则算法上训练的模型。通过利用多光谱数据集，我们的模型能够在夜间和云层后方检测到活跃野火，同时区分假阳性。我们发现来自 SWIR、IR 和热红外波段的数据对于区分火perimeter最为重要。我们的代码和数据集可以在以下位置找到：https://github.com/nasa/Autonomous-Modular-Sensor-Wildfire-Segmentation/tree/main 和 https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1-u4vs9rqwkwgdeeeoUhftCxrfe_4QPTn?=usp=drive_link

title: Pb4U-GNet: Resolution-Adaptive Garment Simulation via Propagation-before-Update Graph Network
summary: Garment simulation is fundamental to various applications in computer vision and graphics, from virtual try-on to digital human modelling. However, conventional physics-based methods remain computationally expensive, hindering their application in time-sensitive scenarios. While graph neural networks (GNNs) offer promising acceleration, existing approaches exhibit poor cross-resolution generalisation, demonstrating significant performance degradation on higher-resolution meshes beyond the training distribution. This stems from two key factors: (1) existing GNNs employ fixed message-passing depth that fails to adapt information aggregation to mesh density variation, and (2) vertex-wise displacement magnitudes are inherently resolution-dependent in garment simulation. To address these issues, we introduce Propagation-before-Update Graph Network (Pb4U-GNet), a resolution-adaptive framework that decouples message propagation from feature updates. Pb4U-GNet incorporates two key mechanisms: (1) dynamic propagation depth control, adjusting message-passing iterations based on mesh resolution, and (2) geometry-aware update scaling, which scales predictions according to local mesh characteristics. Extensive experiments show that even trained solely on low-resolution meshes, Pb4U-GNet exhibits strong generalisability across diverse mesh resolutions, addressing a fundamental challenge in neural garment simulation.
tldr: The paper introduces Pb4U-GNet, a graph neural network for garment simulation that adapts to varying mesh resolutions, improving generalization and computational efficiency compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为Pb4U-GNet的图神经网络，用于服装模拟，它可以适应不同的网格分辨率，与现有方法相比，提高了泛化能力和计算效率。
summary_zh: 服装模拟是计算机视觉和图形学中诸多应用的基础，从虚拟试穿到数字人体建模皆需用到。然而，传统的基于物理的方法计算成本仍然很高，阻碍了它们在时间敏感场景中的应用。虽然图神经网络（GNNs）提供了有希望的加速方案，但现有的方法表现出较差的跨分辨率泛化能力，在高分辨率网格上的性能显著下降，超出了训练分布。这源于两个关键因素：（1）现有GNNs采用固定的消息传递深度，无法使信息聚合适应网格密度的变化，以及（2）逐顶点位移幅度在服装模拟中固有地依赖于分辨率。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了“先传播后更新图网络”（Pb4U-GNet），这是一个解耦消息传播和特征更新的分辨率自适应框架。 Pb4U-GNet包含两个关键机制：（1）动态传播深度控制，根据网格分辨率调整消息传递迭代次数，以及（2）几何感知更新缩放，根据局部网格特征缩放预测结果。 大量实验表明，即使仅在低分辨率网格上训练，Pb4U-GNet也展现出强大的跨多种网格分辨率的泛化能力，解决了神经服装模拟中的一项根本性挑战。

title: UBATrack: Spatio-Temporal State Space Model for General Multi-Modal Tracking
summary: Multi-modal object tracking has attracted considerable attention by integrating multiple complementary inputs (e.g., thermal, depth, and event data) to achieve outstanding performance. Although current general-purpose multi-modal trackers primarily unify various modal tracking tasks (i.e., RGB-Thermal infrared, RGB-Depth or RGB-Event tracking) through prompt learning, they still overlook the effective capture of spatio-temporal cues. In this work, we introduce a novel multi-modal tracking framework based on a mamba-style state space model, termed UBATrack. Our UBATrack comprises two simple yet effective modules: a Spatio-temporal Mamba Adapter (STMA) and a Dynamic Multi-modal Feature Mixer. The former leverages Mamba's long-sequence modeling capability to jointly model cross-modal dependencies and spatio-temporal visual cues in an adapter-tuning manner. The latter further enhances multi-modal representation capacity across multiple feature dimensions to improve tracking robustness. In this way, UBATrack eliminates the need for costly full-parameter fine-tuning, thereby improving the training efficiency of multi-modal tracking algorithms. Experiments show that UBATrack outperforms state-of-the-art methods on RGB-T, RGB-D, and RGB-E tracking benchmarks, achieving outstanding results on the LasHeR, RGBT234, RGBT210, DepthTrack, VOT-RGBD22, and VisEvent datasets.
tldr: The paper introduces UBATrack, a novel multi-modal object tracking framework based on a Mamba-style state space model, achieving state-of-the-art performance on RGB-T, RGB-D, and RGB-E tracking benchmarks with improved training efficiency.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 UBATrack，一个基于 Mamba 风格状态空间模型的新型多模态对象跟踪框架，在 RGB-T、RGB-D 和 RGB-E 跟踪基准上实现了最先进的性能，并提高了训练效率。
summary_zh: 多模态目标跟踪通过整合多种互补输入（例如，热成像、深度和事件数据）以实现卓越性能，引起了广泛关注。尽管当前通用的多模态跟踪器主要通过提示学习统一各种模态跟踪任务（即，RGB-热红外、RGB-深度或RGB-事件跟踪），但它们仍然忽略了时空线索的有效捕获。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种基于Mamba风格状态空间模型的新型多模态跟踪框架，称为UBATrack。我们的UBATrack包含两个简单而有效的模块：时空Mamba适配器（STMA）和动态多模态特征混合器。前者利用Mamba的长序列建模能力，以适配器调优的方式联合建模跨模态依赖性和时空视觉线索。后者进一步增强了跨多个特征维度的多模态表示能力，以提高跟踪鲁棒性。通过这种方式，UBATrack消除了对昂贵的完整参数微调的需求，从而提高了多模态跟踪算法的训练效率。实验表明，UBATrack在RGB-T、RGB-D和RGB-E跟踪基准上优于最先进的方法，在LasHeR、RGBT234、RGBT210、DepthTrack、VOT-RGBD22和VisEvent数据集上取得了出色的结果。

title: Motion 3-to-4: 3D Motion Reconstruction for 4D Synthesis
summary: We present Motion 3-to-4, a feed-forward framework for synthesising high-quality 4D dynamic objects from a single monocular video and an optional 3D reference mesh. While recent advances have significantly improved 2D, video, and 3D content generation, 4D synthesis remains difficult due to limited training data and the inherent ambiguity of recovering geometry and motion from a monocular viewpoint. Motion 3-to-4 addresses these challenges by decomposing 4D synthesis into static 3D shape generation and motion reconstruction. Using a canonical reference mesh, our model learns a compact motion latent representation and predicts per-frame vertex trajectories to recover complete, temporally coherent geometry. A scalable frame-wise transformer further enables robustness to varying sequence lengths. Evaluations on both standard benchmarks and a new dataset with accurate ground-truth geometry show that Motion 3-to-4 delivers superior fidelity and spatial consistency compared to prior work. Project page is available at https://motion3-to-4.github.io/.
tldr: Motion 3-to-4 uses a feed-forward network to generate 4D dynamic objects from monocular video input and a reference 3D mesh, achieving improved fidelity and spatial consistency by decoupling shape generation and motion reconstruction.
tldr_zh: Motion 3-to-4 提出了一种前馈框架，可以从单目视频输入和参考3D网格生成高质量的4D动态对象，通过解耦形状生成和运动重建，实现了更高的保真度和空间一致性。
summary_zh: 我们提出了Motion 3-to-4，一个前馈框架，用于从单目视频和一个可选的3D参考网格合成高质量的4D动态物体。尽管最近的进展显著改进了2D、视频和3D内容生成，但由于有限的训练数据以及从单目视角恢复几何和运动的固有模糊性，4D合成仍然很困难。Motion 3-to-4通过将4D合成分解为静态3D形状生成和运动重建来应对这些挑战。使用规范参考网格，我们的模型学习了一种紧凑的运动潜在表示，并预测每帧顶点轨迹以恢复完整的、时间上连贯的几何体。一个可扩展的逐帧transformer进一步实现了对不同序列长度的鲁棒性。在标准的基准测试以及包含精确地面真值几何体的新数据集上的评估表明，与先前的工作相比，Motion 3-to-4提供了更高的保真度和空间一致性。项目主页位于https://motion3-to-4.github.io/。

title: Communication-Efficient Multi-Modal Edge Inference via Uncertainty-Aware Distributed Learning
summary: Semantic communication is emerging as a key enabler for distributed edge intelligence due to its capability to convey task-relevant meaning. However, achieving communication-efficient training and robust inference over wireless links remains challenging. This challenge is further exacerbated for multi-modal edge inference (MMEI) by two factors: 1) prohibitive communication overhead for distributed learning over bandwidth-limited wireless links, due to the \emph{multi-modal} nature of the system; and 2) limited robustness under varying channels and noisy multi-modal inputs. In this paper, we propose a three-stage communication-aware distributed learning framework to improve training and inference efficiency while maintaining robustness over wireless channels. In Stage~I, devices perform local multi-modal self-supervised learning to obtain shared and modality-specific encoders without device--server exchange, thereby reducing the communication cost. In Stage~II, distributed fine-tuning with centralized evidential fusion calibrates per-modality uncertainty and reliably aggregates features distorted by noise or channel fading. In Stage~III, an uncertainty-guided feedback mechanism selectively requests additional features for uncertain samples, optimizing the communication--accuracy tradeoff in the distributed setting. Experiments on RGB--depth indoor scene classification show that the proposed framework attains higher accuracy with far fewer training communication rounds and remains robust to modality degradation or channel variation, outperforming existing self-supervised and fully supervised baselines.
tldr: This paper introduces a communication-efficient distributed learning framework for multi-modal edge inference, using self-supervised learning, evidential fusion, and uncertainty-guided feedback to improve accuracy and robustness over bandwidth-limited wireless channels.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种通信高效的分布式学习框架，用于多模态边缘推理。该框架利用自监督学习、证据融合和不确定性引导的反馈机制，以提高在带宽受限的无线信道上的准确性和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 语义通信正成为分布式边缘智能的关键推动因素，因为它能够传递与任务相关的含义。然而，要实现通信高效的训练和在无线链路上的鲁棒推理仍然充满挑战。对于多模态边缘推理（MMEI）而言，这一挑战因以下两个因素而进一步加剧：1）由于系统的\emph{多模态}性质，在带宽受限的无线链路上的分布式学习会产生令人望而却步的通信开销；2）在变化的信道和噪声多模态输入下鲁棒性有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种三阶段的通信感知分布式学习框架，以提高训练和推理的效率，同时保持在无线信道上的鲁棒性。在第一阶段，设备执行本地多模态自监督学习，以获得共享的和模态特定的编码器，无需设备与服务器之间的交换，从而降低通信成本。在第二阶段，采用集中式证据融合的分布式微调校准每种模态的不确定性，并可靠地聚合因噪声或信道衰落而失真的特征。在第三阶段，一种不确定性引导的反馈机制选择性地请求不确定样本的额外特征，从而在分布式环境中优化通信与准确性的权衡。在RGB-深度室内场景分类上的实验表明，所提出的框架以更少的训练通信轮次达到了更高的准确率，并且对模态退化或信道变化保持鲁棒性，优于现有的自监督和完全监督基线。

title: Differentiated Pickup Point Offering for Emission Reduction in Last-Mile Delivery
summary: Pickup points are widely recognized as a sustainable alternative to home delivery, as consolidating orders at pickup locations can shorten delivery routes and improve first-attempt success rates. However, these benefits may be negated when customers drive to pick up their orders. This study proposes a Differentiated Pickup Point Offering (DPO) policy that aims to jointly reduce emissions from delivery truck routes and customer travel. Under DPO, each arriving customer is offered a single recommended pickup point, rather than an unrestricted choice among all locations, while retaining the option of home delivery. We study this problem in a dynamic and stochastic setting, where the pickup point offered to each customer depends on previously realized customer locations and delivery choices. To design effective DPO policies, we adopt a reinforcement learning-based approach that accounts for spatial relationships between customers and pickup points and their implications for future route consolidation. Computational experiments show that differentiated pickup point offerings can substantially reduce total carbon emissions. The proposed policies reduce total emissions by up to 9% relative to home-only delivery and by 2% on average compared with alternative policies, including unrestricted pickup point choice and nearest pickup point assignment. Differentiated offerings are particularly effective in dense urban settings with many pickup points and short inter-location distances. Moreover, explicitly accounting for the dynamic nature of customer arrivals and choices is especially important when customers are less inclined to choose pickup point delivery over home delivery.
tldr: The paper proposes a reinforcement learning-based approach to optimize pickup point offerings for last-mile delivery, aiming to reduce carbon emissions by strategically guiding customers towards specific pickup locations rather than offering unrestricted choice. Results showcase emission reductions compared to home-only delivery and other pickup point strategies.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于强化学习的方法，优化最后一英里配送的取货点方案，旨在通过策略性地引导顾客选择特定的取货点而非提供无限制的选择来减少碳排放。结果表明，与仅送货上门和其他取货点策略相比，碳排放有所降低。
summary_zh: 取货点被广泛认为是家庭配送的一种可持续替代方案，因为在取货点整合订单可以缩短配送路线并提高首次尝试成功率。然而，当客户开车去取货时，这些优势可能会被抵消。本研究提出了一种差异化取货点提供（DPO）策略，旨在共同减少来自送货卡车路线和客户出行的排放。在DPO下，每个到达的客户都会被推荐一个取货点，而不是在所有地点中不受限制地选择，同时保留家庭配送的选项。我们研究了一个动态和随机环境下的这个问题，其中提供给每个客户的取货点取决于先前实现的客户位置和配送选择。为了设计有效的DPO策略，我们采用了一种基于强化学习的方法，该方法考虑了客户和取货点之间的空间关系及其对未来路线整合的影响。计算实验表明，差异化的取货点提供可以显著减少总碳排放量。相对于仅提供家庭配送，所提出的策略可将总排放量减少多达9%，并且与包括不受限制的取货点选择和最近取货点分配在内的其他策略相比，平均减少2%。差异化提供在取货点多且位置间距离短的密集城市环境中尤其有效。此外，当客户不太倾向于选择取货点配送而不是家庭配送时，明确考虑客户到达和选择的动态特性尤为重要。

title: From Observation to Prediction: LSTM for Vehicle Lane Change Forecasting on Highway On/Off-Ramps
summary: On and off-ramps are understudied road sections even though they introduce a higher level of variation in highway interactions. Predicting vehicles' behavior in these areas can decrease the impact of uncertainty and increase road safety. In this paper, the difference between this Area of Interest (AoI) and a straight highway section is studied. Multi-layered LSTM architecture to train the AoI model with ExiD drone dataset is utilized. In the process, different prediction horizons and different models' workflow are tested. The results show great promise on horizons up to 4 seconds with prediction accuracy starting from about 76% for the AoI and 94% for the general highway scenarios on the maximum horizon.
tldr: This paper uses LSTMs to predict vehicle lane changes near highway on/off-ramps, showing promising accuracy (76% up to 4s horizon) for this understudied area using the ExiD drone dataset.
tldr_zh: 该论文使用LSTM预测高速公路匝道附近车辆的变道行为，使用ExiD无人机数据集，在该研究不足的区域展现了有希望的准确率（在4秒预测范围内达到76%）。
summary_zh: 匝道是道路交通中变化性更大的路段，但却鲜有研究。预测车辆在这些区域的行为可以降低不确定性的影响并提高道路安全。本文研究了该兴趣区域（AoI）与直线路段高速公路之间的差异。采用了多层LSTM架构，利用ExiD无人机数据集训练AoI模型。在此过程中，测试了不同的预测范围和不同的模型工作流程。结果表明，在最长预测范围为4秒的情况下，AoI预测精度约为76%，而一般高速公路场景的预测精度约为94%，该方法具有良好的前景。

title: Preparation and Motion Study of Magnetically Driven Micro Soft Robot Mimicking the Cownose Ray
summary: In narrow, unstructured underwater environments such as environmental monitoring and minimally invasive medical procedures, micro soft robots exhibit unique advantages due to their flexible movement capabilities and small size. At the same time, applying bionic technology to the structural design of micro soft robots can significantly improve their swimming performance. However, limited by their miniaturization, these robots are difficult to power internally and usually adopt a wireless power supply method. This study designs and fabricates a magnetically responsive, cownose ray-inspired micro soft robot based on the swimming principle of the cownose ray. The robot is made of a certain proportion of NdFeB and PDMS. Then, a three-dimensional Helmholtz coil is used to generate an oscillating harmonic magnetic field to conduct swimming experiments on the robot, exploring the influence of magnetic field parameters on the robot's swimming performance. The experimental results show that the swimming speed is the fastest at B = 5 mT and f = 11 Hz, reaching 5.25 mm/s, which is about 0.5 body lengths per second. In addition, by adjusting the current direction and frequency of the coil, the robot can perform different swimming modes such as straight swimming, turning swimming, and directional swimming. By employing a stepwise adjustment method, the impact of response errors on the robot's trajectory can be effectively reduced. This study demonstrates a method for magnetically driven micro soft robots, laying a foundation for the application of wireless-driven robots in underwater narrow spaces.
tldr: This paper presents a magnetically driven, cownose ray-inspired micro soft robot made of NdFeB and PDMS, demonstrating controlled swimming in a magnetic field with speeds up to 0.5 body lengths per second and demonstrating various swimming modes.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种磁驱动的、以牛鼻鲼为灵感的微型软体机器人，该机器人由钕铁硼和PDMS制成。实验证明，该机器人在磁场中能以高达每秒0.5个体长的速度进行可控游泳，并展示了不同的游泳模式。
summary_zh: 在狭窄、非结构化的水下环境中，例如环境监测和微创医疗手术，微型软体机器人因其灵活的运动能力和小型尺寸而展现出独特的优势。同时，将仿生技术应用于微型软体机器人的结构设计可以显著提高其游泳性能。然而，受限于其小型化，这些机器人难以进行内部供电，通常采用无线供电方式。本研究基于燕魟的游泳原理，设计并制造了一种磁响应的、仿燕魟微型软体机器人。该机器人由一定比例的钕铁硼（NdFeB）和聚二甲基硅氧烷（PDMS）制成。然后，使用三维亥姆霍兹线圈产生振荡谐波磁场，对机器人进行游泳实验，探索磁场参数对机器人游泳性能的影响。实验结果表明，在B=5 mT和f=11 Hz时游泳速度最快，达到5.25 mm/s，约为每秒0.5个体长。此外，通过调整线圈的电流方向和频率，机器人可以执行不同的游泳模式，如直线游泳、转弯游泳和定向游泳。通过采用逐步调整法，可以有效降低响应误差对机器人轨迹的影响。本研究展示了一种磁驱动的微型软体机器人方法，为无线驱动机器人在水下狭窄空间的应用奠定了基础。

title: Towards Bound Consistency for the No-Overlap Constraint Using MDDs
summary: Achieving bound consistency for the no-overlap constraint is known to be NP-complete. Therefore, several polynomial-time tightening techniques, such as edge finding, not-first-not-last reasoning, and energetic reasoning, have been introduced for this constraint. In this work, we derive the first bound-consistent algorithm for the no-overlap constraint. By building on the no-overlap MDD defined by Ciré and van Hoeve, we extract bounds of the time window of the jobs, allowing us to tighten start and end times in time polynomial in the number of nodes of the MDD. Similarly, to bound the size and time-complexity, we limit the width of the MDD to a threshold, creating a relaxed MDD that can also be used to relax the bound-consistent filtering. Through experiments on a sequencing problem with time windows and a just-in-time objective ($1 \mid r_j, d_j, \bar{d}_j \mid \sum E_j + \sum T_j$), we observe that the proposed filtering, even with a threshold on the width, achieves a stronger reduction in the number of nodes visited in the search tree compared to the previously proposed precedence-detection algorithm of Ciré and van Hoeve. The new filtering also appears to be complementary to classical propagation methods for the no-overlap constraint, allowing a substantial reduction in both the number of nodes and the solving time on several instances.
tldr: This paper presents a bound-consistent algorithm for the no-overlap constraint, utilizing MDDs to tighten job start and end times, and demonstrates improved performance compared to existing methods on a sequencing problem.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种针对无重叠约束的边界一致算法，利用 MDD 来收紧作业的开始和结束时间，并证明在排序问题上比现有方法有更好的性能。
summary_zh: 求解无重叠约束的边界一致性问题已知是NP完全问题。因此，针对该约束引入了几种多项式时间复杂度收紧技术，如边寻找、非首非尾推理和能量推理。在本工作中，我们推导出首个无重叠约束的边界一致性算法。通过构建Ciré和van Hoeve定义的无重叠MDD（多值决策图），我们提取作业时间窗口的边界，从而能够以MDD节点数量的多项式时间复杂度收紧开始时间和结束时间。类似地，为了限制大小和时间复杂度，我们将MDD的宽度限制在一个阈值内，创建一个松弛的MDD，该MDD也可用于松弛边界一致性过滤。通过在带有时间窗口和准时制目标($1 \mid r_j, d_j, \bar{d}_j \mid \sum E_j + \sum T_j$)的排序问题上的实验，我们观察到，即使对宽度设置阈值，所提出的过滤方法与先前提出的Ciré和van Hoeve的优先关系检测算法相比，也能在搜索树中访问的节点数量方面实现更强的缩减效果。新的过滤方法似乎也与无重叠约束的经典传播方法互补，从而能够大幅减少多个实例中的节点数量和求解时间。

title: High-Fidelity 3D Tooth Reconstruction by Fusing Intraoral Scans and CBCT Data via a Deep Implicit Representation
summary: High-fidelity 3D tooth models are essential for digital dentistry, but must capture both the detailed crown and the complete root. Clinical imaging modalities are limited: Cone-Beam Computed Tomography (CBCT) captures the root but has a noisy, low-resolution crown, while Intraoral Scanners (IOS) provide a high-fidelity crown but no root information. A naive fusion of these sources results in unnatural seams and artifacts. We propose a novel, fully-automated pipeline that fuses CBCT and IOS data using a deep implicit representation. Our method first segments and robustly registers the tooth instances, then creates a hybrid proxy mesh combining the IOS crown and the CBCT root. The core of our approach is to use this noisy proxy to guide a class-specific DeepSDF network. This optimization process projects the input onto a learned manifold of ideal tooth shapes, generating a seamless, watertight, and anatomically coherent model. Qualitative and quantitative evaluations show our method uniquely preserves both the high-fidelity crown from IOS and the patient-specific root morphology from CBCT, overcoming the limitations of each modality and naive stitching.
tldr: This paper introduces a deep implicit representation method for fusing intraoral scans (IOS) and cone-beam computed tomography (CBCT) data to generate high-fidelity 3D tooth models, preserving both crown and root details.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种利用深度隐式表示方法融合口内扫描 (IOS) 和锥形束计算机断层扫描 (CBCT) 数据以生成高保真 3D 牙齿模型的技术，能够同时保留牙冠和牙根的细节。
summary_zh: 高保真3D牙齿模型对于数字化牙科至关重要，但必须捕捉到牙冠的细节和完整的牙根。临床成像方式存在局限性：锥束计算机断层扫描(CBCT)可以捕捉到牙根，但牙冠部分噪声大、分辨率低；而口内扫描仪(IOS)可以提供高保真牙冠，但没有牙根信息。简单地融合这些数据源会导致不自然的裂缝和伪影。我们提出了一种新颖的全自动流程，该流程使用深度隐式表示融合CBCT和IOS数据。我们的方法首先分割并稳健地配准牙齿实例，然后创建一个混合代理网格，结合IOS牙冠和CBCT牙根。我们方法的核心是使用这个带噪声的代理网格来引导类特定的DeepSDF网络。这个优化过程将输入投影到学习到的理想牙齿形状流形上，生成一个无缝的、水密的和在解剖学上连贯的模型。定性和定量评估表明，我们的方法独特地保留了来自IOS的高保真牙冠和来自CBCT的患者特定牙根形态，克服了每种模态的局限性以及简单拼接的问题。

title: RegFreeNet: A Registration-Free Network for CBCT-based 3D Dental Implant Planning
summary: As the commercial surgical guide design software usually does not support the export of implant position for pre-implantation data, existing methods have to scan the post-implantation data and map the implant to pre-implantation space to get the label of implant position for training. Such a process is time-consuming and heavily relies on the accuracy of registration algorithm. Moreover, not all hospitals have paired CBCT data, limitting the construction of multi-center dataset. Inspired by the way dentists determine the implant position based on the neighboring tooth texture, we found that even if the implant area is masked, it will not affect the determination of the implant position. Therefore, we propose to mask the implants in the post-implantation data so that any CBCT containing the implants can be used as training data. This paradigm enables us to discard the registration process and makes it possible to construct a large-scale multi-center implant dataset. On this basis, we proposes ImplantFairy, a comprehensive, publicly accessible dental implant dataset with voxel-level 3D annotations of 1622 CBCT data. Furthermore, according to the area variation characteristics of the tooth's spatial structure and the slope information of the implant, we designed a slope-aware implant position prediction network. Specifically, a neighboring distance perception (NDP) module is designed to adaptively extract tooth area variation features, and an implant slope prediction branch assists the network in learning more robust features through additional implant supervision information. Extensive experiments conducted on ImplantFairy and two public dataset demonstrate that the proposed RegFreeNet achieves the state-of-the-art performance.
tldr: The paper introduces RegFreeNet and the ImplantFairy dataset for registration-free 3D dental implant planning using CBCT data, achieving state-of-the-art performance by masking implants in post-implantation data and employing a slope-aware prediction network.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了RegFreeNet和ImplantFairy数据集，用于无配准的基于CBCT的3D牙科种植体规划。通过屏蔽植入后数据中的种植体并采用坡度感知预测网络，实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 由于商业手术导板设计软件通常不支持导出种植体植入前数据中种植体的位置信息，现有方法必须扫描植入后数据并将种植体映射到植入前空间，以获得用于训练的种植体位置标签。这一过程耗时且严重依赖于配准算法的精度。此外，并非所有医院都拥有配对的 CBCT 数据，限制了多中心数据集的构建。受到牙医根据相邻牙齿纹理确定种植体位置的方式的启发，我们发现即使种植区域被遮蔽，也不会影响种植体位置的确定。因此，我们提出在植入后数据中遮蔽种植体，以便任何包含种植体的 CBCT 都可以用作训练数据。这种方案能够让我们舍弃配准过程，并使构建大规模多中心种植体数据集成为可能。在此基础上，我们提出了 ImplantFairy，一个全面的、可公开访问的牙科种植体数据集，包含 1622 个 CBCT 数据的体素级 3D 注释。此外，根据牙齿空间结构的区域变化特征和种植体的斜度信息，我们设计了一个斜度感知种植体位置预测网络。具体而言，设计了一个邻近距离感知 (NDP) 模块，用于自适应地提取牙齿区域变化特征，而种植体斜度预测分支则通过额外的种植体监督信息，辅助网络学习更鲁棒的特征。在 ImplantFairy 和两个公共数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们提出的 RegFreeNet 实现了最先进的性能。

title: Rig-Aware 3D Reconstruction of Vehicle Undercarriages using Gaussian Splatting
summary: Inspecting the undercarriage of used vehicles is a labor-intensive task that requires inspectors to crouch or crawl underneath each vehicle to thoroughly examine it. Additionally, online buyers rarely see undercarriage photos. We present an end-to-end pipeline that utilizes a three-camera rig to capture videos of the undercarriage as the vehicle drives over it, and produces an interactive 3D model of the undercarriage. The 3D model enables inspectors and customers to rotate, zoom, and slice through the undercarriage, allowing them to detect rust, leaks, or impact damage in seconds, thereby improving both workplace safety and buyer confidence. Our primary contribution is a rig-aware Structure-from-Motion (SfM) pipeline specifically designed to overcome the challenges of wide-angle lens distortion and low-parallax scenes. Our method overcomes the challenges of wide-angle lens distortion and low-parallax scenes by integrating precise camera calibration, synchronized video streams, and strong geometric priors from the camera rig. We use a constrained matching strategy with learned components, the DISK feature extractor, and the attention-based LightGlue matcher to generate high-quality sparse point clouds that are often unattainable with standard SfM pipelines. These point clouds seed the Gaussian splatting process to generate photorealistic undercarriage models that render in real-time. Our experiments and ablation studies demonstrate that our design choices are essential to achieve state-of-the-art quality.
tldr: This paper presents a rig-aware Structure-from-Motion pipeline using Gaussian splatting to generate interactive 3D models of vehicle undercarriages, improving inspection efficiency and buyer confidence.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于高斯溅射的、配合相机支架的 Structure-from-Motion 流程，用于生成交互式的车辆底盘3D模型，从而提高检查效率和买家信心。
summary_zh: 检查二手车辆底盘是一项劳动密集型任务，需要检查员蹲伏或爬行到每辆车下进行彻底检查。此外，在线买家很少看到底盘照片。我们提出一个端到端的流程，该流程利用一个三摄像头装置来捕获车辆驶过时底盘的视频，并生成底盘的交互式3D模型。该3D模型使检查员和客户能够旋转、缩放和切片查看底盘，从而在数秒内检测到锈蚀、泄漏或冲击损坏，从而提高工作场所安全性和买家信心。 我们的主要贡献是一个装置感知的运动结构重建（SfM）流程，专门用于克服广角镜头畸变和低视差场景的挑战。我们的方法通过集成精确的相机校准、同步的视频流和来自相机装置的强几何先验，克服了广角镜头畸变和低视差场景的挑战。我们使用具有学习到的组件、DISK特征提取器和基于注意力的LightGlue匹配器的约束匹配策略，以生成高质量的稀疏点云，这些点云通常使用标准SfM流程无法获得。这些点云为高斯溅射过程提供种子，以生成实时渲染的逼真底盘模型。我们的实验和消融研究表明，我们的设计选择对于实现最先进的质量至关重要。

title: Stabilizing autoregressive forecasts in chaotic systems via multi-rate latent recurrence
summary: Long-horizon autoregressive forecasting of chaotic dynamical systems remains challenging due to rapid error amplification and distribution shift: small one-step inaccuracies compound into physically inconsistent rollouts and collapse of large-scale statistics. We introduce MSR-HINE, a hierarchical implicit forecaster that augments multiscale latent priors with multi-rate recurrent modules operating at distinct temporal scales. At each step, coarse-to-fine recurrent states generate latent priors, an implicit one-step predictor refines the state with multiscale latent injections, and a gated fusion with posterior latents enforces scale-consistent updates; a lightweight hidden-state correction further aligns recurrent memories with fused latents. The resulting architecture maintains long-term context on slow manifolds while preserving fast-scale variability, mitigating error accumulation in chaotic rollouts. Across two canonical benchmarks, MSR-HINE yields substantial gains over a U-Net autoregressive baseline: on Kuramoto-Sivashinsky it reduces end-horizon RMSE by 62.8% at H=400 and improves end-horizon ACC by +0.983 (from -0.155 to 0.828), extending the ACC >= 0.5 predictability horizon from 241 to 400 steps; on Lorenz-96 it reduces RMSE by 27.0% at H=100 and improves end horizon ACC by +0.402 (from 0.144 to 0.545), extending the ACC >= 0.5 horizon from 58 to 100 steps.
tldr: The paper introduces MSR-HINE, a novel hierarchical implicit forecaster that uses multi-rate recurrent modules and latent priors to stabilize long-horizon autoregressive forecasting in chaotic dynamical systems, demonstrating significant improvements on Kuramoto-Sivashinsky and Lorenz-96 benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为 MSR-HINE 的新型分层隐式预测器，它利用多速率循环模块和隐变量先验来稳定混沌动力系统中的长程自回归预测，并在 Kuramoto-Sivashinsky 和 Lorenz-96 基准上取得了显著改进。
summary_zh: 混沌动力系统的长程自回归预测仍然具有挑战性，这是由于误差的快速放大和分布偏移：微小的单步误差会累积成物理上不一致的展开，并导致大规模统计量的崩溃。我们引入了MSR-HINE，一种分层隐式预测器，它使用以不同时间尺度运行的多速率循环模块来增强多尺度潜在先验。在每一步中，由粗到精的循环状态生成潜在先验，一个隐式单步预测器通过多尺度潜在注入来细化状态，并通过与后验潜在变量的门控融合来强制执行尺度一致的更新；一个轻量级的隐藏状态校正进一步将循环记忆与融合的潜在变量对齐。由此产生的架构在保持慢流形上的长期上下文的同时，保留了快速尺度的可变性，从而减轻了混沌展开中的误差累积。在两个典型的基准测试中，MSR-HINE相对于U-Net自回归基线产生了显著的增益：在Kuramoto-Sivashinsky问题上，它在H=400时将最终视界RMSE降低了62.8%，并将最终视界ACC提高了+0.983（从-0.155到0.828），将ACC >= 0.5的可预测性视界从241步扩展到400步；在Lorenz-96问题上，它在H=100时将RMSE降低了27.0%，并将最终视界ACC提高了+0.402（从0.144到0.545），将ACC >= 0.5的视界从58步扩展到100步。

title: Landing-Induced Viscoelastic Changes in an Anthropomimetic Foot Joint Structure are Modulated by Foot Structure and Posture
summary: Cadaveric studies have provided important insights into the mechanics of the human foot arch and plantar fascia. However, repeatedly probing posture-dependent viscoelastic responses immediately after landing impact is difficult in biological specimens, leaving the contribution of skeletal architecture to landing dynamics incompletely understood. In this study, we developed an anthropomimetic foot joint structure aimed at replicating the skeletal geometry of the human foot. Using a vertical drop apparatus that simulates landing and a viscoelastic system-identification model, we investigated how skeletal structure and posture modulate the apparent post-impact viscoelastic response. The results show that the multi-jointed anthropomimetic structure exhibited a higher damping ratio than simplified flat and rigid feet. Moreover, ankle dorsiflexion and toe extension systematically shifted the identified parameters, reducing the damping ratio under the tested conditions. Taken together, these findings indicate that an arch-like, multi-jointed skeletal architecture can enhance impact attenuation in an anthropomimetic mechanical foot, and that morphology and passive posture alone can tune the trade-off between attenuation and rebound. The observed posture-dependent trends are qualitatively consistent with reported differences in human landing strategies, suggesting that skeletal architecture may partly account for the modulation. Furthermore, these results highlight the engineering advantage of anatomically informed skeletal replication for achieving human-like apparent viscoelastic behavior through postural adjustment during landing.
tldr: This study creates an anthropomimetic foot to study how skeletal structure and posture affect landing impact, finding that arch-like structures and posture influence impact attenuation and rebound.
tldr_zh: 这项研究创建了一个拟人化的足部结构，以研究骨骼结构和姿势如何影响着陆冲击。研究发现，拱形结构和姿势会影响冲击衰减和回弹。
summary_zh: 对尸体的研究为理解人足弓和足底筋膜的力学性能提供了重要的见解。然而，生物标本在着陆冲击后立即重复探测姿势相关的粘弹性响应是困难的，导致骨骼结构对落地动力学的贡献未能得到充分理解。在本研究中，我们开发了一种拟人化的足部关节结构，旨在复制人足部的骨骼几何形状。使用模拟着陆的垂直跌落装置和一个粘弹性系统辨识模型，我们研究了骨骼结构和姿势如何调节明显的冲击后粘弹性响应。结果表明，多关节的拟人化结构比简化的扁平刚性足表现出更高的阻尼比。此外，踝背屈和脚趾伸展系统地改变了辨识出的参数，降低了在测试条件下的阻尼比。综上所述，这些发现表明，拱形、多关节的骨骼结构可以增强拟人化机械足的冲击衰减能力，并且仅仅形态和被动姿势就可以调节衰减和回弹之间的平衡。观察到的姿势相关趋势与已报道的人类着陆策略的差异在质量上一致，表明骨骼结构可能部分解释了这种调节。此外，这些结果突出了在着陆过程中，通过姿势调整来实现类人的明显粘弹性行为时，解剖学指导下的骨骼复制所具有的工程优势。

title: Scalable Knee-Point Guided Activity Group Selection in Multi-Tree Genetic Programming for Dynamic Multi-Mode Project Scheduling
summary: The dynamic multi-mode resource-constrained project scheduling problem is a challenging scheduling problem that requires making decisions on both the execution order of activities and their corresponding execution modes. Genetic programming has been widely applied as a hyper-heuristic to evolve priority rules that guide the selection of activity-mode pairs from the current eligible set. Recently, an activity group selection strategy has been proposed to select a subset of activities rather than a single activity at each decision point, allowing for more effective scheduling by considering the interdependence between activities. Although effective in small-scale instances, this strategy suffers from scalability issues when applied to larger problems. In this work, we enhance the scalability of the group selection strategy by introducing a knee-point-based selection mechanism to identify a promising subset of activities before evaluating their combinations. An activity ordering rule is first used to rank all eligible activity-mode pairs, followed by a knee point selection to find the promising pairs. Then, a group selection rule selects the best activity combination. We develop a multi-tree GP framework to evolve both types of rules simultaneously. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach scales well to large instances and outperforms GP with sequential decision-making in most scenarios.
tldr: The paper introduces a scalable knee-point guided activity group selection method within a multi-tree Genetic Programming framework for solving dynamic multi-mode resource-constrained project scheduling problems, outperforming traditional GP on large instances.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种可扩展的膝点引导活动组选择方法，在多树遗传编程框架内解决动态多模式资源受限项目调度问题，并在大型实例上优于传统遗传编程。
summary_zh: 动态多模式资源约束项目调度问题是一个极具挑战性的调度问题，它需要在活动执行顺序及其对应的执行模式上做出决策。遗传程序设计已被广泛应用作为一种超启发式方法，以进化出优先规则，从而指导从当前合格集合中选择活动-模式对。最近，一种活动组选择策略被提出，它在每个决策点选择一个活动子集，而非单个活动，从而通过考虑活动之间的相互依赖性来实现更有效的调度。尽管在小规模实例中有效，但该策略在应用于更大规模问题时面临可扩展性问题。在这项工作中，我们通过引入基于拐点的选择机制来增强组选择策略的可扩展性，该机制在评估活动组合之前识别出一个有希望的活动子集。首先使用一个活动排序规则对所有合格的活动-模式对进行排序，然后使用拐点选择来找到有希望的配对。之后，一个组选择规则选择最佳的活动组合。我们开发了一个多树GP框架，同时进化这两种类型的规则。实验结果表明，我们的方法能够很好地扩展到大型实例，并且在大多数情况下优于采用顺序决策的GP。
